## File: src/asunder/attachment.util.ts
``````typescript
 1: import * as path from 'node:path';
 2: 
 3: export interface ParsedDataUrl {
 4:   mimeType: string;
 5:   base64: string;
 6:   buffer: Buffer;
 7: }
 8: 
 9: const DATA_URL_RE = /^data:([\w.+-]+\/[\w.+-]+);base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]+)$/;
10: 
11: export function parseBase64DataUrl(value: string): ParsedDataUrl {
12:   const match = value.match(DATA_URL_RE);
13:   if (!match) {
14:     throw new Error(
15:       'attachments.file_data must be a valid data URL like data:text/plain;base64,SGVsbG8=',
16:     );
17:   }
18: 
19:   const [, mimeType, base64] = match;
20:   const buffer = Buffer.from(base64, 'base64');
21:   const normalizedInput = base64.replace(/=+$/u, '');
22:   const normalizedDecoded = buffer.toString('base64').replace(/=+$/u, '');
23: 
24:   if (!buffer.length || normalizedInput !== normalizedDecoded) {
25:     throw new Error('attachments.file_data contains invalid base64');
26:   }
27: 
28:   return { mimeType, base64, buffer };
29: }
30: 
31: export function inferMimeFromFilename(filename: string): string | null {
32:   const ext = path.extname(filename).toLowerCase();
33: 
34:   switch (ext) {
35:     case '.txt':
36:     case '.md':
37:       return 'text/plain';
38:     case '.json':
39:       return 'application/json';
40:     case '.csv':
41:       return 'text/csv';
42:     case '.pdf':
43:       return 'application/pdf';
44:     default:
45:       return null;
46:   }
47: }
``````

## File: src/asunder/llmBridge.controller.spec.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { LlmBridgeController } from './llmBridge.controller';
  2: import { LlmBridgeService } from './llmBridge.service';
  3: 
  4: function createResponseMock() {
  5:   return {
  6:     setHeader: jest.fn(),
  7:     status: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(),
  8:     set: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(),
  9:     send: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(),
 10:   };
 11: }
 12: 
 13: describe('LlmBridgeController', () => {
 14:   const originalEnv = process.env;
 15: 
 16:   beforeEach(() => {
 17:     process.env = { ...originalEnv };
 18:   });
 19: 
 20:   afterEach(() => {
 21:     process.env = originalEnv;
 22:     jest.restoreAllMocks();
 23:   });
 24: 
 25:   it('maps openPrompt requests onto llm bridge payloads using OPENAI_ACTIVE_MODEL', async () => {
 26:     process.env.OPENAI_ACTIVE_MODEL = 'gpt-5';
 27: 
 28:     const forward = jest
 29:       .fn()
 30:       .mockResolvedValue(new Response('{}', { status: 200, headers: { 'content-type': 'application/json' } }));
 31:     const controller = new LlmBridgeController({ forward } as unknown as LlmBridgeService);
 32:     const req = {
 33:       body: {
 34:         promptId: 'prompt-123',
 35:         promptVersion: 4,
 36:         input: 'hello',
 37:         stream: false,
 38:       },
 39:       headers: { 'content-type': 'application/json', authorization: 'Bearer test' },
 40:       header: jest.fn().mockReturnValue('trace-open-prompt'),
 41:     };
 42:     const res = createResponseMock();
 43: 
 44:     await controller.openPrompt(req as any, res as any);
 45: 
 46:     expect(forward).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
 47:       {
 48:         model: 'gpt-5',
 49:         promptId: 'prompt-123',
 50:         promptVersion: 4,
 51:         input: 'hello',
 52:         stream: false,
 53:       },
 54:       'trace-open-prompt',
 55:     );
 56:     expect(res.status).toHaveBeenCalledWith(200);
 57:   });
 58: 
 59:   it('accepts prompytVersion as an alias for promptVersion', async () => {
 60:     process.env.OPENAI_ACTIVE_MODEL = 'gpt-5-mini';
 61: 
 62:     const forward = jest
 63:       .fn()
 64:       .mockResolvedValue(new Response('{}', { status: 200, headers: { 'content-type': 'application/json' } }));
 65:     const controller = new LlmBridgeController({ forward } as unknown as LlmBridgeService);
 66:     const req = {
 67:       body: {
 68:         promptId: 'prompt-xyz',
 69:         prompytVersion: 2,
 70:         input: 'hello alias',
 71:         stream: false,
 72:       },
 73:       headers: { 'content-type': 'application/json', authorization: 'Bearer test' },
 74:       header: jest.fn().mockReturnValue('trace-open-prompt-alias'),
 75:     };
 76:     const res = createResponseMock();
 77: 
 78:     await controller.openPrompt(req as any, res as any);
 79: 
 80:     expect(forward).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
 81:       {
 82:         model: 'gpt-5-mini',
 83:         promptId: 'prompt-xyz',
 84:         promptVersion: 2,
 85:         input: 'hello alias',
 86:         stream: false,
 87:       },
 88:       'trace-open-prompt-alias',
 89:     );
 90:   });
 91: 
 92:   it('returns a local error when OPENAI_ACTIVE_MODEL is missing', async () => {
 93:     delete process.env.OPENAI_ACTIVE_MODEL;
 94: 
 95:     const forward = jest.fn();
 96:     const controller = new LlmBridgeController({ forward } as unknown as LlmBridgeService);
 97:     const req = {
 98:       body: {
 99:         promptId: 'prompt-xyz',
100:         promptVersion: 2,
101:         input: 'hello alias',
102:         stream: false,
103:       },
104:       headers: { 'content-type': 'application/json', authorization: 'Bearer test' },
105:       header: jest.fn().mockReturnValue('trace-open-prompt-missing-model'),
106:     };
107:     const res = createResponseMock();
108: 
109:     await controller.openPrompt(req as any, res as any);
110: 
111:     expect(forward).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
112:     expect(res.status).toHaveBeenCalledWith(500);
113:     expect(res.send).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
114:       expect.stringContaining('OPENAI_ACTIVE_MODEL missing'),
115:     );
116:   });
117: });
``````

## File: src/auth/bearer-token.guard.ts
``````typescript
 1: import {
 2:   CanActivate,
 3:   ExecutionContext,
 4:   HttpException,
 5:   Injectable,
 6:   UnauthorizedException,
 7: } from '@nestjs/common';
 8: 
 9: @Injectable()
10: export class BearerTokenGuard implements CanActivate {
11:   canActivate(ctx: ExecutionContext): boolean {
12:     const expected = process.env.API_BEARER_TOKEN;
13:     if (!expected) {
14: 
15:       throw new HttpException('Server misconfigured: API_BEARER_TOKEN missing', 500);
16:     }
17: 
18:     const req = ctx.switchToHttp().getRequest();
19:     const auth: string | undefined =
20:       req.headers?.authorization ?? req.headers?.Authorization;
21: 
22:     if (!auth || !auth.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
23:       throw new UnauthorizedException('Missing bearer token');
24:     }
25: 
26:     const token = auth.slice('Bearer '.length).trim();
27:     if (token !== expected) {
28:       throw new UnauthorizedException('Invalid bearer token');
29:     }
30: 
31:     return true;
32:   }
33: }
``````

## File: src/common/trace-id.interceptor.ts
``````typescript
 1: import {
 2:   Injectable,
 3:   NestInterceptor,
 4:   ExecutionContext,
 5:   CallHandler,
 6: } from '@nestjs/common';
 7: import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
 8: import { map } from 'rxjs/operators';
 9: import type { TraceRequest } from './trace-id.middleware';
10: 
11: @Injectable()
12: export class TraceIdInterceptor implements NestInterceptor {
13:   intercept(ctx: ExecutionContext, next: CallHandler): Observable<any> {
14:     const req = ctx.switchToHttp().getRequest<TraceRequest>();
15:     const traceId = req.traceId;
16: 
17:     return next.handle().pipe(
18:       map((data) => {
19:         if (!traceId) return data;
20: 
21:         if (data && typeof data === 'object' && !Array.isArray(data)) {
22: 
23:           if (!('traceId' in data)) return { ...data, traceId };
24:           return data;
25:         }
26: 
27: 
28:         return { traceId, data };
29:       }),
30:     );
31:   }
32: }
``````

## File: src/common/trace-id.middleware.ts
``````typescript
 1: import { Injectable, NestMiddleware } from '@nestjs/common';
 2: import type { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';
 3: import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
 4: 
 5: export type TraceRequest = Request & { traceId?: string };
 6: 
 7: @Injectable()
 8: export class TraceIdMiddleware implements NestMiddleware {
 9:   use(req: TraceRequest, res: Response, next: NextFunction) {
10:     const incoming =
11:       (req.header('x-trace-id') ||
12:         req.header('trace-id') ||
13:         req.header('x-request-id'))?.trim() || '';
14: 
15:     const traceId = incoming && isUuid(incoming) ? incoming : randomUUID();
16: 
17:     req.traceId = traceId;
18:     res.setHeader('x-trace-id', traceId);
19: 
20:     next();
21:   }
22: }
23: 
24: function isUuid(s: string) {
25:   return /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89ab][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(
26:     s,
27:   );
28: }
``````

## File: src/generate-review/dto/generate-review.dto.spec.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { validateGenerateReviewDto } from './generate-review.dto';
  2: 
  3: function basePayload() {
  4:   return {
  5:     spoiler_mode: 'non-spoiler',
  6:     title: {
  7:       title_id: 'tt3118452',
  8:       title: 'The Circle',
  9:       year: 2017,
 10:       genres: ['Reality TV', 'Competition'],
 11:       plot: 'Contestants live in isolation.',
 12:       runtime_minutes: 97,
 13:     },
 14:     gate_state: {
 15:       can_speak: true,
 16:       reason: null,
 17:       updated_at: '2026-02-17T08:00:00.000Z',
 18:     },
 19:     taste_snapshot: {
 20:       version: 'v1',
 21:       signals: {
 22:         preferred_tones: ['psychological', 'social-strategy'],
 23:       },
 24:       summary: 'Tends to like social strategy.',
 25:     },
 26:     taste_anchors: [
 27:       {
 28:         anchor_id: 'a_social-strategy',
 29:         label: 'social strategy',
 30:         weight: 0.82,
 31:         evidence: ['liked social games'],
 32:       },
 33:     ],
 34:     user_ratings: [
 35:       {
 36:         title_id: 'tt2267998',
 37:         rating: 4.5,
 38:         rated_at: '2025-11-03T10:00:00.000Z',
 39:       },
 40:     ],
 41:     contradictions: {
 42:       unresolved_count: 1,
 43:       examples: [{ type: 'tone_mismatch' }],
 44:     },
 45:     drift: {
 46:       trend: 'shifting_toward_documentary',
 47:       confidence: 0.58,
 48:       signals: [{ signal: 'recent_likes_more_serious', weight: 0.6 }],
 49:     },
 50:     interactions: {
 51:       views: 14,
 52:       skips: 3,
 53:       saves: 6,
 54:       likes: 9,
 55:       listAdds: 2,
 56:       totalReviewInteractions: 5,
 57:     },
 58:     force_refresh: false,
 59:     provider: 'openai',
 60:   };
 61: }
 62: 
 63: describe('validateGenerateReviewDto', () => {
 64:   it('accepts snake_case bundle and computes totalReviewInteractions', () => {
 65:     const validation = validateGenerateReviewDto(basePayload());
 66:     expect(validation.errors).toEqual([]);
 67:     expect(validation.value?.interactions.totalReviewInteractions).toBe(34);
 68:   });
 69: 
 70:   it('rejects missing taste_snapshot.version', () => {
 71:     const payload = basePayload();
 72:     delete payload.taste_snapshot.version;
 73:     const validation = validateGenerateReviewDto(payload);
 74:     expect(validation.value).toBeNull();
 75:     expect(validation.errors).toContain('taste_snapshot.version is required');
 76:   });
 77: 
 78:   it('rejects taste_anchors above max size', () => {
 79:     const payload = basePayload();
 80:     payload.taste_anchors = Array.from({ length: 51 }, (_, i) => ({
 81:       anchor_id: `a_${i}`,
 82:       label: `anchor ${i}`,
 83:       weight: 0.5,
 84:       evidence: [],
 85:     }));
 86:     const validation = validateGenerateReviewDto(payload);
 87:     expect(validation.value).toBeNull();
 88:     expect(validation.errors).toContain('taste_anchors exceeds max size of 50');
 89:   });
 90: 
 91:   it('rejects contradictions count mismatch', () => {
 92:     const payload = basePayload();
 93:     payload.contradictions.unresolved_count = 3;
 94:     const validation = validateGenerateReviewDto(payload);
 95:     expect(validation.value).toBeNull();
 96:     expect(validation.errors).toContain(
 97:       'contradictions.unresolved_count must match contradictions.examples.length',
 98:     );
 99:   });
100: });
``````

## File: src/generate-review/dto/generate-review.dto.ts
``````typescript
  1: export const SPOILER_MODES = ['spoiler', 'non-spoiler'] as const;
  2: export const REVIEW_PROVIDERS = ['openai', 'deepseek'] as const;
  3: 
  4: export type SpoilerMode = (typeof SPOILER_MODES)[number];
  5: export type ReviewProvider = (typeof REVIEW_PROVIDERS)[number];
  6: 
  7: export type ValidatedReviewTitle = {
  8:   titleId: string;
  9:   title?: string;
 10:   year?: number;
 11:   genres?: string[];
 12:   plot?: string;
 13:   runtimeMinutes?: number;
 14: };
 15: 
 16: export type ValidatedGateState = {
 17:   canSpeak: boolean;
 18:   reason: string | null;
 19:   updatedAt?: string;
 20: };
 21: 
 22: export type ValidatedTasteAnchor = {
 23:   anchorId: string;
 24:   label: string;
 25:   weight: number;
 26:   evidence: string[];
 27: };
 28: 
 29: export type ValidatedUserRating = {
 30:   titleId: string;
 31:   rating: number;
 32:   ratedAt?: string;
 33: };
 34: 
 35: export type ValidatedContradictions = {
 36:   unresolvedCount: number;
 37:   examples: Array<Record<string, unknown>>;
 38: };
 39: 
 40: export type ValidatedDrift = {
 41:   trend?: string;
 42:   confidence?: number;
 43:   signals: Array<Record<string, unknown>>;
 44: };
 45: 
 46: export type ValidatedInteractions = {
 47:   views: number;
 48:   skips: number;
 49:   saves: number;
 50:   likes: number;
 51:   listAdds: number;
 52:   totalReviewInteractions: number;
 53: };
 54: 
 55: export type ValidatedTasteSnapshot = {
 56:   version: string;
 57:   signals: Record<string, unknown>;
 58:   summary?: string;
 59: };
 60: 
 61: export class GenerateReviewDto {
 62:   titleId?: unknown;
 63:   title_id?: unknown;
 64:   spoilerMode?: unknown;
 65:   spoiler_mode?: unknown;
 66:   forceRefresh?: unknown;
 67:   force_refresh?: unknown;
 68:   provider?: unknown;
 69:   title?: unknown;
 70:   gateState?: unknown;
 71:   gate_state?: unknown;
 72:   tasteSnapshot?: unknown;
 73:   taste_snapshot?: unknown;
 74:   tasteAnchors?: unknown;
 75:   taste_anchors?: unknown;
 76:   userRatings?: unknown;
 77:   user_ratings?: unknown;
 78:   contradictions?: unknown;
 79:   drift?: unknown;
 80:   interactions?: unknown;
 81:   wantToWatchRationale?: unknown;
 82:   want_to_watch_rationale?: unknown;
 83: }
 84: 
 85: export type ValidatedGenerateReviewInput = {
 86:   title: ValidatedReviewTitle;
 87:   spoilerMode: SpoilerMode;
 88:   gateState?: ValidatedGateState;
 89:   tasteSnapshot: ValidatedTasteSnapshot;
 90:   tasteAnchors: ValidatedTasteAnchor[];
 91:   userRatings: ValidatedUserRating[];
 92:   contradictions: ValidatedContradictions;
 93:   drift: ValidatedDrift;
 94:   interactions: ValidatedInteractions;
 95:   wantToWatchRationale?: string;
 96:   forceRefresh: boolean;
 97:   provider?: ReviewProvider;
 98: };
 99: 
100: export function validateGenerateReviewDto(
101:   dto: GenerateReviewDto | null | undefined,
102: ): { value: ValidatedGenerateReviewInput | null; errors: string[] } {
103:   const errors: string[] = [];
104:   const body = asObject(dto) ?? {};
105: 
106:   const spoilerModeRaw = pick(body, ['spoilerMode', 'spoiler_mode']);
107:   const spoilerMode =
108:     typeof spoilerModeRaw === 'string' ? spoilerModeRaw.trim().toLowerCase() : '';
109:   if (!SPOILER_MODES.includes(spoilerMode as SpoilerMode)) {
110:     errors.push('spoiler_mode must be "spoiler" or "non-spoiler"');
111:   }
112: 
113:   const forceRefreshRaw = pick(body, ['forceRefresh', 'force_refresh']);
114:   let forceRefresh = false;
115:   if (forceRefreshRaw !== undefined) {
116:     if (typeof forceRefreshRaw !== 'boolean') {
117:       errors.push('force_refresh must be a boolean when provided');
118:     } else {
119:       forceRefresh = forceRefreshRaw;
120:     }
121:   }
122: 
123:   const providerRaw = pick(body, ['provider']);
124:   let provider: ReviewProvider | undefined;
125:   if (providerRaw !== undefined) {
126:     if (typeof providerRaw !== 'string') {
127:       errors.push('provider must be "openai" or "deepseek" when provided');
128:     } else {
129:       const normalized = providerRaw.trim().toLowerCase();
130:       if (!REVIEW_PROVIDERS.includes(normalized as ReviewProvider)) {
131:         errors.push('provider must be "openai" or "deepseek" when provided');
132:       } else {
133:         provider = normalized as ReviewProvider;
134:       }
135:     }
136:   }
137: 
138:   const title = validateTitle(body, errors);
139:   const gateState = validateGateState(body, errors);
140:   const tasteSnapshot = validateTasteSnapshot(body, errors);
141:   const tasteAnchors = validateTasteAnchors(body, errors);
142:   const userRatings = validateUserRatings(body, errors);
143:   const contradictions = validateContradictions(body, errors);
144:   const drift = validateDrift(body, errors);
145:   const interactions = validateInteractions(body, errors);
146: 
147:   const rationaleRaw = pick(body, ['wantToWatchRationale', 'want_to_watch_rationale']);
148:   const wantToWatchRationale = typeof rationaleRaw === 'string' ? rationaleRaw.trim() : '';
149: 
150:   if (errors.length) return { value: null, errors };
151: 
152:   return {
153:     value: {
154:       title: title as ValidatedReviewTitle,
155:       spoilerMode: spoilerMode as SpoilerMode,
156:       ...(gateState ? { gateState } : {}),
157:       tasteSnapshot: tasteSnapshot as ValidatedTasteSnapshot,
158:       tasteAnchors: tasteAnchors as ValidatedTasteAnchor[],
159:       userRatings: userRatings as ValidatedUserRating[],
160:       contradictions: contradictions as ValidatedContradictions,
161:       drift: drift as ValidatedDrift,
162:       interactions: interactions as ValidatedInteractions,
163:       ...(wantToWatchRationale ? { wantToWatchRationale } : {}),
164:       forceRefresh,
165:       ...(provider ? { provider } : {}),
166:     },
167:     errors: [],
168:   };
169: }
170: 
171: function validateTitle(
172:   body: Record<string, unknown>,
173:   errors: string[],
174: ): ValidatedReviewTitle | null {
175:   const titleObj = asObject(pick(body, ['title']));
176:   const topLevelTitleIdRaw = pick(body, ['titleId', 'title_id']);
177: 
178:   const titleIdFromTitle = titleObj
179:     ? pick(titleObj, ['titleId', 'title_id'])
180:     : undefined;
181:   const titleIdRaw = titleIdFromTitle ?? topLevelTitleIdRaw;
182:   const titleId = typeof titleIdRaw === 'string' ? titleIdRaw.trim() : '';
183: 
184:   if (titleObj && !titleIdFromTitle) {
185:     errors.push('title.title_id is required when title object is provided');
186:   }
187:   if (!titleId) {
188:     errors.push('title_id is required (top-level or inside title)');
189:   }
190: 
191:   if (!titleObj) {
192:     return titleId ? { titleId } : null;
193:   }
194: 
195:   const yearRaw = pick(titleObj, ['year']);
196:   const runtimeRaw = pick(titleObj, ['runtimeMinutes', 'runtime_minutes']);
197:   const genresRaw = pick(titleObj, ['genres']);
198: 
199:   const year = asInteger(yearRaw);
200:   if (yearRaw !== undefined && year === null) {
201:     errors.push('title.year must be an integer when provided');
202:   }
203: 
204:   const runtimeMinutes = asInteger(runtimeRaw);
205:   if (runtimeRaw !== undefined && runtimeMinutes === null) {
206:     errors.push('title.runtime_minutes must be an integer when provided');
207:   }
208: 
209:   const genres = asStringArray(genresRaw);
210:   if (genresRaw !== undefined && !Array.isArray(genresRaw)) {
211:     errors.push('title.genres must be an array of strings when provided');
212:   }
213: 
214:   const result: ValidatedReviewTitle = { titleId };
215:   const titleText = asTrimmedString(pick(titleObj, ['title']));
216:   const plot = asTrimmedString(pick(titleObj, ['plot']));
217:   if (titleText) result.title = titleText;
218:   if (plot) result.plot = plot;
219:   if (year !== null) result.year = year;
220:   if (runtimeMinutes !== null) result.runtimeMinutes = runtimeMinutes;
221:   if (genres.length) result.genres = genres;
222:   return result;
223: }
224: 
225: function validateGateState(
226:   body: Record<string, unknown>,
227:   errors: string[],
228: ): ValidatedGateState | undefined {
229:   const gateObj = asObject(pick(body, ['gateState', 'gate_state']));
230:   if (!gateObj) return undefined;
231: 
232:   const canSpeakRaw = pick(gateObj, ['canSpeak', 'can_speak']);
233:   if (typeof canSpeakRaw !== 'boolean') {
234:     errors.push('gate_state.can_speak must be a boolean when gate_state is provided');
235:     return undefined;
236:   }
237: 
238:   const reasonRaw = pick(gateObj, ['reason']);
239:   const updatedAtRaw = pick(gateObj, ['updatedAt', 'updated_at']);
240: 
241:   const reason =
242:     reasonRaw === null
243:       ? null
244:       : typeof reasonRaw === 'string'
245:         ? reasonRaw.trim() || null
246:         : null;
247: 
248:   const updatedAt = typeof updatedAtRaw === 'string' ? updatedAtRaw.trim() : '';
249: 
250:   return {
251:     canSpeak: canSpeakRaw,
252:     reason,
253:     ...(updatedAt ? { updatedAt } : {}),
254:   };
255: }
256: 
257: function validateTasteSnapshot(
258:   body: Record<string, unknown>,
259:   errors: string[],
260: ): ValidatedTasteSnapshot | null {
261:   const snapshotObj = asObject(pick(body, ['tasteSnapshot', 'taste_snapshot']));
262:   if (!snapshotObj) {
263:     errors.push('taste_snapshot is required');
264:     return null;
265:   }
266: 
267:   const version = asTrimmedString(pick(snapshotObj, ['version']));
268:   if (!version) {
269:     errors.push('taste_snapshot.version is required');
270:   }
271: 
272:   const signals = asObject(pick(snapshotObj, ['signals'])) ?? {};
273:   const summary = asTrimmedString(pick(snapshotObj, ['summary']));
274: 
275:   if (!version) return null;
276:   return {
277:     version,
278:     signals,
279:     ...(summary ? { summary } : {}),
280:   };
281: }
282: 
283: function validateTasteAnchors(
284:   body: Record<string, unknown>,
285:   errors: string[],
286: ): ValidatedTasteAnchor[] | null {
287:   const anchorsRaw = pick(body, ['tasteAnchors', 'taste_anchors']);
288:   if (!Array.isArray(anchorsRaw)) {
289:     errors.push('taste_anchors is required and must be an array');
290:     return null;
291:   }
292: 
293:   if (anchorsRaw.length > 50) {
294:     errors.push('taste_anchors exceeds max size of 50');
295:   }
296: 
297:   const anchors: ValidatedTasteAnchor[] = [];
298:   anchorsRaw.forEach((item, idx) => {
299:     const row = asObject(item);
300:     if (!row) {
301:       errors.push(`taste_anchors[${idx}] must be an object`);
302:       return;
303:     }
304: 
305:     const anchorId = asTrimmedString(pick(row, ['anchorId', 'anchor_id']));
306:     const label = asTrimmedString(pick(row, ['label']));
307:     const weight = asFiniteNumber(pick(row, ['weight']));
308:     const evidence = asStringArray(pick(row, ['evidence']));
309: 
310:     if (!anchorId) errors.push(`taste_anchors[${idx}].anchor_id is required`);
311:     if (!label) errors.push(`taste_anchors[${idx}].label is required`);
312:     if (weight === null) errors.push(`taste_anchors[${idx}].weight must be a number`);
313: 
314:     if (anchorId && label && weight !== null) {
315:       anchors.push({ anchorId, label, weight, evidence });
316:     }
317:   });
318: 
319:   return anchors;
320: }
321: 
322: function validateUserRatings(
323:   body: Record<string, unknown>,
324:   errors: string[],
325: ): ValidatedUserRating[] | null {
326:   const ratingsRaw = pick(body, ['userRatings', 'user_ratings']);
327:   if (!Array.isArray(ratingsRaw)) {
328:     errors.push('user_ratings is required and must be an array');
329:     return null;
330:   }
331: 
332:   if (ratingsRaw.length > 500) {
333:     errors.push('user_ratings exceeds max size of 500');
334:   }
335: 
336:   const ratings: ValidatedUserRating[] = [];
337:   ratingsRaw.forEach((item, idx) => {
338:     const row = asObject(item);
339:     if (!row) {
340:       errors.push(`user_ratings[${idx}] must be an object`);
341:       return;
342:     }
343: 
344:     const titleId = asTrimmedString(pick(row, ['titleId', 'title_id']));
345:     const rating = asFiniteNumber(pick(row, ['rating']));
346:     const ratedAt = asTrimmedString(pick(row, ['ratedAt', 'rated_at']));
347: 
348:     if (!titleId) errors.push(`user_ratings[${idx}].title_id is required`);
349:     if (rating === null) errors.push(`user_ratings[${idx}].rating must be a number`);
350: 
351:     if (titleId && rating !== null) {
352:       ratings.push({
353:         titleId,
354:         rating,
355:         ...(ratedAt ? { ratedAt } : {}),
356:       });
357:     }
358:   });
359: 
360:   return ratings;
361: }
362: 
363: function validateContradictions(
364:   body: Record<string, unknown>,
365:   errors: string[],
366: ): ValidatedContradictions | null {
367:   const contradictionsObj = asObject(pick(body, ['contradictions']));
368:   if (!contradictionsObj) {
369:     errors.push('contradictions is required');
370:     return null;
371:   }
372: 
373:   const unresolvedCountRaw = pick(contradictionsObj, ['unresolvedCount', 'unresolved_count']);
374:   const unresolvedCount = asInteger(unresolvedCountRaw);
375:   if (unresolvedCount === null || unresolvedCount < 0) {
376:     errors.push('contradictions.unresolved_count must be a non-negative integer');
377:   }
378: 
379:   const examplesRaw = pick(contradictionsObj, ['examples']);
380:   if (!Array.isArray(examplesRaw)) {
381:     errors.push('contradictions.examples must be an array');
382:     return null;
383:   }
384: 
385:   const examples = examplesRaw.filter(
386:     (item): item is Record<string, unknown> =>
387:       Boolean(item && typeof item === 'object' && !Array.isArray(item)),
388:   );
389:   if (examples.length !== examplesRaw.length) {
390:     errors.push('contradictions.examples entries must be objects');
391:   }
392: 
393:   if (unresolvedCount !== null && unresolvedCount !== examples.length) {
394:     errors.push('contradictions.unresolved_count must match contradictions.examples.length');
395:   }
396: 
397:   if (unresolvedCount === null) return null;
398:   return { unresolvedCount, examples };
399: }
400: 
401: function validateDrift(body: Record<string, unknown>, errors: string[]): ValidatedDrift | null {
402:   const driftObj = asObject(pick(body, ['drift']));
403:   if (!driftObj) {
404:     errors.push('drift is required');
405:     return null;
406:   }
407: 
408:   const trend = asTrimmedString(pick(driftObj, ['trend']));
409:   const confidence = asFiniteNumber(pick(driftObj, ['confidence']));
410:   const signalsRaw = pick(driftObj, ['signals']);
411: 
412:   if (!Array.isArray(signalsRaw)) {
413:     errors.push('drift.signals must be an array');
414:     return null;
415:   }
416: 
417:   const signals = signalsRaw.filter(
418:     (item): item is Record<string, unknown> =>
419:       Boolean(item && typeof item === 'object' && !Array.isArray(item)),
420:   );
421:   if (signals.length !== signalsRaw.length) {
422:     errors.push('drift.signals entries must be objects');
423:   }
424: 
425:   return {
426:     ...(trend ? { trend } : {}),
427:     ...(confidence !== null ? { confidence } : {}),
428:     signals,
429:   };
430: }
431: 
432: function validateInteractions(
433:   body: Record<string, unknown>,
434:   errors: string[],
435: ): ValidatedInteractions | null {
436:   const interactionsObj = asObject(pick(body, ['interactions']));
437:   if (!interactionsObj) {
438:     errors.push('interactions is required');
439:     return null;
440:   }
441: 
442:   const views = nonNegativeInt(pick(interactionsObj, ['views']));
443:   const skips = nonNegativeInt(pick(interactionsObj, ['skips']));
444:   const saves = nonNegativeInt(pick(interactionsObj, ['saves']));
445:   const likes = nonNegativeInt(pick(interactionsObj, ['likes']));
446:   const listAdds = nonNegativeInt(pick(interactionsObj, ['listAdds', 'list_adds']));
447:   const totalReviewInteractionsRaw = pick(interactionsObj, [
448:     'totalReviewInteractions',
449:     'total_review_interactions',
450:   ]);
451:   const totalReviewInteractions = nonNegativeInt(totalReviewInteractionsRaw);
452: 
453:   if (views === null) errors.push('interactions.views must be a non-negative integer');
454:   if (skips === null) errors.push('interactions.skips must be a non-negative integer');
455:   if (saves === null) errors.push('interactions.saves must be a non-negative integer');
456:   if (likes === null) errors.push('interactions.likes must be a non-negative integer');
457:   if (listAdds === null) errors.push('interactions.listAdds must be a non-negative integer');
458:   if (totalReviewInteractionsRaw !== undefined && totalReviewInteractions === null) {
459:     errors.push('interactions.totalReviewInteractions must be a non-negative integer when provided');
460:   }
461: 
462:   if (views === null || skips === null || saves === null || likes === null || listAdds === null) {
463:     return null;
464:   }
465: 
466:   const computedTotal = views + skips + saves + likes + listAdds;
467: 
468:   return {
469:     views,
470:     skips,
471:     saves,
472:     likes,
473:     listAdds,
474:     totalReviewInteractions: computedTotal,
475:   };
476: }
477: 
478: function pick(obj: Record<string, unknown>, keys: string[]): unknown {
479:   for (const key of keys) {
480:     if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(obj, key)) return obj[key];
481:   }
482:   return undefined;
483: }
484: 
485: function asObject(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> | null {
486:   if (!value || typeof value !== 'object' || Array.isArray(value)) return null;
487:   return value as Record<string, unknown>;
488: }
489: 
490: function asTrimmedString(value: unknown): string {
491:   if (typeof value !== 'string') return '';
492:   return value.trim();
493: }
494: 
495: function asStringArray(value: unknown): string[] {
496:   if (!Array.isArray(value)) return [];
497:   return value
498:     .map((item) => (typeof item === 'string' ? item.trim() : ''))
499:     .filter((item) => Boolean(item));
500: }
501: 
502: function asInteger(value: unknown): number | null {
503:   if (typeof value !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(value)) return null;
504:   return Number.isInteger(value) ? value : null;
505: }
506: 
507: function nonNegativeInt(value: unknown): number | null {
508:   const n = asInteger(value);
509:   if (n === null || n < 0) return null;
510:   return n;
511: }
512: 
513: function asFiniteNumber(value: unknown): number | null {
514:   if (typeof value !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(value)) return null;
515:   return value;
516: }
``````

## File: src/generate-review/generate-review.controller.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { Body, Controller, Post, Req, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';
  2: import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
  3: import type { Request } from 'express';
  4: 
  5: import { BearerTokenGuard } from '../auth/bearer-token.guard';
  6: import type { TraceRequest } from '../common/trace-id.middleware';
  7: import {
  8:   GenerateReviewDto,
  9:   validateGenerateReviewDto,
 10: } from './dto/generate-review.dto';
 11: import {
 12:   GenerateReviewService,
 13:   type ReviewResult,
 14: } from './generate-review.service';
 15: 
 16: type GenerateReviewEnvelope = {
 17:   statusCode: number;
 18:   errors: string[];
 19:   latency: number;
 20:   data: ReviewResult | null;
 21:   traceId: string;
 22: };
 23: 
 24: @Controller('api/justus')
 25: @UseGuards(BearerTokenGuard)
 26: export class GenerateReviewController {
 27:   constructor(private readonly generateReviewService: GenerateReviewService) {}
 28: 
 29:   @Post('generateReview')
 30:   async generateReview(
 31:     @Req() req: TraceRequest,
 32:     @Body() body: GenerateReviewDto,
 33:   ): Promise<GenerateReviewEnvelope> {
 34:     const started = Date.now();
 35:     const traceId = this.resolveTraceId(req);
 36:     const validation = validateGenerateReviewDto(body);
 37: 
 38:     if (!validation.value) {
 39:       return {
 40:         statusCode: 400,
 41:         errors: validation.errors,
 42:         latency: Date.now() - started,
 43:         data: null,
 44:         traceId,
 45:       };
 46:     }
 47: 
 48:     const serviceResult = await this.generateReviewService.generateReview(validation.value, {
 49:       traceId,
 50:       authorization: this.getAuthorization(req),
 51:       baseUrl: this.resolveBaseUrl(req),
 52:       userKey: this.resolveUserKey(req),
 53:     });
 54: 
 55:     return {
 56:       statusCode: serviceResult.statusCode,
 57:       errors: serviceResult.errors,
 58:       latency: Date.now() - started,
 59:       data: serviceResult.data,
 60:       traceId,
 61:     };
 62:   }
 63: 
 64:   private resolveTraceId(req: TraceRequest): string {
 65:     return (
 66:       req.traceId ||
 67:       (req.header('x-trace-id') || req.header('X-Trace-Id') || '').trim() ||
 68:       randomUUID()
 69:     );
 70:   }
 71: 
 72:   private resolveBaseUrl(req: Request): string {
 73:     const configured = process.env.SERVER_BASE_URL;
 74:     if (configured && configured.trim()) return configured.replace(/\/+$/, '');
 75: 
 76:     const protocol =
 77:       (req.header('x-forwarded-proto') || '').split(',')[0]?.trim() || req.protocol || 'http';
 78:     const host =
 79:       (req.header('x-forwarded-host') || '').split(',')[0]?.trim() ||
 80:       req.get('host') ||
 81:       req.headers.host ||
 82:       'localhost:3000';
 83: 
 84:     return `${protocol}://${host}`.replace(/\/+$/, '');
 85:   }
 86: 
 87:   private getAuthorization(req: Request): string | undefined {
 88:     const raw =
 89:       (req.headers.authorization as string | undefined) ||
 90:       (req.headers.Authorization as string | undefined);
 91:     return raw && raw.trim() ? raw.trim() : undefined;
 92:   }
 93: 
 94:   private resolveUserKey(req: Request): string {
 95:     const header =
 96:       (req.header('x-user-id') || req.header('X-User-Id') || req.header('x-user-key') || '')
 97:         .trim();
 98:     return header || 'global';
 99:   }
100: }
``````

``````typescript
  1: import { mkdir, readFile, rm, writeFile } from 'node:fs/promises';
  2: import { dirname, join } from 'node:path';
  3: 
  4: import { GenerateReviewService } from './generate-review.service';
  5: import type { ValidatedGenerateReviewInput } from './dto/generate-review.dto';
  6: 
  7: function jsonResponse(status: number, body: unknown): Response {
  8:   return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
  9:     status,
 10:     headers: { 'content-type': 'application/json' },
 11:   });
 12: }
 13: 
 14: describe('GenerateReviewService', () => {
 15:   let service: GenerateReviewService;
 16:   let storePath: string;
 17:   let fetchMock: jest.Mock;
 18:   const longReviewText = Array.from({ length: 520 }, (_, i) => `detail${i + 1}`).join(' ');
 19: 
 20:   const validInput: ValidatedGenerateReviewInput = {
 21:     title: {
 22:       titleId: 'tt0133093',
 23:     },
 24:     spoilerMode: 'non-spoiler',
 25:     gateState: {
 26:       canSpeak: true,
 27:       reason: null,
 28:       updatedAt: '2026-02-17T08:00:00.000Z',
 29:     },
 30:     tasteSnapshot: {
 31:       version: 'v1',
 32:       signals: { preferred_tones: ['psychological'] },
 33:       summary: 'Sample summary',
 34:     },
 35:     tasteAnchors: [
 36:       {
 37:         anchorId: 'a_social-strategy',
 38:         label: 'social strategy',
 39:         weight: 0.82,
 40:         evidence: ['liked social games'],
 41:       },
 42:     ],
 43:     userRatings: [{ titleId: 'tt0133093', rating: 3.5, ratedAt: '2026-02-01T10:00:00.000Z' }],
 44:     contradictions: {
 45:       unresolvedCount: 1,
 46:       examples: [{ type: 'tone_mismatch' }],
 47:     },
 48:     drift: {
 49:       trend: 'shifting_toward_documentary',
 50:       confidence: 0.58,
 51:       signals: [{ signal: 'recent_likes_more_serious', weight: 0.6 }],
 52:     },
 53:     interactions: {
 54:       views: 14,
 55:       skips: 3,
 56:       saves: 6,
 57:       likes: 9,
 58:       listAdds: 2,
 59:       totalReviewInteractions: 34,
 60:     },
 61:     wantToWatchRationale: 'Interested in persuasion games.',
 62:     forceRefresh: false,
 63:     provider: 'openai',
 64:   };
 65: 
 66:   const context = {
 67:     traceId: 'trace-abc-123',
 68:     authorization: 'Bearer test-token',
 69:     baseUrl: 'http://localhost:3000',
 70:     userKey: 'global',

 73:   beforeEach(async () => {
 74:     service = new GenerateReviewService();

 88:   it('returns SILENCE when gate is false and persists result', async () => {

244:     expect(secondCall[1].headers['x-trace-id']).toBe('trace-abc-123');
245:     expect(secondCall[1].headers.Authorization).toBe('Bearer test-token');
246:   });

267:         statusCode: 200,

269:       }),

273:         provider: 'openai',

286:     await service.generateReview(

288:       context,

292:     const nonSpoilerBody = JSON.parse(fetchMock.mock.calls[3][1].body);
293: 
294:     expect(spoilerBody.input).toContain('REVIEW_MODE: spoiler');
295:     expect(spoilerBody.system).toContain('MODE POLICY: spoiler');
296:     expect(nonSpoilerBody.input).toContain('REVIEW_MODE: non-spoiler');
297:     expect(nonSpoilerBody.system).toContain('MODE POLICY: non-spoiler');
298:   });
299: });
``````
