## File: src/generate-review/generate-review.service.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
  2: import { mkdir, readFile, rename, writeFile } from 'node:fs/promises';
  3: import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
  4: import { dirname, join } from 'node:path';
  5: 
  6: import type {
  7:   ReviewProvider,
  8:   SpoilerMode,
  9:   ValidatedGateState,
 10:   ValidatedGenerateReviewInput,
 11:   ValidatedReviewTitle,
 12: } from './dto/generate-review.dto';
 13: 
 14: const REVIEW_DECISIONS = [
 15:   'SPEAK',
 16:   'SILENCE',
 17:   'EXPLAIN_CONFLICT',
 18:   'ASK_LIGHT_QUESTION',
 19: ] as const;
 20: const PROMPT_VERSION = 'v2-spoiler-mode-long-form';
 21: 
 22: type ReviewDecisionType = (typeof REVIEW_DECISIONS)[number];
 23: 
 24: type ReviewGate = {
 25:   canSpeak: boolean;
 26:   reason: string | null;
 27:   updatedAt?: string;
 28: };
 29: 
 30: type TitleEvidence = {
 31:   titleId: string;
 32:   title: string;
 33:   year: number | null;
 34:   genres: string[];
 35:   plot: string;
 36:   runtimeMinutes: number | null;
 37: };
 38: 
 39: type TasteEvidence = {
 40:   title: TitleEvidence;
 41:   spoilerMode: SpoilerMode;
 42:   gate: ReviewGate;
 43:   tasteSnapshot: Record<string, unknown>;
 44:   tasteAnchors: Array<{
 45:     anchorId: string;
 46:     label: string;
 47:     weight: number;
 48:     evidence: string[];
 49:   }>;
 50:   userRatings: Array<{
 51:     titleId: string;
 52:     rating: number;
 53:     ratedAt?: string;
 54:   }>;
 55:   contradictions: {
 56:     unresolvedCount: number;
 57:     examples: Array<Record<string, unknown>>;
 58:   };
 59:   drift: {
 60:     trend?: string;
 61:     confidence?: number;
 62:     signals: Array<Record<string, unknown>>;
 63:   };
 64:   interactions: {
 65:     views: number;
 66:     skips: number;
 67:     saves: number;
 68:     likes: number;
 69:     listAdds: number;
 70:     totalReviewInteractions: number;
 71:   };
 72:   wantToWatchRationale: string | null;
 73: };
 74: 
 75: type GeneratedReviewRecord = {
 76:   id: string;
 77:   userKey: string;
 78:   titleId: string;
 79:   spoilerMode: SpoilerMode;
 80:   promptVersion: string;
 81:   provider: ReviewProvider | null;
 82:   traceId: string;
 83:   createdAt: string;
 84:   result: ReviewResult;
 85: };
 86: 
 87: type ReviewStore = {
 88:   reviewGates: Record<string, ReviewGate>;
 89:   generatedReviews: GeneratedReviewRecord[];
 90: };
 91: 
 92: type LlmRouterResponse = {
 93:   provider: ReviewProvider | null;
 94:   outputText: string;
 95: };
 96: 
 97: export type ReviewResult = {
 98:   decisionType: ReviewDecisionType;
 99:   confidence: number;
100:   reviewText?: string;
101:   silenceReason?: string;
102:   conflictExplanation?: string;
103:   lightQuestion?: string;
104:   anchorsUsed?: string[];
105:   mismatches?: unknown[];
106:   structuralMatch?: boolean;
107: };
108: 
109: export type GenerateReviewContext = {
110:   traceId: string;
111:   authorization?: string;
112:   baseUrl: string;
113:   userKey: string;
114: };
115: 
116: export type GenerateReviewServiceResult = {
117:   statusCode: number;
118:   errors: string[];
119:   data: ReviewResult | null;
120: };
121: 
122: class ServiceError extends Error {
123:   constructor(
124:     readonly statusCode: number,
125:     readonly publicMessage: string,
126:   ) {
127:     super(publicMessage);
128:   }
129: }
130: 
131: @Injectable()
132: export class GenerateReviewService {
133:   async generateReview(
134:     input: ValidatedGenerateReviewInput,
135:     context: GenerateReviewContext,
136:   ): Promise<GenerateReviewServiceResult> {
137:     try {
138:       const store = await this.loadStore();
139:       const gate = this.resolveGate(store, context.userKey, input.gateState);
140:       const title = await this.resolveTitleEvidence(input.title, context);
141:       const evidence = this.buildTasteEvidence(input, title, gate);
142: 
143:       if (gate.canSpeak === false) {
144:         const silence: ReviewResult = {
145:           decisionType: 'SILENCE',
146:           confidence: 0,
147:           silenceReason: gate.reason || 'Review gate disabled',
148:         };
149: 
150:         await this.persistGeneratedReview(store, {
151:           userKey: context.userKey,
152:           titleId: title.titleId,
153:           spoilerMode: input.spoilerMode,
154:           promptVersion: PROMPT_VERSION,
155:           provider: input.provider ?? null,
156:           traceId: context.traceId,
157:           result: silence,
158:         });
159: 
160:         return { statusCode: 200, errors: [], data: silence };
161:       }
162: 
163:       if (!input.forceRefresh) {
164:         const cached = this.findCachedReview(store, context.userKey, title.titleId, input.spoilerMode);
165:         if (cached) return { statusCode: 200, errors: [], data: cached };
166:       }
167: 
168:       const prompts = this.buildPrompts(evidence);
169:       const llmResponse = await this.callLlmRouter(
170:         {
171:           provider: input.provider,
172:           input: prompts.input,
173:           system: prompts.system,
174:           metadata: {
175:             feature: 'generateReview',
176:             titleId: title.titleId,
177:             spoilerMode: input.spoilerMode,
178:             promptVersion: PROMPT_VERSION,
179:             tasteSnapshotVersion: input.tasteSnapshot.version,
180:             userKey: context.userKey,
181:           },
182:         },
183:         context,
184:       );
185: 
186:       const parsed = this.parseModelResult(llmResponse.outputText);
187: 
188:       await this.persistGeneratedReview(store, {
189:         userKey: context.userKey,
190:         titleId: title.titleId,
191:         spoilerMode: input.spoilerMode,
192:         promptVersion: PROMPT_VERSION,
193:         provider: llmResponse.provider ?? input.provider ?? null,
194:         traceId: context.traceId,
195:         result: parsed,
196:       });
197: 
198:       return { statusCode: 200, errors: [], data: parsed };
199:     } catch (error: unknown) {
200:       if (error instanceof ServiceError) {
201:         return {
202:           statusCode: error.statusCode,
203:           errors: [error.publicMessage],
204:           data: null,
205:         };
206:       }
207: 
208:       return {
209:         statusCode: 500,
210:         errors: ['Unexpected error while generating review'],
211:         data: null,
212:       };
213:     }
214:   }
215: 
216:   private buildPrompts(evidence: TasteEvidence): { system: string; input: string } {
217:     const spoilerPolicy =
218:       evidence.spoilerMode === 'spoiler'
219:         ? [
220:             'MODE POLICY: spoiler',
221:             'Treat spoiler_mode as fundamental context.',
222:             'You must include explicit spoilers: key plot turns, character reveals, conflicts, and ending outcomes.',
223:             'Write with enough narrative detail that the user feels like they have already seen the movie/show.',
224:           ].join('\n')
225:         : [
226:             'MODE POLICY: non-spoiler',
227:             'Treat spoiler_mode as fundamental context.',
228:             'Do not reveal twists, reveals, endings, eliminations, killer identity, or final outcomes.',
229:             'Keep plot references high-level and safe for first-time viewers.',
230:           ].join('\n');
231: 
232:     const system = [
233:       'You are the Justus Taste Engine.',
234:       'Return JSON only. Do not wrap output in markdown.',
235:       'Required keys: decision_type, confidence.',
236:       'decision_type must be one of: SPEAK, SILENCE, EXPLAIN_CONFLICT, ASK_LIGHT_QUESTION.',
237:       'Required content by decision_type:',
238:       '- SPEAK => review_text',
239:       '- SILENCE => silence_reason',
240:       '- EXPLAIN_CONFLICT => conflict_explanation',
241:       '- ASK_LIGHT_QUESTION => light_question',
242:       'If decision_type is SPEAK, review_text must be detailed and at least 500 words.',
243:       'Optional keys: anchors_used (string[]), mismatches (array), structural_match (boolean).',
244:       spoilerPolicy,
245:     ].join('\n');
246: 
247:     const input = [
248:       `PROMPT_VERSION: ${PROMPT_VERSION}`,
249:       `REVIEW_MODE: ${evidence.spoilerMode}`,
250:       evidence.spoilerMode === 'spoiler'
251:         ? 'Write a spoiler review that openly discusses plot, story progression, character arcs, and ending-level outcomes.'
252:         : 'Write a non-spoiler review that avoids ending-level details and major reveals.',
253:       'Generate one review decision from this validated user taste bundle.',
254:       JSON.stringify(evidence),
255:     ].join('\n');
256: 
257:     return { system, input };
258:   }
259: 
260:   private buildTasteEvidence(
261:     input: ValidatedGenerateReviewInput,
262:     title: TitleEvidence,
263:     gate: ReviewGate,
264:   ): TasteEvidence {
265:     return {
266:       title,
267:       spoilerMode: input.spoilerMode,
268:       gate,
269:       tasteSnapshot: {
270:         version: input.tasteSnapshot.version,
271:         signals: input.tasteSnapshot.signals,
272:         ...(input.tasteSnapshot.summary ? { summary: input.tasteSnapshot.summary } : {}),
273:       },
274:       tasteAnchors: input.tasteAnchors,
275:       userRatings: input.userRatings,
276:       contradictions: input.contradictions,
277:       drift: input.drift,
278:       interactions: input.interactions,
279:       wantToWatchRationale: input.wantToWatchRationale ?? null,
280:     };
281:   }
282: 
283:   private resolveGate(
284:     store: ReviewStore,
285:     userKey: string,
286:     inputGate: ValidatedGateState | undefined,
287:   ): ReviewGate {
288:     const serverGate = store.reviewGates[userKey] ?? store.reviewGates.global;
289:     if (serverGate) {
290:       return {
291:         canSpeak: Boolean(serverGate.canSpeak),
292:         reason: this.asOptionalString(serverGate.reason) ?? null,
293:         ...(serverGate.updatedAt ? { updatedAt: serverGate.updatedAt } : {}),
294:       };
295:     }
296: 
297:     if (!inputGate) {
298:       throw new ServiceError(
299:         400,
300:         'gate_state.can_speak must be provided when no server gate is configured',
301:       );
302:     }
303: 
304:     return {
305:       canSpeak: inputGate.canSpeak,
306:       reason: inputGate.reason,
307:       ...(inputGate.updatedAt ? { updatedAt: inputGate.updatedAt } : {}),
308:     };
309:   }
310: 
311:   private async resolveTitleEvidence(
312:     inputTitle: ValidatedReviewTitle,
313:     context: GenerateReviewContext,
314:   ): Promise<TitleEvidence> {
315:     const provided: TitleEvidence = {
316:       titleId: inputTitle.titleId,
317:       title: inputTitle.title ?? '',
318:       year: typeof inputTitle.year === 'number' ? inputTitle.year : null,
319:       genres: Array.isArray(inputTitle.genres) ? inputTitle.genres : [],
320:       plot: inputTitle.plot ?? '',
321:       runtimeMinutes:
322:         typeof inputTitle.runtimeMinutes === 'number' ? inputTitle.runtimeMinutes : null,
323:     };
324: 
325:     if (provided.title) return provided;
326: 
327:     const lookedUp = await this.loadTitleEvidence(inputTitle.titleId, context);
328:     return {
329:       titleId: lookedUp.titleId || provided.titleId,
330:       title: lookedUp.title || provided.title,
331:       year: lookedUp.year ?? provided.year,
332:       genres: lookedUp.genres.length ? lookedUp.genres : provided.genres,
333:       plot: lookedUp.plot || provided.plot,
334:       runtimeMinutes: lookedUp.runtimeMinutes ?? provided.runtimeMinutes,
335:     };
336:   }
337: 
338:   private async loadTitleEvidence(titleId: string, context: GenerateReviewContext): Promise<TitleEvidence> {
339:     const url = `${this.baseUrl(context.baseUrl)}/api/justus/titleDetail?imdbId=${encodeURIComponent(
340:       titleId,
341:     )}`;
342: 
343:     let response: Response;
344:     try {
345:       response = await fetch(url, {
346:         method: 'GET',
347:         headers: {
348:           ...(context.authorization ? { Authorization: context.authorization } : {}),
349:           'x-trace-id': context.traceId,
350:         },
351:       });
352:     } catch {
353:       throw new ServiceError(502, 'Failed to resolve title information');
354:     }
355: 
356:     const payload = await this.readJsonSafe(response);
357:     const statusCode = this.readStatusCode(payload, response.status);
358: 
359:     if (statusCode >= 500) throw new ServiceError(502, 'Failed to resolve title information');
360:     if (statusCode >= 400) throw new ServiceError(404, 'Title not found');
361: 
362:     const info = this.asObject(payload?.info);
363:     const title = this.asOptionalString(info?.title);
364:     if (!title) throw new ServiceError(404, 'Title not found');
365: 
366:     return {
367:       titleId: this.asOptionalString(info?.imdbId) || titleId,
368:       title,
369:       year: this.parseIntLike(info?.year),
370:       genres: this.splitCsv(info?.genre),
371:       plot: this.asOptionalString(info?.plot) || '',
372:       runtimeMinutes: this.parseIntLike(info?.runtime),
373:     };
374:   }
375: 
376:   private async callLlmRouter(
377:     payload: {
378:       provider?: ReviewProvider;
379:       input: string;
380:       system?: string;
381:       metadata: Record<string, unknown>;
382:     },
383:     context: GenerateReviewContext,
384:   ): Promise<LlmRouterResponse> {
385:     const url = `${this.baseUrl(context.baseUrl)}/api/justus/llmRouter`;
386:     let response: Response;
387: 
388:     try {
389:       response = await fetch(url, {
390:         method: 'POST',
391:         headers: {
392:           'content-type': 'application/json',
393:           ...(context.authorization ? { Authorization: context.authorization } : {}),
394:           'x-trace-id': context.traceId,
395:         },
396:         body: JSON.stringify(payload),
397:       });
398:     } catch {
399:       throw new ServiceError(502, 'llmRouter request failed');
400:     }
401: 
402:     const parsed = await this.readJsonSafe(response);
403:     if (!response.ok) {
404:       const errors = Array.isArray(parsed?.errors)
405:         ? parsed.errors.filter((item) => typeof item === 'string')
406:         : [];
407:       throw new ServiceError(502, errors[0] || `llmRouter failed with status ${response.status}`);
408:     }
409: 
410:     const outputText =
411:       this.asOptionalString(parsed?.output_text) || this.asOptionalString(parsed?.outputText);
412:     if (!outputText) throw new ServiceError(502, 'llmRouter returned no output_text');
413: 
414:     const providerRaw = this.asOptionalString(parsed?.provider)?.toLowerCase() ?? null;
415:     const provider =
416:       providerRaw === 'openai' || providerRaw === 'deepseek'
417:         ? (providerRaw as ReviewProvider)
418:         : null;
419: 
420:     return { provider, outputText };
421:   }
422: 
423:   private parseModelResult(outputText: string): ReviewResult {
424:     const cleaned = this.extractJsonPayload(outputText);
425: 
426:     let parsed: unknown;
427:     try {
428:       parsed = JSON.parse(cleaned);
429:     } catch {
430:       throw new ServiceError(502, 'Invalid model output JSON');
431:     }
432: 
433:     const root = this.asObject(parsed);
434:     if (!root) throw new ServiceError(502, 'Invalid model output shape');
435: 
436:     const decisionValue =
437:       this.asOptionalString(root.decision_type) || this.asOptionalString(root.decisionType);
438:     if (!decisionValue || !REVIEW_DECISIONS.includes(decisionValue as ReviewDecisionType)) {
439:       throw new ServiceError(502, 'Invalid decision_type in model output');
440:     }
441: 
442:     const confidence = this.asNumber(root.confidence);
443:     if (confidence === null) throw new ServiceError(502, 'confidence must be a number');
444: 
445:     const decisionType = decisionValue as ReviewDecisionType;
446:     const result: ReviewResult = { decisionType, confidence };
447: 
448:     if (decisionType === 'SPEAK') {
449:       const reviewText =
450:         this.asOptionalString(root.review_text) || this.asOptionalString(root.reviewText);
451:       if (!reviewText) throw new ServiceError(502, 'review_text is required for SPEAK');
452:       if (this.wordCount(reviewText) < 500) {
453:         throw new ServiceError(502, 'review_text must be at least 500 words for SPEAK');
454:       }
455:       result.reviewText = reviewText;
456:     }
457: 
458:     if (decisionType === 'SILENCE') {
459:       const silenceReason =
460:         this.asOptionalString(root.silence_reason) ||
461:         this.asOptionalString(root.silenceReason) ||
462:         this.asOptionalString(root.reason);
463:       if (!silenceReason) throw new ServiceError(502, 'silence_reason is required for SILENCE');
464:       result.silenceReason = silenceReason;
465:     }
466: 
467:     if (decisionType === 'EXPLAIN_CONFLICT') {
468:       const conflictExplanation =
469:         this.asOptionalString(root.conflict_explanation) ||
470:         this.asOptionalString(root.conflictExplanation);
471:       if (!conflictExplanation) {
472:         throw new ServiceError(502, 'conflict_explanation is required for EXPLAIN_CONFLICT');
473:       }
474:       result.conflictExplanation = conflictExplanation;
475:     }
476: 
477:     if (decisionType === 'ASK_LIGHT_QUESTION') {
478:       const lightQuestion =
479:         this.asOptionalString(root.light_question) || this.asOptionalString(root.lightQuestion);
480:       if (!lightQuestion) {
481:         throw new ServiceError(502, 'light_question is required for ASK_LIGHT_QUESTION');
482:       }
483:       result.lightQuestion = lightQuestion;
484:     }
485: 
486:     const anchorsUsed =
487:       this.asStringArray(root.anchors_used).length > 0
488:         ? this.asStringArray(root.anchors_used)
489:         : this.asStringArray(root.anchorsUsed);
490:     if (anchorsUsed.length > 0) result.anchorsUsed = anchorsUsed;
491: 
492:     const mismatches = Array.isArray(root.mismatches) ? root.mismatches : [];
493:     if (mismatches.length > 0) result.mismatches = mismatches;
494: 
495:     const structuralMatch =
496:       typeof root.structural_match === 'boolean'
497:         ? root.structural_match
498:         : typeof root.structuralMatch === 'boolean'
499:           ? root.structuralMatch
500:           : null;
501:     if (structuralMatch !== null) result.structuralMatch = structuralMatch;
502: 
503:     return result;
504:   }
505: 
506:   private extractJsonPayload(raw: string): string {
507:     const trimmed = raw.trim();
508:     const fenced = trimmed.match(/^```[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*```$/);
509:     const withoutFence = fenced ? fenced[1].trim() : trimmed;
510: 
511:     const firstBrace = withoutFence.indexOf('{');
512:     const lastBrace = withoutFence.lastIndexOf('}');
513:     if (firstBrace >= 0 && lastBrace > firstBrace) {
514:       return withoutFence.slice(firstBrace, lastBrace + 1);
515:     }
516: 
517:     return withoutFence;
518:   }
519: 
520:   private findCachedReview(
521:     store: ReviewStore,
522:     userKey: string,
523:     titleId: string,
524:     spoilerMode: SpoilerMode,
525:   ): ReviewResult | null {
526:     const review = [...store.generatedReviews]
527:       .reverse()
528:       .find(
529:         (row) =>
530:           row.userKey === userKey &&
531:           row.titleId === titleId &&
532:           row.spoilerMode === spoilerMode &&
533:           row.promptVersion === PROMPT_VERSION &&
534:           row.result.decisionType !== 'SILENCE',
535:       );
536:     return review?.result ?? null;
537:   }
538: 
539:   private async persistGeneratedReview(
540:     store: ReviewStore,
541:     row: {
542:       userKey: string;
543:       titleId: string;
544:       spoilerMode: SpoilerMode;
545:       promptVersion: string;
546:       provider: ReviewProvider | null;
547:       traceId: string;
548:       result: ReviewResult;
549:     },
550:   ): Promise<void> {
551:     store.generatedReviews.push({
552:       id: randomUUID(),
553:       userKey: row.userKey,
554:       titleId: row.titleId,
555:       spoilerMode: row.spoilerMode,
556:       promptVersion: row.promptVersion,
557:       provider: row.provider,
558:       traceId: row.traceId,
559:       createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
560:       result: row.result,
561:     });
562: 
563:     await this.saveStore(store);
564:   }
565: 
566:   private async loadStore(): Promise<ReviewStore> {
567:     const filePath = this.storePath();
568:     try {
569:       const raw = await readFile(filePath, 'utf8');
570:       const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as Record<string, unknown>;
571: 
572:       const reviewGates = this.asObject(parsed.reviewGates) ?? {};
573:       const generatedReviews = Array.isArray(parsed.generatedReviews) ? parsed.generatedReviews : [];
574: 
575:       const normalizedGates: Record<string, ReviewGate> = {};
576:       for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(reviewGates)) {
577:         const gate = this.asObject(value);
578:         if (!gate || typeof gate.canSpeak !== 'boolean') continue;
579:         normalizedGates[key] = {
580:           canSpeak: gate.canSpeak,
581:           reason: this.asOptionalString(gate.reason) ?? null,
582:           ...(this.asOptionalString(gate.updatedAt)
583:             ? { updatedAt: this.asOptionalString(gate.updatedAt) as string }
584:             : {}),
585:         };
586:       }
587: 
588:       const normalizedReviews: GeneratedReviewRecord[] = generatedReviews
589:         .map((item) => this.normalizeGeneratedReview(item))
590:         .filter((item): item is GeneratedReviewRecord => Boolean(item));
591: 
592:       return {
593:         reviewGates: normalizedGates,
594:         generatedReviews: normalizedReviews,
595:       };
596:     } catch {
597:       return {
598:         reviewGates: {},
599:         generatedReviews: [],
600:       };
601:     }
602:   }
603: 
604:   private normalizeGeneratedReview(item: unknown): GeneratedReviewRecord | null {
605:     const row = this.asObject(item);
606:     if (!row) return null;
607: 
608:     const userKey = this.asOptionalString(row.userKey);
609:     const titleId = this.asOptionalString(row.titleId);
610:     const spoilerMode = this.asOptionalString(row.spoilerMode);
611:     const traceId = this.asOptionalString(row.traceId);
612:     const createdAt = this.asOptionalString(row.createdAt);
613:     const result = this.normalizeReviewResult(row.result);
614: 
615:     if (!userKey || !titleId || !traceId || !createdAt || !result) return null;
616:     if (spoilerMode !== 'spoiler' && spoilerMode !== 'non-spoiler') return null;
617: 
618:     const providerRaw = this.asOptionalString(row.provider)?.toLowerCase() ?? null;
619:     const provider =
620:       providerRaw === 'openai' || providerRaw === 'deepseek'
621:         ? (providerRaw as ReviewProvider)
622:         : null;
623: 
624:     return {
625:       id: this.asOptionalString(row.id) || randomUUID(),
626:       userKey,
627:       titleId,
628:       spoilerMode,
629:       promptVersion: this.asOptionalString(row.promptVersion) || 'legacy-v1',
630:       provider,
631:       traceId,
632:       createdAt,
633:       result,
634:     };
635:   }
636: 
637:   private normalizeReviewResult(input: unknown): ReviewResult | null {
638:     const root = this.asObject(input);
639:     if (!root) return null;
640: 
641:     const decisionType = this.asOptionalString(root.decisionType);
642:     const confidence = this.asNumber(root.confidence);
643:     if (!decisionType || confidence === null) return null;
644:     if (!REVIEW_DECISIONS.includes(decisionType as ReviewDecisionType)) return null;
645: 
646:     const out: ReviewResult = {
647:       decisionType: decisionType as ReviewDecisionType,
648:       confidence,
649:     };
650: 
651:     const reviewText = this.asOptionalString(root.reviewText);
652:     if (reviewText) out.reviewText = reviewText;
653: 
654:     const silenceReason = this.asOptionalString(root.silenceReason);
655:     if (silenceReason) out.silenceReason = silenceReason;
656: 
657:     const conflictExplanation = this.asOptionalString(root.conflictExplanation);
658:     if (conflictExplanation) out.conflictExplanation = conflictExplanation;
659: 
660:     const lightQuestion = this.asOptionalString(root.lightQuestion);
661:     if (lightQuestion) out.lightQuestion = lightQuestion;
662: 
663:     if (this.asStringArray(root.anchorsUsed).length) {
664:       out.anchorsUsed = this.asStringArray(root.anchorsUsed);
665:     }
666:     if (Array.isArray(root.mismatches) && root.mismatches.length) {
667:       out.mismatches = root.mismatches;
668:     }
669:     if (typeof root.structuralMatch === 'boolean') {
670:       out.structuralMatch = root.structuralMatch;
671:     }
672: 
673:     return out;
674:   }
675: 
676:   private async saveStore(store: ReviewStore): Promise<void> {
677:     const filePath = this.storePath();
678:     await mkdir(dirname(filePath), { recursive: true });
679: 
680:     const tempPath = `${filePath}.${randomUUID()}.tmp`;
681:     await writeFile(tempPath, JSON.stringify(store, null, 2), 'utf8');
682:     await rename(tempPath, filePath);
683:   }
684: 
685:   private storePath(): string {
686:     const configured = process.env.GENERATE_REVIEW_STORE_PATH;
687:     if (configured && configured.trim()) return configured;
688:     return join(process.cwd(), 'temp', 'generate-review-store.json');
689:   }
690: 
691:   private readStatusCode(payload: Record<string, unknown> | null, fallback: number): number {
692:     const statusRaw = payload?.statusCode;
693:     if (typeof statusRaw === 'number' && Number.isFinite(statusRaw)) return Math.trunc(statusRaw);
694:     return fallback;
695:   }
696: 
697:   private baseUrl(raw: string): string {
698:     return raw.replace(/\/+$/, '');
699:   }
700: 
701:   private parseIntLike(value: unknown): number | null {
702:     if (typeof value === 'number' && Number.isFinite(value)) return Math.trunc(value);
703:     if (typeof value !== 'string') return null;
704:     const m = value.match(/\d+/);
705:     if (!m) return null;
706:     const n = parseInt(m[0], 10);
707:     return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : null;
708:   }
709: 
710:   private splitCsv(value: unknown): string[] {
711:     if (typeof value !== 'string') return [];
712:     return value
713:       .split(',')
714:       .map((item) => item.trim())
715:       .filter((item) => Boolean(item));
716:   }
717: 
718:   private asOptionalString(value: unknown): string | null {
719:     if (typeof value !== 'string') return null;
720:     const trimmed = value.trim();
721:     return trimmed || null;
722:   }
723: 
724:   private asNumber(value: unknown): number | null {
725:     if (typeof value === 'number' && Number.isFinite(value)) return value;
726: 
727:     if (typeof value === 'string') {
728:       const trimmed = value.trim();
729:       if (!trimmed) return null;
730:       const parsed = Number(trimmed);
731:       if (Number.isFinite(parsed)) return parsed;
732:     }
733: 
734:     return null;
735:   }
736: 
737:   private asObject(value: unknown): Record<string, any> | null {
738:     if (!value || typeof value !== 'object' || Array.isArray(value)) return null;
739:     return value as Record<string, any>;
740:   }
741: 
742:   private asStringArray(value: unknown): string[] {
743:     if (!Array.isArray(value)) return [];
744:     return value
745:       .map((item) => (typeof item === 'string' ? item.trim() : ''))
746:       .filter((item) => Boolean(item));
747:   }
748: 
749:   private wordCount(text: string): number {
750:     return text
751:       .trim()
752:       .split(/\s+/)
753:       .filter((token) => Boolean(token)).length;
754:   }
755: 
756:   private async readJsonSafe(response: Response): Promise<Record<string, any> | null> {
757:     const text = await response.text().catch(() => '');
758:     if (!text) return null;
759:     try {
760:       return JSON.parse(text) as Record<string, any>;
761:     } catch {
762:       return null;
763:     }
764:   }
765: }
``````

## File: src/justus/filmTrailer.controller.ts
``````typescript
 1: import { All, Controller, Get, Options, Query, Req, Res } from '@nestjs/common';
 2: import type { Request, Response } from 'express';
 3: import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
 4: import { FilmTrailerService } from './filmTrailer.service';
 5: 
 6: const JSON_HEADERS = { 'content-type': 'application/json' };
 7: const CORS_HEADERS = {
 8:   'access-control-allow-origin': '*',
 9:   'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET,OPTIONS',
10:   'access-control-allow-headers': 'content-type, authorization, x-trace-id',
11: };
12: 
13: @Controller('api/justus')
14: export class FilmTrailerController {
15:   constructor(private readonly filmTrailerService: FilmTrailerService) {}
16: 
17:   @Options('filmTrailer')
18:   options(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
19:     const traceId = this.resolveTraceId(req);
20:     res.setHeader('X-Trace-Id', traceId);
21:     return res.status(204).set({ ...CORS_HEADERS, Allow: 'GET, OPTIONS' }).send();
22:   }
23: 
24:   @Get('filmTrailer')
25:   async filmTrailer(
26:     @Req() req: Request,
27:     @Res() res: Response,
28:     @Query() queryParams: Record<string, string | string[] | undefined>,
29:   ) {
30:     const traceId = this.resolveTraceId(req);
31: 
32:     if (!this.isAuthorized(req)) {
33:       const body = {
34:         requestId: traceId,
35:         statusCode: 401,
36:         dataSource: 'youtube',
37:         videos: [],
38:         videoCount: 0,
39:         errors: ['Unauthorized'],
40:       };
41: 
42:       res.setHeader('X-Trace-Id', traceId);
43:       return res.status(401).set({ ...JSON_HEADERS, ...CORS_HEADERS }).send(JSON.stringify(body));
44:     }
45: 
46:     const result = await this.filmTrailerService.search(traceId, queryParams);
47: 
48:     res.setHeader('X-Trace-Id', traceId);
49:     return res
50:       .status(result.statusCode)
51:       .set({ ...JSON_HEADERS, ...CORS_HEADERS })
52:       .send(JSON.stringify(result.body));
53:   }
54: 
55:   @All('filmTrailer')
56:   methodNotAllowed(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
57:     const traceId = this.resolveTraceId(req);
58:     const body = {
59:       requestId: traceId,
60:       statusCode: 405,
61:       dataSource: 'youtube',
62:       videos: [],
63:       videoCount: 0,
64:       errors: ['Method not allowed'],
65:     };
66: 
67:     res.setHeader('X-Trace-Id', traceId);
68:     return res
69:       .status(405)
70:       .set({ ...JSON_HEADERS, ...CORS_HEADERS, Allow: 'GET, OPTIONS' })
71:       .send(JSON.stringify(body));
72:   }
73: 
74:   private resolveTraceId(req: Request): string {
75:     return (req.header('x-trace-id') || req.header('X-Trace-Id') || '').trim() || randomUUID();
76:   }
77: 
78:   private isAuthorized(req: Request): boolean {
79:     const expected = process.env.API_BEARER_TOKEN ?? '';
80:     const auth = req.header('authorization') || req.header('Authorization') || '';
81: 
82:     if (!expected || !auth.startsWith('Bearer ')) return false;
83: 
84:     const suppliedToken = auth.slice('Bearer '.length).trim();
85:     return suppliedToken === expected;
86:   }
87: }
``````

## File: src/justus/filmTrailer.service.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
  2: 
  3: type FilmTrailerVideo = {
  4:   videoId: string;
  5:   title: string;
  6:   description: string;
  7:   thumbnails: unknown;
  8:   channelId: string;
  9:   channelTitle: string;
 10:   publishedAt: string;
 11: };
 12: 
 13: type FilmTrailerBody = {
 14:   requestId: string;
 15:   statusCode: number;
 16:   dataSource: 'youtube';
 17:   query?: {
 18:     q: string;
 19:     maxResults: number;
 20:   };
 21:   videos: FilmTrailerVideo[];
 22:   videoCount: number;
 23:   errors: string[];
 24:   upstreamBody?: string;
 25: };
 26: 
 27: export type FilmTrailerResult = {
 28:   statusCode: number;
 29:   body: FilmTrailerBody;
 30: };
 31: 
 32: @Injectable()
 33: export class FilmTrailerService {
 34:   async search(
 35:     traceId: string,
 36:     rawParams: Record<string, string | string[] | undefined>,
 37:   ): Promise<FilmTrailerResult> {
 38:     const apiKey = process.env.YOUTUBE_API_KEY;
 39:     if (!apiKey) {
 40:       return this.buildResult(500, {
 41:         requestId: traceId,
 42:         statusCode: 500,
 43:         dataSource: 'youtube',
 44:         videos: [],
 45:         videoCount: 0,
 46:         errors: ['Missing YOUTUBE_API_KEY'],
 47:       });
 48:     }
 49: 
 50:     const query = this.pickQuery(rawParams);
 51:     if (!query) {
 52:       return this.buildResult(400, {
 53:         requestId: traceId,
 54:         statusCode: 400,
 55:         dataSource: 'youtube',
 56:         videos: [],
 57:         videoCount: 0,
 58:         errors: ["Missing search query 'query'"],
 59:       });
 60:     }
 61: 
 62:     const maxResults = this.parseMaxResults(rawParams.maxResults);
 63:     const youtubeUrl = this.buildYoutubeUrl(query, maxResults, apiKey);
 64: 
 65:     let upstreamStatus = 200;
 66:     const errors: string[] = [];
 67:     let videos: FilmTrailerVideo[] = [];
 68: 
 69:     try {
 70:       const upstream = await fetch(youtubeUrl, {
 71:         method: 'GET',
 72:         headers: { 'x-trace-id': traceId },
 73:       });
 74: 
 75:       upstreamStatus = upstream.status;
 76:       const rawBody = await upstream.text();
 77: 
 78:       if (!upstream.ok) {
 79:         errors.push('Upstream YouTube request failed');
 80:         return this.buildResult(upstreamStatus, {
 81:           requestId: traceId,
 82:           statusCode: upstreamStatus,
 83:           dataSource: 'youtube',
 84:           videos: [],
 85:           videoCount: 0,
 86:           errors,
 87:           upstreamBody: rawBody,
 88:         });
 89:       }
 90: 
 91:       const parsed = rawBody ? (JSON.parse(rawBody) as { items?: unknown[] }) : { items: [] };
 92:       videos = this.extractVideos(parsed.items);
 93:     } catch (error: any) {
 94:       upstreamStatus = 500;
 95:       errors.push('Upstream fetch failed');
 96:       errors.push(error?.message ? String(error.message) : 'Unknown error');
 97:     }
 98: 
 99:     return this.buildResult(upstreamStatus, {
100:       requestId: traceId,
101:       statusCode: upstreamStatus,
102:       dataSource: 'youtube',
103:       query: { q: query, maxResults },
104:       videos,
105:       videoCount: videos.length,
106:       errors,
107:     });
108:   }
109: 
110:   private pickQuery(rawParams: Record<string, string | string[] | undefined>): string {
111:     const fromQuery = this.firstValue(rawParams.query);
112:     if (fromQuery.trim()) return fromQuery.trim();
113: 
114:     const fromQ = this.firstValue(rawParams.q);
115:     return fromQ.trim();
116:   }
117: 
118:   private parseMaxResults(value: string | string[] | undefined): number {
119:     const raw = this.firstValue(value);
120:     if (!raw) return 10;
121: 
122:     const parsed = Number.parseInt(raw, 10);
123:     if (!Number.isFinite(parsed)) return 10;
124: 
125:     return Math.max(0, Math.min(50, parsed));
126:   }
127: 
128:   private buildYoutubeUrl(query: string, maxResults: number, apiKey: string): string {
129:     const params = new URLSearchParams({
130:       part: 'snippet',
131:       q: query,
132:       type: 'video',
133:       maxResults: String(maxResults),
134:       key: apiKey,
135:     });
136: 
137:     return `https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/search?${params.toString()}`;
138:   }
139: 
140:   private extractVideos(items: unknown): FilmTrailerVideo[] {
141:     if (!Array.isArray(items)) return [];
142: 
143:     const out: FilmTrailerVideo[] = [];
144:     for (const item of items) {
145:       const source = item as any;
146:       const videoId = source?.id?.videoId;
147:       const snippet = source?.snippet;
148: 
149:       if (!videoId || !snippet) continue;
150: 
151:       out.push({
152:         videoId: String(videoId),
153:         title: String(snippet.title ?? ''),
154:         description: String(snippet.description ?? ''),
155:         thumbnails: snippet.thumbnails ?? null,
156:         channelId: String(snippet.channelId ?? ''),
157:         channelTitle: String(snippet.channelTitle ?? ''),
158:         publishedAt: String(snippet.publishedAt ?? ''),
159:       });
160:     }
161: 
162:     return out;
163:   }
164: 
165:   private firstValue(value: string | string[] | undefined): string {
166:     if (Array.isArray(value)) return value[0] ?? '';
167:     return value ?? '';
168:   }
169: 
170:   private buildResult(statusCode: number, body: FilmTrailerBody): FilmTrailerResult {
171:     return { statusCode, body };
172:   }
173: }
``````

## File: src/justus/justus.module.ts
``````typescript
 1: import { Module } from '@nestjs/common';
 2: import { TitleSearchController } from './titleSearch.controller';
 3: import { TitleDetailController } from './titleDetail.controller';
 4: import { FilmTrailerController } from './filmTrailer.controller';
 5: import { FilmTrailerService } from './filmTrailer.service';
 6: import { LlmRouterController } from './llmRouter.controller';
 7: import { LlmRouterService } from './llmRouter.service';
 8: 
 9: 
10: import { TrailersController } from './trailers.controller';
11: 
12: @Module({
13:   controllers: [
14:     TitleSearchController,
15:     TitleDetailController,
16:     FilmTrailerController,
17:     LlmRouterController,
18:     TrailersController,
19:   ],
20:   providers: [
21:     FilmTrailerService,
22:     LlmRouterService,
23:   ],
24:   imports: [],
25: })
26: export class JustUsModule {}
``````

## File: src/justus/llmRouter.controller.ts
``````typescript
 1: import { All, Controller, Options, Post, Req, Res, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';
 2: import type { Request, Response } from 'express';
 3: import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
 4: import { BearerTokenGuard } from '../auth/bearer-token.guard';
 5: import { LlmRouterService } from './llmRouter.service';
 6: 
 7: const JSON_HEADERS = { 'content-type': 'application/json' };
 8: const CORS_HEADERS = {
 9:   'access-control-allow-origin': '*',
10:   'access-control-allow-methods': 'POST,OPTIONS',
11:   'access-control-allow-headers': 'content-type, authorization, x-trace-id',
12: };
13: const ALLOW_HEADER = 'POST, OPTIONS';
14: 
15: @Controller('api/justus')
16: export class LlmRouterController {
17:   constructor(private readonly llmRouterService: LlmRouterService) {}
18: 
19:   @Options('llmRouter')
20:   options(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
21:     const traceId = this.resolveTraceId(req);
22:     res.setHeader('X-Trace-Id', traceId);
23:     return res.status(204).set({ ...CORS_HEADERS, Allow: ALLOW_HEADER }).send();
24:   }
25: 
26:   @Post('llmRouter')
27:   @UseGuards(BearerTokenGuard)
28:   async post(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
29:     const traceId = this.resolveTraceId(req);
30:     const result = await this.llmRouterService.route(this.toBodyRaw(req.body), traceId);
31: 
32:     res.setHeader('X-Trace-Id', traceId);
33:     return res
34:       .status(result.statusCode)
35:       .set({ ...JSON_HEADERS, ...CORS_HEADERS, 'Cache-Control': 'no-store' })
36:       .send(JSON.stringify(result.body));
37:   }
38: 
39:   @All('llmRouter')
40:   methodNotAllowed(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
41:     const traceId = this.resolveTraceId(req);
42:     const body = {
43:       errors: ['Method not allowed'],
44:       trace_id: traceId,
45:     };
46: 
47:     res.setHeader('X-Trace-Id', traceId);
48:     return res
49:       .status(405)
50:       .set({ ...JSON_HEADERS, ...CORS_HEADERS, Allow: ALLOW_HEADER })
51:       .send(JSON.stringify(body));
52:   }
53: 
54:   private resolveTraceId(req: Request): string {
55:     return (req.header('x-trace-id') || req.header('X-Trace-Id') || '').trim() || randomUUID();
56:   }
57: 
58:   private toBodyRaw(body: unknown): string | undefined {
59:     if (body == null) return undefined;
60:     if (typeof body === 'string') return body;
61:     try {
62:       return JSON.stringify(body);
63:     } catch {
64:       return undefined;
65:     }
66:   }
67: }
``````

## File: src/justus/llmRouter.service.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
  2: 
  3: type LlmProvider = 'deepseek' | 'openai';
  4: 
  5: type RouterPayload = {
  6:   provider?: unknown;
  7:   input?: unknown;
  8:   system?: unknown;
  9:   metadata?: unknown;
 10: };
 11: 
 12: type NormalizedRequest = {
 13:   provider: LlmProvider | null;
 14:   input: string;
 15:   system: string | null;
 16:   metadata: Record<string, unknown> | null;
 17: };
 18: 
 19: type ProviderResult = {
 20:   provider: LlmProvider;
 21:   model: string;
 22:   trace_id: string;
 23:   output_text: string;
 24:   raw_provider_meta: {
 25:     status: number;
 26:     headers: {
 27:       'x-request-id': string | null;
 28:     };
 29:     body: unknown;
 30:   };
 31: };
 32: 
 33: type RouteSuccess = {
 34:   statusCode: number;
 35:   body: ProviderResult;
 36: };
 37: 
 38: type RouteFailure = {
 39:   statusCode: number;
 40:   body: {
 41:     errors: string[];
 42:     trace_id: string;
 43:     details?: unknown;
 44:   };
 45: };
 46: 
 47: export type LlmRouterResult = RouteSuccess | RouteFailure;
 48: 
 49: class HttpError extends Error {
 50:   constructor(
 51:     readonly statusCode: number,
 52:     message: string,
 53:     readonly details: unknown = null,
 54:   ) {
 55:     super(message);
 56:   }
 57: }
 58: 
 59: @Injectable()
 60: export class LlmRouterService {
 61:   async route(rawBody: string | undefined, traceId: string): Promise<LlmRouterResult> {
 62:     try {
 63:       const payload = this.parseJsonBody(rawBody);
 64:       const request = this.validateRequestPayload(payload);
 65: 
 66:       if (request.provider === 'deepseek') {
 67:         const response = await this.callDeepseek(request, traceId);
 68:         return { statusCode: 200, body: response };
 69:       }
 70: 
 71:       if (request.provider === 'openai') {
 72:         const response = await this.callOpenAi(request, traceId);
 73:         return { statusCode: 200, body: response };
 74:       }
 75: 
 76:       try {
 77:         const response = await this.callDeepseek(request, traceId);
 78:         return { statusCode: 200, body: response };
 79:       } catch {
 80: 
 81:       }
 82: 
 83:       const response = await this.callOpenAi(request, traceId);
 84:       return { statusCode: 200, body: response };
 85:     } catch (error: any) {
 86:       if (error instanceof HttpError) {
 87:         return {
 88:           statusCode: error.statusCode,
 89:           body: {
 90:             errors: [error.message],
 91:             trace_id: traceId,
 92:             ...(error.details != null ? { details: error.details } : {}),
 93:           },
 94:         };
 95:       }
 96: 
 97:       return {
 98:         statusCode: 500,
 99:         body: {
100:           errors: [
101:             'Internal server error',
102:             ...(error?.message ? [String(error.message)] : []),
103:           ],
104:           trace_id: traceId,
105:           details: {
106:             name: error?.name ?? null,
107:             stack: error?.stack ?? null,
108:           },
109:         },
110:       };
111:     }
112:   }
113: 
114:   private parseJsonBody(rawBody: string | undefined): RouterPayload {
115:     if (!rawBody) return {};
116: 
117:     try {
118:       return JSON.parse(rawBody) as RouterPayload;
119:     } catch {
120:       throw new HttpError(400, 'Invalid JSON body');
121:     }
122:   }
123: 
124:   private validateRequestPayload(payload: RouterPayload): NormalizedRequest {
125:     const { provider, input, system, metadata } = payload;
126: 
127:     if (!input || typeof input !== 'string') {
128:       throw new HttpError(400, 'input is required and must be a string');
129:     }
130: 
131:     if (system != null && typeof system !== 'string') {
132:       throw new HttpError(400, 'system must be a string when provided');
133:     }
134: 
135:     if (metadata != null && typeof metadata !== 'object') {
136:       throw new HttpError(400, 'metadata must be an object when provided');
137:     }
138: 
139:     let normalizedProvider: LlmProvider | null = null;
140:     if (provider != null) {
141:       if (typeof provider !== 'string') {
142:         throw new HttpError(400, 'provider must be a string when provided');
143:       }
144: 
145:       const lower = provider.toLowerCase();
146:       if (lower !== 'deepseek' && lower !== 'openai') {
147:         throw new HttpError(400, 'provider must be "deepseek" or "openai"');
148:       }
149:       normalizedProvider = lower;
150:     }
151: 
152:     return {
153:       provider: normalizedProvider,
154:       input,
155:       system: system ?? null,
156:       metadata: (metadata as Record<string, unknown> | null) ?? null,
157:     };
158:   }
159: 
160:   private async callDeepseek(request: NormalizedRequest, traceId: string): Promise<ProviderResult> {
161:     const config = this.getDeepseekConfig();
162:     const messages = [
163:       ...(request.system ? [{ role: 'system', content: request.system }] : []),
164:       { role: 'user', content: request.input },
165:     ];
166: 
167:     const response = await this.fetchWithTimeout(
168:       config.baseUrl,
169:       {
170:         method: 'POST',
171:         headers: {
172:           'content-type': 'application/json',
173:           authorization: `Bearer ${config.key}`,
174:           'x-trace-id': traceId,
175:         },
176:         body: JSON.stringify({
177:           model: config.model,
178:           temperature: config.temperature,
179:           max_tokens: config.maxTokens,
180:           messages,
181:         }),
182:       },
183:       10_000,
184:     );
185: 
186:     const { json, text } = await this.readJsonSafe(response);
187:     if (!response.ok) {
188:       throw new HttpError(502, `DeepSeek HTTP ${response.status}`, { body: json ?? text });
189:     }
190: 
191:     const normalized = this.normalizeProviderResponse('deepseek', response, json ?? {});
192:     return {
193:       provider: 'deepseek',
194:       model: config.model,
195:       trace_id: traceId,
196:       ...normalized,
197:     };
198:   }
199: 
200:   private async callOpenAi(request: NormalizedRequest, traceId: string): Promise<ProviderResult> {
201:     const config = this.getOpenAiConfig();
202:     const input = [
203:       ...(request.system ? [{ role: 'system', content: request.system }] : []),
204:       { role: 'user', content: request.input },
205:     ];
206: 
207:     const response = await this.fetchWithTimeout(
208:       config.baseUrl,
209:       {
210:         method: 'POST',
211:         headers: {
212:           'content-type': 'application/json',
213:           authorization: `Bearer ${config.key}`,
214:           'x-trace-id': traceId,
215:         },
216:         body: JSON.stringify({
217:           model: config.model,
218:           input,
219:           temperature: config.temperature,
220:           max_output_tokens: config.maxOutputTokens,
221:         }),
222:       },
223:       25_000,
224:     );
225: 
226:     const { json, text } = await this.readJsonSafe(response);
227:     if (!response.ok) {
228:       throw new HttpError(502, `OpenAI HTTP ${response.status}`, { body: json ?? text });
229:     }
230: 
231:     const normalized = this.normalizeProviderResponse('openai', response, json ?? {});
232:     return {
233:       provider: 'openai',
234:       model: config.model,
235:       trace_id: traceId,
236:       ...normalized,
237:     };
238:   }
239: 
240:   private getDeepseekConfig() {
241:     const key = process.env.DEEPSEEK_API_KEY;
242:     const baseUrl = process.env.DEEPSEEK_URL;
243:     const model = process.env.DEEPSEEK_PROMPT_MODEL ?? 'deepseek-chat';
244:     const temperature = this.parseNumber(process.env.DEEPSEEK_TEMPERATURE, 0.7);
245:     const maxTokens = this.parseInteger(process.env.DEEPSEEK_MAX_TOKENS, 1024);
246: 
247:     if (!key) throw new HttpError(500, 'DEEPSEEK_API_KEY missing');
248:     if (!baseUrl) throw new HttpError(500, 'DEEPSEEK_URL missing');
249: 
250:     return { key, baseUrl, model, temperature, maxTokens };
251:   }
252: 
253:   private getOpenAiConfig() {
254:     const key = process.env.OPENAI_KIA_API_KEY;
255:     const baseUrl = 'https://api.openai.com/v1/responses';
256:     const model = process.env.OPENAI_PROMPT_MODEL ?? 'gpt-4.1-mini';
257:     const temperature = this.parseNumber(process.env.OPENAI_TEMPERATURE, 0.7);
258:     const maxOutputTokens = this.parseInteger(process.env.OPENAI_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS, 1024);
259: 
260:     if (!key) throw new HttpError(500, 'OPENAI_KIA_API_KEY missing');
261: 
262:     return { key, baseUrl, model, temperature, maxOutputTokens };
263:   }
264: 
265:   private async fetchWithTimeout(
266:     url: string,
267:     options: RequestInit,
268:     timeoutMs: number,
269:   ): Promise<Response> {
270:     const controller = new AbortController();
271:     const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeoutMs);
272:     try {
273:       return await fetch(url, { ...options, signal: controller.signal });
274:     } catch (error: any) {
275:       if (error?.name === 'AbortError') {
276:         throw new HttpError(504, `Provider request timed out after ${timeoutMs}ms`);
277:       }
278:       throw error;
279:     } finally {
280:       clearTimeout(timeout);
281:     }
282:   }
283: 
284:   private async readJsonSafe(
285:     response: Response,
286:   ): Promise<{ json: Record<string, unknown> | null; text: string }> {
287:     const text = await response.text().catch(() => '');
288:     if (!text) return { json: null, text: '' };
289: 
290:     try {
291:       return { json: JSON.parse(text) as Record<string, unknown>, text };
292:     } catch {
293:       return { json: null, text };
294:     }
295:   }
296: 
297:   private normalizeProviderResponse(
298:     provider: LlmProvider,
299:     response: Response,
300:     body: Record<string, unknown>,
301:   ) {
302:     const outputText = this.extractTextFromProviderBody(body);
303:     if (!outputText) {
304:       throw new HttpError(502, `Provider ${provider} returned no recognizable text field`);
305:     }
306: 
307:     return {
308:       output_text: outputText,
309:       raw_provider_meta: {
310:         status: response.status,
311:         headers: {
312:           'x-request-id': response.headers.get('x-request-id'),
313:         },
314:         body,
315:       },
316:     };
317:   }
318: 
319:   private extractTextFromProviderBody(body: Record<string, unknown> | null): string | null {
320:     if (!body) return null;
321: 
322:     const outputText = body.output_text;
323:     if (typeof outputText === 'string' && outputText.trim()) return outputText.trim();
324: 
325:     const output = body.output;
326:     if (Array.isArray(output) && output.length > 0) {
327:       const first = output[0] as Record<string, unknown> | null;
328:       const content = first?.content;
329: 
330:       if (Array.isArray(content)) {
331:         const parts: string[] = [];
332:         for (const blockUnknown of content) {
333:           const block = blockUnknown as Record<string, unknown> | null;
334:           if (!block) continue;
335: 
336:           if (typeof block.text === 'string') parts.push(block.text);
337: 
338:           const textObj = block.text as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
339:           if (textObj && typeof textObj.value === 'string') parts.push(textObj.value);
340: 
341:           if (typeof block.content === 'string') parts.push(block.content);
342: 
343:           const contentObj = block.content as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
344:           if (contentObj && typeof contentObj.value === 'string') parts.push(contentObj.value);
345:         }
346: 
347:         const joined = parts.join('').trim();
348:         if (joined) return joined;
349:       }
350:     }
351: 
352:     const chatCompletion = (body.choices as any)?.[0]?.message?.content;
353:     if (typeof chatCompletion === 'string' && chatCompletion.trim()) {
354:       return chatCompletion.trim();
355:     }
356: 
357:     const fallback = body.text ?? body.output ?? body.result ?? body.response ?? null;
358:     if (typeof fallback === 'string' && fallback.trim()) return fallback.trim();
359: 
360:     return null;
361:   }
362: 
363:   private parseNumber(value: string | undefined, fallback: number): number {
364:     if (!value) return fallback;
365:     const parsed = Number(value);
366:     return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : fallback;
367:   }
368: 
369:   private parseInteger(value: string | undefined, fallback: number): number {
370:     if (!value) return fallback;
371:     const parsed = Number.parseInt(value, 10);
372:     return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : fallback;
373:   }
374: }
``````

## File: src/kiaspora/ffmpeg.ts
``````typescript
 1: import { spawn } from 'node:child_process';
 2: 
 3: type TranscodeArgs = {
 4:   input: string;
 5:   output: string;
 6:   args: string[];
 7: };
 8: 
 9: export async function transcode(job: TranscodeArgs): Promise<void> {
10:   const ffmpegBin = (process.env.FFMPEG_PATH || 'ffmpeg').trim();
11: 
12:   await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {
13:     const p = spawn(ffmpegBin, ['-y', '-i', job.input, ...job.args, job.output], {
14:       stdio: ['ignore', 'pipe', 'pipe'],
15:     });
16: 
17:     let stderr = '';
18:     p.stderr.on('data', (d) => (stderr += d.toString()));
19:     p.on('error', (err) => reject(err));
20:     p.on('close', (code) => {
21:       if (code === 0) return resolve();
22:       reject(new Error(`ffmpeg exited ${code}: ${stderr}`));
23:     });
24:   });
25: }
``````

## File: src/kiaspora/googleSpeechToText.ts
``````typescript
  1: import crypto from 'node:crypto';
  2: import fs from 'node:fs/promises';
  3: import os from 'node:os';
  4: import path from 'node:path';
  5: 
  6: import { transcode } from './ffmpeg';
  7: 
  8: type RouterBody = {
  9:   languageCode?: unknown;
 10:   altLanguageCodes?: unknown;
 11:   languageCodes?: unknown;
 12:   model?: unknown;
 13:   mimeType?: unknown;
 14:   base64Audio?: unknown;
 15:   sampleRateHertz?: unknown;
 16: };
 17: 
 18: type ProviderOut = {
 19:   model: string;
 20:   latency_ms: number;
 21:   text: string;
 22:   traceId: string;
 23: };
 24: 
 25: function requireEnv(name: string): string {
 26:   const v = (process.env[name] ?? '').trim().replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '');
 27:   if (!v) throw new Error(`Server misconfigured: missing ${name}`);
 28:   return v;
 29: }
 30: 
 31: function asString(v: unknown): string | undefined {
 32:   return typeof v === 'string' ? v : undefined;
 33: }
 34: 
 35: function asStringArray(v: unknown): string[] | undefined {
 36:   if (Array.isArray(v) && v.every((x) => typeof x === 'string')) return v as string[];
 37:   return undefined;
 38: }
 39: 
 40: function asNumber(v: unknown): number | undefined {
 41:   return typeof v === 'number' && Number.isFinite(v) ? v : undefined;
 42: }
 43: 
 44: function stripDataUrlToBase64(maybeDataUrl: string): string {
 45:   const idx = maybeDataUrl.indexOf('base64,');
 46:   if (idx !== -1) return maybeDataUrl.slice(idx + 'base64,'.length).trim();
 47:   return maybeDataUrl.trim();
 48: }
 49: 
 50: function normalizeMimeType(input?: string): string | undefined {
 51:   const raw = (input || '').trim().toLowerCase();
 52:   if (!raw) return undefined;
 53:   return raw.split(';')[0]?.trim() || undefined;
 54: }
 55: 
 56: async function transcodeToLinear16Wav(inputBytes: Buffer): Promise<Buffer> {
 57:   const id = crypto.randomBytes(8).toString('hex');
 58:   const inPath = path.join(os.tmpdir(), `stt-in-${id}`);
 59:   const outPath = path.join(os.tmpdir(), `stt-out-${id}.wav`);
 60: 
 61:   await fs.writeFile(inPath, inputBytes);
 62: 
 63:   await transcode({
 64:     input: inPath,
 65:     output: outPath,
 66:     args: ['-vn', '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', '-f', 'wav'],
 67:   });
 68: 
 69:   const wav = await fs.readFile(outPath);
 70:   await Promise.allSettled([fs.unlink(inPath), fs.unlink(outPath)]);
 71:   return wav;
 72: }
 73: 
 74: /**
 75:  * Accepts:
 76:  * - ["en-US","zh-CN"]
 77:  * - "en-US, zh-CN"
 78:  * - "en-US"
 79:  */
 80: function parseLanguageList(v: unknown): string[] {
 81:   const arr = asStringArray(v);
 82:   if (arr) return arr.map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
 83: 
 84:   const s = asString(v);
 85:   if (!s) return [];
 86:   return s
 87:     .split(',')
 88:     .map((x) => x.trim())
 89:     .filter(Boolean);
 90: }
 91: 
 92: 
 93: 
 94: 
 95: 
 96: 
 97: 
 98: function normalizeLanguages(input: {
 99:   languageCode?: string;
100:   languageCodes?: unknown;
101:   altLanguageCodes?: unknown;
102: }): { primary: string; alternatives: string[] } {
103:   const primaryFromSingle = (input.languageCode || '').trim();
104: 
105:   // languageCodes takes precedence as the “full set”
106:   const fromLanguageCodes = parseLanguageList(input.languageCodes);
107:   const fromAlt = parseLanguageList(input.altLanguageCodes);
108: 
109:   let combined: string[] = [];
110:   if (fromLanguageCodes.length > 0) {
111:     combined = fromLanguageCodes;
112:   } else {
113:     if (primaryFromSingle) combined.push(primaryFromSingle);
114:     combined.push(...fromAlt);
115:   }
116: 
117:   // Default if nothing provided
118:   if (combined.length === 0) combined = ['en-US'];
119: 
120: 
121:   const isValid = (tag: string) => /^[a-zA-Z]{2,3}(-[a-zA-Z0-9]{2,8})+$/.test(tag);
122: 
123: 
124:   const seen = new Set<string>();
125:   const cleaned = combined
126:     .map((t) => t.trim())
127:     .filter(Boolean)
128:     .filter((t) => isValid(t))
129:     .filter((t) => {
130:       const key = t.toLowerCase();
131:       if (seen.has(key)) return false;
132:       seen.add(key);
133:       return true;
134:     });
135: 
136: 
137:   const capped = cleaned.slice(0, 3);
138: 
139:   const primary = capped[0] || 'en-US';
140:   const alternatives = capped.slice(1);
141: 
142:   return { primary, alternatives };
143: }
144: 
145: 
146: 
147: 
148: 
149: export async function runGoogleSpeechToTextCore(params: {
150:   body: RouterBody;
151:   traceId: string;
152:   audioBase64?: string;
153: }): Promise<ProviderOut> {
154:   const started = Date.now();
155:   const { body, traceId } = params;
156: 
157:   const base64FromBody = asString(body.base64Audio);
158:   const base64FromRouter = params.audioBase64;
159: 
160:   const audioB64 = base64FromRouter || base64FromBody;
161:   if (!audioB64) {
162:     throw new Error('Missing audio. Provide multipart file ("audio" or "file") or JSON base64Audio.');
163:   }
164: 
165:   const mimeType = normalizeMimeType(asString(body.mimeType));
166:   const audioContent = stripDataUrlToBase64(audioB64);
167:   const inputBytes = Buffer.from(audioContent, 'base64');
168: 
169: 
170:   const { primary, alternatives } = normalizeLanguages({
171:     languageCode: asString(body.languageCode),
172:     languageCodes: body.languageCodes,
173:     altLanguageCodes: body.altLanguageCodes,
174:   });
175: 
176: 
177:   const request: any = {
178:     config: {
179:       languageCode: primary,
180:       enableAutomaticPunctuation: true,
181:     },
182:     audio: { content: '' },
183:   };
184: 
185:   if (alternatives.length > 0) {
186:     request.config.alternativeLanguageCodes = alternatives;
187:   }
188: 
189:   const requestedSampleRate = asNumber(body.sampleRateHertz);
190:   if (mimeType === 'audio/3gpp' || mimeType === 'audio/amr') {
191:     request.config.encoding = 'AMR';
192:     request.config.sampleRateHertz = requestedSampleRate || 8000;
193:     request.config.audioChannelCount = 1;
194:     request.audio.content = inputBytes.toString('base64');
195:   } else if (mimeType === 'audio/amr-wb') {
196:     request.config.encoding = 'AMR_WB';
197:     request.config.sampleRateHertz = requestedSampleRate || 16000;
198:     request.config.audioChannelCount = 1;
199:     request.audio.content = inputBytes.toString('base64');
200:   } else {
201:     const wavBytes = await transcodeToLinear16Wav(inputBytes);
202:     request.config.encoding = 'LINEAR16';
203:     request.config.sampleRateHertz = 16000;
204:     request.config.audioChannelCount = 1;
205:     request.audio.content = wavBytes.toString('base64');
206:   }
207: 
208: 
209:   const model = asString(body.model);
210:   if (model) request.config.model = model;
211: 
212:   const apiKey = requireEnv('GOOGLE_API_KEY');
213: 
214:   const res = await fetch(
215:     `https://speech.googleapis.com/v1/speech:recognize?key=${encodeURIComponent(apiKey)}`,
216:     {
217:       method: 'POST',
218:       headers: {
219:         'content-type': 'application/json',
220:         'x-trace-id': traceId,
221:       },
222:       body: JSON.stringify(request),
223:     },
224:   );
225: 
226:   const latency_ms = Date.now() - started;
227: 
228:   if (!res.ok) {
229:     const text = await res.text().catch(() => '');
230:     throw new Error(`Upstream google stt error: HTTP ${res.status} ${res.statusText} ${text}`);
231:   }
232: 
233:   const json: any = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
234: 
235:   const outText =
236:     (json?.results || [])
237:       .map((r: any) => r?.alternatives?.[0]?.transcript || '')
238:       .join(' ')
239:       .trim() || '';
240: 
241:   return {
242:     model: 'google-speech-to-text',
243:     latency_ms,
244:     text: outText,
245:     traceId,
246:   };
247: }
``````

## File: src/kiaspora/imageScan.controller.ts
``````typescript
 1: import { Body, Controller, HttpCode, Options, Post, Req, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';
 2: import type { Request } from 'express';
 3: 
 4: import { BearerTokenGuard } from '../auth/bearer-token.guard';
 5: import { ImageScanService } from './imageScan.service';
 6: 
 7: type RouterBody = {
 8:   aiProvider?: unknown;
 9:   base64Image?: unknown;
10:   mimeType?: unknown;
11:   customPrompt?: unknown;
12:   traceId?: unknown;
13:   imageUrl?: unknown;
14: };
15: 
16: function isMultipart(req: Request): boolean {
17:   const ct = (req.headers['content-type'] || '').toString();
18:   return ct.toLowerCase().includes('multipart/form-data');
19: }
20: 
21: @Controller('api/kiaspora')
22: @UseGuards(BearerTokenGuard)
23: export class ImageScanController {
24:   constructor(private readonly svc: ImageScanService) {}
25: 
26: 
27:   @Options('imageScan')
28:   @HttpCode(204)
29:   async options(): Promise<void> {
30:     return;
31:   }
32: 
33:   @Post('imageScan')
34:   async handler(@Req() req: Request, @Body() body: RouterBody) {
35: 
36:     const parsed: RouterBody = isMultipart(req) ? await this.svc.parseMultipart(req) : this.svc.parseJsonBody(body);
37: 
38: 
39:     return this.svc.run(parsed, req);
40:   }
41: }
``````

## File: src/kiaspora/imageScan.service.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
  2: import type { Request } from 'express';
  3: import Busboy from 'busboy';
  4: 
  5: type RouterBody = {
  6:   aiProvider?: unknown;
  7:   base64Image?: unknown;
  8:   mimeType?: unknown;
  9:   customPrompt?: unknown;
 10:   traceId?: unknown;
 11:   imageUrl?: unknown;
 12: };
 13: 
 14: const MULTIPART_MAX_BYTES = 12 * 1024 * 1024;
 15: 
 16: class HttpError extends Error {
 17:   constructor(public readonly statusCode: number, message: string) {
 18:     super(message);
 19:   }
 20: }
 21: 
 22: function normalizeAiProvider(v: unknown): 'openai' | 'google' | null {
 23:   if (typeof v !== 'string') return null;
 24:   const trimmed = v.trim().toLowerCase();
 25:   if (trimmed === 'openai') return 'openai';
 26:   if (trimmed === 'google' || trimmed === 'vision' || trimmed === 'google-vision') return 'google';
 27:   return null;
 28: }
 29: 
 30: function pickTraceId(req: Request, body?: any): string {
 31: 
 32:   const fromMiddleware = (req as any)?.traceId;
 33:   if (typeof fromMiddleware === 'string' && fromMiddleware.trim()) return fromMiddleware.trim();
 34: 
 35:   const fromHeader = req.headers['x-trace-id'];
 36:   if (typeof fromHeader === 'string' && fromHeader.trim()) return fromHeader.trim();
 37: 
 38:   const bodyTrace = body?.traceId ?? body?.trace_id ?? body?.TraceId;
 39:   if (typeof bodyTrace === 'string' && bodyTrace.trim()) return bodyTrace.trim();
 40: 
 41: 
 42:   return 'router-trace';
 43: }
 44: 
 45: function requireEnv(name: string): string {
 46:   const v = (process.env[name] ?? '').trim().replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '');
 47:   if (!v) throw new HttpError(500, `Server misconfigured: missing ${name}`);
 48:   return v;
 49: }
 50: 
 51: @Injectable()
 52: export class ImageScanService {
 53:   parseJsonBody(raw: any): RouterBody {
 54:     // In Nest, JSON is already parsed, but keep parity with the Functions parser:
 55:     if (!raw) return {};
 56:     if (typeof raw === 'object') return raw as any;
 57:     if (typeof raw === 'string') {
 58:       try {
 59:         return JSON.parse(raw);
 60:       } catch {
 61:         throw new HttpError(400, 'Invalid JSON body');
 62:       }
 63:     }
 64:     throw new HttpError(400, 'Invalid request body');
 65:   }
 66: 
 67:   /**
 68:    * Multipart parse (Busboy) similar to Functions version.
 69:    * - Supports file fields: "image" or "file"
 70:    * - Supports imageUrl-only payloads
 71:    * - Enforces 12MB limit
 72:    */
 73:   async parseMultipart(req: Request): Promise<RouterBody> {
 74:     return await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 75:       const bb = Busboy({
 76:         headers: req.headers as any,
 77:         limits: { files: 1, fileSize: MULTIPART_MAX_BYTES },
 78:       });
 79: 
 80:       const fields: Record<string, string> = {};
 81:       let fileBuffer: Buffer | null = null;
 82:       let fileMime: string | null = null;
 83:       let sawFile = false;
 84: 
 85:       bb.on('field', (name, value) => {
 86:         fields[name] = value;
 87:       });
 88: 
 89:       bb.on('file', (name, file, info) => {
 90:         if (name !== 'image' && name !== 'file') {
 91:           file.resume();
 92:           return;
 93:         }
 94: 
 95:         sawFile = true;
 96:         fileMime = info?.mimeType || 'application/octet-stream';
 97: 
 98:         const chunks: Buffer[] = [];
 99:         let total = 0;
100: 
101:         file.on('data', (d: Buffer) => {
102:           total += d.length;
103:           if (total > MULTIPART_MAX_BYTES) {
104:             reject(new HttpError(413, 'Uploaded file is too large'));
105:             file.resume();
106:             return;
107:           }
108:           chunks.push(d);
109:         });
110: 
111:         file.on('limit', () => reject(new HttpError(413, 'Uploaded file is too large')));
112:         file.on('end', () => {
113:           fileBuffer = Buffer.concat(chunks);
114:         });
115:         file.on('error', () => reject(new HttpError(400, 'Failed to read uploaded file')));
116:       });
117: 
118:       bb.on('error', () => reject(new HttpError(400, 'Invalid multipart/form-data payload')));
119: 
120:       bb.on('finish', () => {
121:         const aiProvider = fields.aiProvider?.trim?.() || undefined;
122:         const traceId = fields.traceId?.trim?.() || undefined;
123:         const customPrompt = fields.customPrompt || undefined;
124: 
125:         const imageUrl =
126:           fields.imageUrl?.trim?.() && fields.imageUrl.trim().length > 0
127:             ? fields.imageUrl.trim()
128:             : undefined;
129: 
130:         const mimeType = (fields.mimeType || fileMime || 'image/png').trim();
131: 
132:         if (!aiProvider) {
133:           reject(new HttpError(400, 'Missing aiProvider. Expected "openai" or "google".'));
134:           return;
135:         }
136: 
137:         if (!imageUrl && !sawFile) {
138:           reject(
139:             new HttpError(
140:               400,
141:               'Either imageUrl or an image file field ("image" or "file") is required',
142:             ),
143:           );
144:           return;
145:         }
146: 
147:         const body: RouterBody = { aiProvider, traceId, customPrompt, imageUrl, mimeType };
148: 
149: 
150:         if (!imageUrl && fileBuffer && fileBuffer.length > 0) {
151:           const b64 = fileBuffer.toString('base64');
152:           body.base64Image = `data:${mimeType};base64,${b64}`;
153:         }
154: 
155:         resolve(body);
156:       });
157: 
158: 
159: 
160:       const raw: any = (req as any).rawBody ?? (req as any).body;
161:       if (Buffer.isBuffer(raw)) bb.end(raw);
162:       else req.pipe(bb);
163:     });
164:   }
165: 
166: 
167: 
168: 
169: 
170: 
171:   async run(rawBody: RouterBody, req: Request): Promise<{
172:     model: string;
173:     aiProvider: 'openai' | 'google';
174:     latency_ms: number;
175:     translation: string;
176:     traceId: string;
177:   }> {
178:     const body = this.parseJsonBody(rawBody);
179:     const aiProvider = normalizeAiProvider(body.aiProvider);
180:     if (!aiProvider) {
181:       throw new HttpError(400, 'Invalid aiProvider. Expected "openai" or "google".');
182:     }
183: 
184:     const traceId =
185:       typeof body.traceId === 'string' && body.traceId.trim()
186:         ? body.traceId.trim()
187:         : pickTraceId(req, body);
188: 
189:     if (aiProvider === 'openai') {
190:       const out = await this.runOpenaiImageScanCore({ body, traceId });
191:       return {
192:         model: out.model,
193:         aiProvider,
194:         latency_ms: out.latency_ms,
195:         translation: out.translation,
196:         traceId: out.traceId,
197:       };
198:     }
199: 
200:     const out = await this.runGoogleVisionOcrCore({ body, traceId });
201:     return {
202:       model: out.model,
203:       aiProvider,
204:       latency_ms: out.latency_ms,
205:       translation: out.translation,
206:       traceId: out.traceId,
207:     };
208:   }
209: 
210: 
211: 
212: 
213: 
214: 
215:   private async runOpenaiImageScanCore(args: { body: RouterBody; traceId: string }) {
216:     const { body, traceId } = args;
217: 
218:     const apiKey = requireEnv('OPENAI_KIA_API_KEY');
219:     const model = (process.env.OPENAI_IMAGE_SCAN_MODEL || 'gpt-4.1-mini').trim();
220: 
221:     const imageUrl =
222:       typeof body.imageUrl === 'string' && body.imageUrl.trim().length > 0 ? body.imageUrl.trim() : null;
223: 
224:     const base64Image =
225:       typeof body.base64Image === 'string' && body.base64Image.trim().length > 0
226:         ? body.base64Image.trim()
227:         : null;
228: 
229:     if (!imageUrl && !base64Image) {
230:       throw new HttpError(400, 'Either imageUrl or base64Image is required');
231:     }
232: 
233:     const customPrompt =
234:       typeof body.customPrompt === 'string' && body.customPrompt.trim()
235:         ? body.customPrompt.trim()
236:         : 'Extract the text from this image. Return only the extracted text.';
237: 
238: 
239:     const endpoint = (process.env.OPENAI_API_URL || 'https://api.openai.com/v1/responses').trim();
240: 
241:     const inputImage = imageUrl ?? base64Image;
242: 
243:     const requestPayload = {
244:       model,
245:       input: [
246:         {
247:           role: 'user',
248:           content: [
249:             { type: 'input_text', text: customPrompt },
250: 
251:             { type: 'input_image', image_url: inputImage },
252:           ],
253:         },
254:       ],
255:     };
256: 
257:     const started = Date.now();
258:     const res = await fetch(endpoint, {
259:       method: 'POST',
260:       headers: {
261:         'content-type': 'application/json',
262:         authorization: `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
263:         'x-trace-id': traceId,
264:       },
265:       body: JSON.stringify(requestPayload),
266:     });
267:     const latency_ms = Date.now() - started;
268: 
269:     if (!res.ok) {
270:       const text = await res.text().catch(() => '');
271:       throw new Error(`Upstream openai error: HTTP ${res.status} ${res.statusText} ${text}`);
272:     }
273: 
274:     const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
275: 
276:     // Same “buildAnswer” logic used in translationChat
277:     let translation =
278:       json?.output_text?.trim?.() ||
279:       json?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.trim?.() ||
280:       '';
281: 
282:     if (!translation && Array.isArray(json?.output)) {
283:       const parts: string[] = [];
284:       for (const item of json.output) {
285:         for (const block of item?.content || []) {
286:           if (typeof block?.text?.value === 'string') parts.push(block.text.value);
287:           else if (typeof block?.text === 'string') parts.push(block.text);
288:         }
289:       }
290:       translation = parts.join('').trim();
291:     }
292: 
293:     return { model, latency_ms, translation: translation || '', traceId };
294:   }
295: 
296:   /**
297:    * Google Vision OCR core (replaces functions/src/providers/googleVisionOcrScan).
298:    * Contract matches:
299:    * { model, latency_ms, translation, traceId }
300:    */
301:   private async runGoogleVisionOcrCore(args: { body: RouterBody; traceId: string }) {
302:     const { body, traceId } = args;
303: 
304:     const apiKey = requireEnv('GOOGLE_API_KEY');
305:     const model = 'google-vision-ocr';
306: 
307:     const imageUrl =
308:       typeof body.imageUrl === 'string' && body.imageUrl.trim().length > 0 ? body.imageUrl.trim() : null;
309: 
310:     const base64Image =
311:       typeof body.base64Image === 'string' && body.base64Image.trim().length > 0
312:         ? body.base64Image.trim()
313:         : null;
314: 
315:     if (!imageUrl && !base64Image) {
316:       throw new HttpError(400, 'Either imageUrl or base64Image is required');
317:     }
318: 
319: 
320: 
321: 
322:     let image: any;
323:     if (imageUrl) {
324:       image = { source: { imageUri: imageUrl } };
325:     } else {
326:       const b64 = base64Image!.startsWith('data:')
327:         ? base64Image!.split('base64,')[1] || ''
328:         : base64Image!;
329:       if (!b64) throw new HttpError(400, 'Invalid base64Image');
330:       image = { content: b64 };
331:     }
332: 
333:     const started = Date.now();
334:     const res = await fetch(`https://vision.googleapis.com/v1/images:annotate?key=${encodeURIComponent(apiKey)}`, {
335:       method: 'POST',
336:       headers: {
337:         'content-type': 'application/json',
338:         'x-trace-id': traceId,
339:       },
340:       body: JSON.stringify({
341:         requests: [
342:           {
343:             image,
344:             features: [{ type: 'TEXT_DETECTION' }],
345:           },
346:         ],
347:       }),
348:     });
349:     const latency_ms = Date.now() - started;
350: 
351:     if (!res.ok) {
352:       const text = await res.text().catch(() => '');
353:       throw new Error(`Upstream google vision error: HTTP ${res.status} ${res.statusText} ${text}`);
354:     }
355: 
356:     const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
357:     const resp = json?.responses?.[0] ?? {};
358:     const translation =
359:       (resp?.fullTextAnnotation?.text as string | undefined) ||
360:       (resp?.textAnnotations?.[0]?.description as string | undefined) ||
361:       '';
362: 
363:     return { model, latency_ms, translation: (translation || '').trim(), traceId };
364:   }
365: }
``````
