``````typescript
  1: import {
  2:   Controller,
  3:   Delete,
  4:   Get,
  5:   Patch,
  6:   Post,
  7:   Put,
  8:   Req,
  9:   Res,
 10:   UseGuards,
 11:   Options,
 12:   HttpCode,
 13: } from '@nestjs/common';
 14: import type { Request, Response } from 'express';
 15: import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
 16: 
 17: import { BearerTokenGuard } from '../auth/bearer-token.guard';
 18: import { PromptConfigService } from './promptConfig.service';
 19: 
 20: const JSON_HEADERS = { 'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8' };
 21: 
 22: const CORS_HEADERS = {
 23:   'access-control-allow-origin': '*',
 24:   'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE,OPTIONS',
 25:   'access-control-allow-headers': 'content-type, authorization, x-trace-id',
 26: };
 27: 
 28: type ErrorBody = { error: string };
 29: 
 30: @Controller('api/kiaspora')
 31: @UseGuards(BearerTokenGuard)
 32: export class PromptConfigController {
 33:   constructor(private readonly svc: PromptConfigService) {}
 34: 
 35:   private getTraceId(req: Request) {
 36:     return (req.header('x-trace-id') || req.header('X-Trace-Id') || '').trim() || randomUUID();
 37:   }
 38: 
 39:   private setup(res: Response, traceId: string) {
 40:     res.set(CORS_HEADERS);
 41:     res.set(JSON_HEADERS);
 42:     res.setHeader('X-Trace-Id', traceId);
 43:     res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-store');
 44:   }
 45: 
 46:   private send(res: Response, status: number, body: any) {
 47:     return res.status(status).send(JSON.stringify(body));
 48:   }
 49: 
 50:   private sendError(res: Response, status: number, message: string) {
 51:     const body: ErrorBody = { error: message };
 52:     return this.send(res, status, body);
 53:   }
 54: 
 55:   @Options('promptConfig')
 56:   @HttpCode(204)
 57:   async options(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
 58:     const traceId = this.getTraceId(req);
 59:     res.set(CORS_HEADERS);
 60:     res.setHeader('X-Trace-Id', traceId);
 61:     return res.send('');
 62:   }
 63: 
 64:   @Get('promptConfig')
 65:   async get(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
 66:     const traceId = this.getTraceId(req);
 67:     this.setup(res, traceId);
 68: 
 69:     try {
 70:       const out = await this.svc.handleGet(req);
 71:       return this.send(res, 200, out);
 72:     } catch (e: any) {
 73:       const status = typeof e?.status === 'number' ? e.status : 500;
 74:       const msg =
 75:         typeof e?.message === 'string' && e.message.trim() ? e.message : 'Internal server error';
 76:       return this.sendError(res, status, msg);
 77:     }
 78:   }
 79: 
 80:   @Post('promptConfig')
 81:   async post(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
 82:     const traceId = this.getTraceId(req);
 83:     this.setup(res, traceId);
 84: 
 85:     try {
 86:       const out = await this.svc.handlePost(req.body);
 87:       return this.send(res, 201, out);
 88:     } catch (e: any) {
 89:       const status = typeof e?.status === 'number' ? e.status : 500;
 90:       const msg =
 91:         typeof e?.message === 'string' && e.message.trim() ? e.message : 'Internal server error';
 92:       return this.sendError(res, status, msg);
 93:     }
 94:   }
 95: 
 96:   @Put('promptConfig')
 97:   async put(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
 98:     const traceId = this.getTraceId(req);
 99:     this.setup(res, traceId);
100: 
101:     try {
102:       const out = await this.svc.handleUpdate(req);
103:       return this.send(res, 200, out);
104:     } catch (e: any) {
105:       const status = typeof e?.status === 'number' ? e.status : 500;
106:       const msg =
107:         typeof e?.message === 'string' && e.message.trim() ? e.message : 'Internal server error';
108:       return this.sendError(res, status, msg);
109:     }
110:   }
111: 
112:   @Patch('promptConfig')
113:   async patch(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
114:     const traceId = this.getTraceId(req);
115:     this.setup(res, traceId);
116: 
117:     try {
118:       const out = await this.svc.handleUpdate(req);
119:       return this.send(res, 200, out);
120:     } catch (e: any) {
121:       const status = typeof e?.status === 'number' ? e.status : 500;
122:       const msg =
123:         typeof e?.message === 'string' && e.message.trim() ? e.message : 'Internal server error';
124:       return this.sendError(res, status, msg);
125:     }
126:   }
127: 
128:   @Delete('promptConfig')
129:   async del(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
130:     const traceId = this.getTraceId(req);
131:     this.setup(res, traceId);
132: 
133:     try {
134:       const out = await this.svc.handleDelete(req);
135:       return this.send(res, 200, out);
136:     } catch (e: any) {
137:       const status = typeof e?.status === 'number' ? e.status : 500;
138:       const msg =
139:         typeof e?.message === 'string' && e.message.trim() ? e.message : 'Internal server error';
140:       return this.sendError(res, status, msg);
141:     }
142:   }
143: }

## File: src/kiaspora/promptConfig.service.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
  2: import type { Request } from 'express';
  3: import { Pool } from 'pg';
  4: 
  5: class HttpError extends Error {
  6:   constructor(public readonly status: number, message: string) {
  7:     super(message);
  8:   }
  9: }
 10: 
 11: function isNonEmptyString(x: any): x is string {
 12:   return typeof x === 'string' && x.trim().length > 0;
 13: }
 14: 
 15: function requireEnv(name: string): string {
 16:   const v = (process.env[name] ?? '').trim().replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '');
 17:   if (!v) throw new HttpError(500, `Server misconfigured: missing ${name}`);
 18:   return v;
 19: }
 20: 
 21: function parsePromptName(promptNameRaw: any, allowDefault = true) {
 22:   const promptName = (promptNameRaw || (allowDefault ? 'global' : '')).toString().trim().toLowerCase();
 23:   if (!promptName) throw new HttpError(400, '"prompt_name" is required');
 24:   return promptName;
 25: }
 26: 
 27: function parseIncludeGlobal(req: Request) {
 28:   const raw = (req.query.includeGlobal ?? '0').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
 29:   return raw === '1' || raw === 'true' || raw === 'yes';
 30: }
 31: 
 32: function parsePromptId(req: Request, body: any) {
 33:   const q: any = req.query || {};
 34:   const pid = (q.prompt_id || q.promptId || body?.prompt_id || body?.promptId || '').toString().trim();
 35:   if (!pid) throw new HttpError(400, '"prompt_id" is required');
 36:   return pid;
 37: }
 38: 
 39: function pick(body: any, ...keys: string[]) {
 40:   for (const k of keys) {
 41:     const v = body?.[k];
 42:     if (v !== undefined) return v;
 43:   }
 44:   return undefined;
 45: }
 46: 
 47: 
 48: 
 49: 
 50: 
 51: let pool: Pool | null = null;
 52: 
 53: function getPool(): Pool {
 54:   if (pool) return pool;
 55: 
 56:   const NEON_USER = requireEnv('NEON_USER');
 57:   const NEON_PASSWORD = requireEnv('NEON_PASSWORD');
 58:   const NEON_DB = requireEnv('NEON_DB');
 59:   const NEON_HOST = requireEnv('NEON_HOST');
 60: 
 61:   const QUERY_FLAGS = "sslmode=verify-full";
 62: 
 63:   const connectionString = `postgresql://${NEON_USER}:${encodeURIComponent(
 64:     NEON_PASSWORD,
 65:   )}@${NEON_HOST}/${NEON_DB}?${QUERY_FLAGS}`;
 66: 
 67:   pool = new Pool({
 68:     ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: false },
 69:     connectionString,
 70:     max: 3,
 71:     idleTimeoutMillis: 10_000,
 72:     connectionTimeoutMillis: 5_000,
 73:   });
 74: 
 75:   return pool;
 76: }
 77: 
 78: @Injectable()
 79: export class PromptConfigService {
 80:   async handleGet(req: Request) {
 81:     const q: any = req.query || {};
 82:     const promptNameRaw = q.prompt_name || q.promptName || q.scope;
 83:     const promptName = promptNameRaw ? parsePromptName(promptNameRaw, false) : null;
 84:     const includeGlobal = parseIncludeGlobal(req);
 85: 
 86:     const promptNames: string[] = [];
 87:     if (promptName) {
 88:       if (promptName !== 'global' && includeGlobal) promptNames.push('global');
 89:       promptNames.push(promptName);
 90:     }
 91: 
 92:     const uniquePromptNames = [...new Set(promptNames)];
 93: 
 94: 
 95:     if (uniquePromptNames.length > 30) {
 96:       throw new HttpError(400, 'Too many prompt names requested');
 97:     }
 98: 
 99:     const client = await getPool().connect();
100:     try {
101:       const hasFilter = uniquePromptNames.length > 0;
102: 
103:       const res = hasFilter
104:         ? await client.query(
105:             `
106:             SELECT
107:               prompt_id, prompt_name, prompt, enabled, updated_at
108:             FROM prompt_config
109:             WHERE enabled = true
110:               AND prompt_name = ANY($1::text[])
111:             ORDER BY prompt_name, updated_at DESC
112:             `,
113:             [uniquePromptNames],
114:           )
115:         : await client.query(
116:             `
117:             SELECT
118:               prompt_id, prompt_name, prompt, enabled, updated_at
119:             FROM prompt_config
120:             WHERE enabled = true
121:             ORDER BY prompt_name, updated_at DESC
122:             `,
123:           );
124: 
125:       return {
126:         server_time: new Date().toISOString(),
127:         prompt_name: promptName,
128:         includeGlobal: includeGlobal && promptName !== 'global',
129:         prompts: res.rows || [],
130:       };
131:     } finally {
132:       client.release();
133:     }
134:   }
135: 
136:   async handlePost(rawBody: any) {
137:     const body = rawBody ?? {};
138: 
139:     const promptNameRaw = pick(body, 'prompt_name', 'promptName', 'scope');
140:     const promptName = parsePromptName(promptNameRaw, false);
141: 
142:     const prompt = (pick(body, 'prompt') ?? '').toString();
143:     const enabled = body.enabled === undefined ? true : Boolean(body.enabled);
144: 
145:     if (!prompt.trim()) throw new HttpError(400, '"prompt" is required');
146: 
147:     const client = await getPool().connect();
148:     try {
149:       const res = await client.query(
150:         `
151:         INSERT INTO prompt_config (prompt_name, prompt, enabled)
152:         VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
153:         RETURNING prompt_id, prompt_name, prompt, enabled, created_at, updated_at
154:         `,
155:         [promptName, prompt, enabled],
156:       );
157: 
158:       return { created: res.rows[0], server_time: new Date().toISOString() };
159:     } finally {
160:       client.release();
161:     }
162:   }
163: 
164:   async handleUpdate(req: Request) {
165:     const body = req.body ?? {};
166:     const prompt_id = parsePromptId(req, body);
167: 
168: 
169:     const prompt =
170:       body.prompt === undefined ? undefined : (body.prompt ?? '').toString();
171:     const enabled =
172:       body.enabled === undefined ? undefined : Boolean(body.enabled);
173: 
174:     const rawPromptNameProvided =
175:       body.prompt_name !== undefined || body.promptName !== undefined || body.scope !== undefined;
176: 
177:     const rawPromptName = rawPromptNameProvided
178:       ? pick(body, 'prompt_name', 'promptName', 'scope')
179:       : undefined;
180: 
181:     const promptName =
182:       rawPromptName === undefined ? undefined : parsePromptName(rawPromptName, false);
183: 
184:     if (prompt !== undefined && !prompt.trim()) {
185:       throw new HttpError(400, '"prompt" cannot be empty');
186:     }
187: 
188: 
189:     const sets: string[] = [];
190:     const vals: any[] = [];
191:     let i = 1;
192: 
193:     if (prompt !== undefined) {
194:       sets.push(`prompt = $${i++}`);
195:       vals.push(prompt);
196:     }
197: 
198:     if (promptName !== undefined) {
199:       sets.push(`prompt_name = $${i++}`);
200:       vals.push(promptName);
201:     }
202: 
203:     if (enabled !== undefined) {
204:       sets.push(`enabled = $${i++}`);
205:       vals.push(enabled);
206:     }
207: 
208:     if (sets.length === 0) {
209:       throw new HttpError(400, 'No fields to update (provide prompt, prompt_name, or enabled)');
210:     }
211: 
212:     vals.push(prompt_id);
213: 
214:     const client = await getPool().connect();
215:     try {
216:       const res = await client.query(
217:         `
218:         UPDATE prompt_config
219:         SET ${sets.join(', ')}
220:         WHERE prompt_id = $${i}
221:         RETURNING prompt_id, prompt_name, prompt, enabled, created_at, updated_at
222:         `,
223:         vals,
224:       );
225: 
226:       if (!res.rows[0]) throw new HttpError(404, 'prompt_id not found');
227: 
228:       return { updated: res.rows[0], server_time: new Date().toISOString() };
229:     } finally {
230:       client.release();
231:     }
232:   }
233: 
234:   async handleDelete(req: Request) {
235:     const body = req.body ?? {};
236:     const prompt_id = parsePromptId(req, body);
237: 
238:     const client = await getPool().connect();
239:     try {
240: 
241:       const res = await client.query(
242:         `
243:         UPDATE prompt_config
244:         SET enabled = false
245:         WHERE prompt_id = $1
246:         RETURNING prompt_id, prompt_name, prompt, enabled, created_at, updated_at
247:         `,
248:         [prompt_id],
249:       );
250: 
251:       if (!res.rows[0]) throw new HttpError(404, 'prompt_id not found');
252: 
253:       return { deleted: res.rows[0], server_time: new Date().toISOString() };
254:     } finally {
255:       client.release();
256:     }
257:   }
258: }
``````

## File: src/kiaspora/speechToText.controller.ts
``````typescript
 1: import { Body, Controller, HttpCode, Options, Post, Req, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';
 2: import type { Request } from 'express';
 3: 
 4: import { BearerTokenGuard } from '../auth/bearer-token.guard';
 5: import { SpeechToTextService } from './speechToText.service';
 6: 
 7: type RouterBody = {
 8:   languageCode?: unknown;
 9:   altLanguageCodes?: unknown;
10:   languageCodes?: unknown;
11:   model?: unknown;
12:   mimeType?: unknown;
13:   base64Audio?: unknown;
14:   sampleRateHertz?: unknown;
15:   traceId?: unknown;
16: };
17: 
18: function isMultipart(req: Request): boolean {
19:   const ct = (req.headers['content-type'] || '').toString();
20:   return ct.toLowerCase().includes('multipart/form-data');
21: }
22: 
23: @Controller('api/kiaspora')
24: @UseGuards(BearerTokenGuard)
25: export class SpeechToTextController {
26:   constructor(private readonly svc: SpeechToTextService) {}
27: 
28: 
29:   @Options('speechToText')
30:   @HttpCode(204)
31:   async options(): Promise<void> {
32:     return;
33:   }
34: 
35:   @Post('speechToText')
36:   async handler(@Req() req: Request, @Body() body: RouterBody) {
37: 
38:     const parsed: { body: RouterBody; audioBase64?: string } = isMultipart(req)
39:       ? await this.svc.parseMultipart(req)
40:       : { body: this.svc.parseJsonBody(body), audioBase64: undefined };
41: 
42: 
43:     return this.svc.run(parsed.body, req, parsed.audioBase64);
44:   }
45: }
``````

## File: src/kiaspora/speechToText.service.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
  2: import type { Request } from 'express';
  3: import Busboy from 'busboy';
  4: 
  5: import { runGoogleSpeechToTextCore } from './googleSpeechToText';
  6: 
  7: type RouterBody = {
  8:   languageCode?: unknown;
  9:   altLanguageCodes?: unknown;
 10:   languageCodes?: unknown;
 11:   model?: unknown;
 12:   mimeType?: unknown;
 13:   base64Audio?: unknown;
 14:   sampleRateHertz?: unknown;
 15:   traceId?: unknown;
 16: };
 17: 
 18: const MULTIPART_MAX_BYTES = 20 * 1024 * 1024;
 19: 
 20: class HttpError extends Error {
 21:   constructor(public readonly statusCode: number, message: string) {
 22:     super(message);
 23:   }
 24: }
 25: 
 26: function pickTraceId(req: Request, body?: any): string {
 27: 
 28:   const fromMiddleware = (req as any)?.traceId;
 29:   if (typeof fromMiddleware === 'string' && fromMiddleware.trim()) return fromMiddleware.trim();
 30: 
 31:   const fromHeader = req.headers['x-trace-id'];
 32:   if (typeof fromHeader === 'string' && fromHeader.trim()) return fromHeader.trim();
 33: 
 34:   const bodyTrace = body?.traceId ?? body?.trace_id ?? body?.TraceId;
 35:   if (typeof bodyTrace === 'string' && bodyTrace.trim()) return bodyTrace.trim();
 36: 
 37: 
 38:   return 'stt-trace';
 39: }
 40: 
 41: @Injectable()
 42: export class SpeechToTextService {
 43:   parseJsonBody(raw: any): RouterBody {
 44: 
 45:     if (!raw) return {};
 46:     if (typeof raw === 'object') return raw as any;
 47:     if (typeof raw === 'string') {
 48:       try {
 49:         return JSON.parse(raw);
 50:       } catch {
 51:         throw new HttpError(400, 'Invalid JSON body');
 52:       }
 53:     }
 54:     throw new HttpError(400, 'Invalid request body');
 55:   }
 56: 
 57: 
 58: 
 59: 
 60: 
 61: 
 62: 
 63:   async parseMultipart(req: Request): Promise<{ body: RouterBody; audioBase64?: string }> {
 64:     return await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 65:       const bb = Busboy({
 66:         headers: req.headers as any,
 67:         limits: { files: 1, fileSize: MULTIPART_MAX_BYTES },
 68:       });
 69: 
 70:       const fields: Record<string, string> = {};
 71:       let fileBuffer: Buffer | null = null;
 72:       let fileMime: string | null = null;
 73:       let sawFile = false;
 74: 
 75:       bb.on('field', (name, value) => {
 76:         fields[name] = value;
 77:       });
 78: 
 79:       bb.on('file', (name, file, info) => {
 80:         if (name !== 'audio' && name !== 'file') {
 81:           file.resume();
 82:           return;
 83:         }
 84: 
 85:         sawFile = true;
 86:         fileMime = info?.mimeType || 'application/octet-stream';
 87: 
 88:         const chunks: Buffer[] = [];
 89:         let total = 0;
 90: 
 91:         file.on('data', (d: Buffer) => {
 92:           total += d.length;
 93:           if (total > MULTIPART_MAX_BYTES) {
 94:             reject(new HttpError(413, 'Uploaded audio is too large'));
 95:             file.resume();
 96:             return;
 97:           }
 98:           chunks.push(d);
 99:         });
100: 
101:         file.on('limit', () => reject(new HttpError(413, 'Uploaded audio is too large')));
102:         file.on('end', () => {
103:           fileBuffer = Buffer.concat(chunks);
104:         });
105:         file.on('error', () => reject(new HttpError(400, 'Failed to read uploaded audio')));
106:       });
107: 
108:       bb.on('error', () => reject(new HttpError(400, 'Invalid multipart/form-data payload')));
109: 
110:       bb.on('finish', () => {
111:         if (!sawFile || !fileBuffer || fileBuffer.length === 0) {
112:           reject(new HttpError(400, 'Missing audio file field ("audio" or "file")'));
113:           return;
114:         }
115: 
116:         const traceId = fields.traceId?.trim?.() || undefined;
117:         const languageCode = fields.languageCode?.trim?.() || undefined;
118:         const altLanguageCodes = fields.altLanguageCodes?.trim?.() || undefined;
119:         const languageCodes = fields.languageCodes?.trim?.() || undefined;
120:         const model = fields.model?.trim?.() || undefined;
121:         const mimeType = (fields.mimeType || fileMime || 'audio/wav').trim();
122:         const sampleRateHertzRaw = fields.sampleRateHertz?.trim?.();
123: 
124:         const body: RouterBody = {
125:           traceId,
126:           languageCode,
127:           altLanguageCodes,
128:           languageCodes,
129:           model,
130:           mimeType,
131:         };
132: 
133:         if (sampleRateHertzRaw && /^\d+$/.test(sampleRateHertzRaw)) {
134:           body.sampleRateHertz = Number(sampleRateHertzRaw);
135:         }
136: 
137:         const b64 = fileBuffer.toString('base64');
138:         resolve({
139:           body,
140:           audioBase64: `data:${mimeType};base64,${b64}`,
141:         });
142:       });
143: 
144: 
145:       const raw: any = (req as any).rawBody ?? (req as any).body;
146:       if (Buffer.isBuffer(raw)) bb.end(raw);
147:       else req.pipe(bb);
148:     });
149:   }
150: 
151: 
152: 
153: 
154: 
155: 
156:   async run(rawBody: RouterBody, req: Request, audioBase64?: string): Promise<{
157:     model: string;
158:     aiProvider: 'google';
159:     latency_ms: number;
160:     text: string;
161:     traceId: string;
162:   }> {
163:     const body = this.parseJsonBody(rawBody);
164: 
165:     const traceId =
166:       typeof body.traceId === 'string' && body.traceId.trim()
167:         ? body.traceId.trim()
168:         : pickTraceId(req, body);
169: 
170:     const out = await runGoogleSpeechToTextCore({
171:       body,
172:       traceId,
173:       audioBase64: audioBase64 ?? (typeof body.base64Audio === 'string' ? (body.base64Audio as any) : undefined),
174:     });
175: 
176:     return {
177:       model: out.model,
178:       aiProvider: 'google',
179:       latency_ms: out.latency_ms,
180:       text: out.text,
181:       traceId: out.traceId,
182:     };
183:   }
184: }
``````

 1: import { Body, Controller, Post, Req, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';

 3: import { randomUUID } from 'crypto';
 4: 
 5: import { BearerTokenGuard } from '../auth/bearer-token.guard';
 6: import { TranslationChatService } from './translationChat.service';
 7: 
 8: type TranslationChatBody = {
 9: 
10:   aiProvider?: string | null;
11: 
12:   provider?: string | null;
13: 
14:   messages?: unknown;
15:   sourceLang?: unknown;
16:   targetLang?: unknown;
17:   context?: unknown;
18:   traceId?: unknown;
19:   customPrompt?: unknown;
20: };
21: 
22: function getTraceId(req: Request, body?: any): string {
23: 
24:   const fromMiddleware = (req as any)?.traceId;
25:   if (typeof fromMiddleware === 'string' && fromMiddleware.trim()) {
26:     return fromMiddleware.trim();
27:   }
28: 
29:   const fromHeader = req.headers['x-trace-id'];
30:   if (typeof fromHeader === 'string' && fromHeader.trim()) return fromHeader.trim();
31: 
32:   const bodyTrace = body?.traceId ?? body?.trace_id ?? body?.TraceId;
33:   if (typeof bodyTrace === 'string' && bodyTrace.trim()) return bodyTrace.trim();
34: 
35:   return randomUUID();
36: }
37: 
38: @Controller('api/kiaspora')
39: @UseGuards(BearerTokenGuard)
40: export class TranslationChatController {

45:   async handler(@Req() req: Request, @Body() body: TranslationChatBody) {
46:     const traceId = getTraceId(req, body);
47: 
48: 
49: 
50:     return this.svc.run(body, traceId);
51:   }
52: }

## File: src/kiaspora/translationChat.service.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
  2: 
  3: type ChatProvider = 'deepseek' | 'openai' | 'groq';
  4: 
  5: type TranslationChatBody = {
  6:   aiProvider?: string | null;
  7:   provider?: string | null;
  8:   messages?: unknown;
  9:   sourceLang?: unknown;
 10:   targetLang?: unknown;
 11:   context?: unknown;
 12:   traceId?: unknown;
 13:   customPrompt?: unknown;
 14: };
 15: 
 16: class HttpError extends Error {
 17:   constructor(public readonly statusCode: number, message: string) {
 18:     super(message);
 19:   }
 20: }
 21: 
 22: const OPENAI_BASE_URL =
 23:   process.env.OPENAI_API_URL || 'https://api.openai.com/v1/responses';
 24: const DEEPSEEK_BASE_URL =
 25:   process.env.DEEPSEEK_URL || 'https://api.deepseek.com/chat/completions';
 26: 
 27: const OPENAI_MODEL = process.env.OPENAI_PROMPT_MODEL || 'gpt-5-nano';
 28: const DEEPSEEK_MODEL = process.env.DEEPSEEK_PROMPT_MODEL || 'deepseek-chat';
 29: 
 30: function requireEnv(name: string, forMsg: string): string {
 31:   const v = (process.env[name] ?? '').trim().replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '');
 32:   if (!v) throw new HttpError(500, `Server misconfigured: missing ${name} for ${forMsg}`);
 33:   return v;
 34: }
 35: 
 36: function parseBody(raw: any): TranslationChatBody {
 37:   // Nest will already parse JSON, but keep parity with the Cloud Function:
 38:   if (!raw) return {};
 39:   if (typeof raw === 'object') return raw as any;
 40:   if (typeof raw === 'string') {
 41:     try {
 42:       return JSON.parse(raw);
 43:     } catch {
 44:       throw new HttpError(400, 'Invalid JSON body');
 45:     }
 46:   }
 47:   throw new HttpError(400, 'Invalid request body');
 48: }
 49: 
 50: function validateBody(payload: TranslationChatBody) {
 51:   const {
 52:     aiProvider: rawAiProvider,
 53:     provider: rawProvider,
 54:     messages,
 55:     traceId = '',
 56:     customPrompt = '',
 57:     sourceLang = '',
 58:     targetLang = '',
 59:     context = '',
 60:   } = payload;
 61: 
 62:   if (!Array.isArray(messages) || messages.length === 0) {
 63:     throw new HttpError(400, 'messages[] required');
 64:   }
 65: 
 66:   // provider selection precedence:
 67:   // 1) provider (new)
 68:   // 2) aiProvider (legacy)
 69:   const raw = rawProvider ?? rawAiProvider ?? null;
 70: 
 71:   let aiProvider: ChatProvider = 'deepseek';
 72:   if (raw != null) {
 73:     if (typeof raw !== 'string') {
 74:       throw new HttpError(400, "Invalid provider. Use 'openai', 'deepseek', or 'groq'.");
 75:     }
 76:     const lower = raw.toLowerCase().trim();
 77:     if (lower !== 'openai' && lower !== 'deepseek' && lower !== 'groq') {
 78:       throw new HttpError(400, "Invalid provider. Use 'openai', 'deepseek', or 'groq'.");
 79:     }
 80:     aiProvider = lower as ChatProvider;
 81:   }
 82: 
 83:   return {
 84:     aiProvider,
 85:     messages: messages as any[],
 86:     sourceLang,
 87:     targetLang,
 88:     context,
 89:     traceId: typeof traceId === 'string' ? traceId : '',
 90:     customPrompt: typeof customPrompt === 'string' ? customPrompt : '',
 91:   };
 92: }
 93: 
 94: function buildAnswer(body: any): string {
 95:   let answer =
 96:     body?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.trim?.() ||
 97:     body?.output_text ||
 98:     '';
 99: 
100:   if (!answer && Array.isArray(body?.output)) {
101:     const parts: string[] = [];
102:     for (const item of body.output) {
103:       for (const block of item?.content || []) {
104:         if (typeof block?.text?.value === 'string') parts.push(block.text.value);
105:         else if (typeof block?.text === 'string') parts.push(block.text);
106:       }
107:     }
108:     answer = parts.join('').trim();
109:   }
110: 
111:   return answer || '';
112: }
113: 
114: @Injectable()
115: export class TranslationChatService {
116:   async run(rawBody: TranslationChatBody, traceId: string) {
117:     const startedAll = Date.now();
118: 
119:     try {
120:       const validated = validateBody(parseBody(rawBody));
121:       const { aiProvider, messages, customPrompt } = validated;
122: 
123:       const response = await this.callProvider({
124:         aiProvider,
125:         messages,
126:         customPrompt,
127:         traceId,
128:       });
129: 
130:       // Keep EXACT output shape
131:       return response;
132:     } catch (e: any) {
133:       // Keep error semantics compatible:
134:       // - preserve 400/405 style errors as HttpError where possible
135:       // - otherwise 500
136:       // NOTE: If your project uses a global exception filter, this can be simplified.
137:       const statusCode = e instanceof HttpError ? e.statusCode : 500;
138:       const msg = String(e?.message ?? e);
139: 
140:       // Cloud Function used sendError(); without that infra here, throw HttpError
141:       // and let Nest global filters map it.
142:       throw new HttpError(statusCode, msg);
143:     } finally {
144:       const durationMs = Date.now() - startedAll;
145:       // Keep log payload similar (no firebase uid here)
146:       console.log(
147:         JSON.stringify({
148:           level: 'info',
149:           msg: 'translationChat',
150:           traceId,
151:           durationMs,
152:         }),
153:       );
154:     }
155:   }
156: 
157:   private async callProvider(args: {
158:     aiProvider: ChatProvider;
159:     messages: any[];
160:     customPrompt: string;
161:     traceId: string;
162:   }) {
163:     const { aiProvider, messages, customPrompt, traceId } = args;
164: 
165: 
166:     if (aiProvider === 'groq') {
167: 
168: 
169: 
170: 
171:       const joined = messages
172:         .map((m) => {
173:           const role = typeof m?.role === 'string' ? m.role : 'user';
174:           const content =
175:             typeof m?.content === 'string'
176:               ? m.content
177:               : typeof m?.content?.text === 'string'
178:                 ? m.content.text
179:                 : '';
180:           return content ? `${role}: ${content}` : '';
181:         })
182:         .filter(Boolean)
183:         .join('\n\n');
184: 
185:       const groqKey = requireEnv('GROQ_API_KEY', 'groq provider');
186: 
187:       const started = Date.now();
188:       const res = await fetch('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions', {
189:         method: 'POST',
190:         headers: {
191:           'content-type': 'application/json',
192:           authorization: `Bearer ${groqKey}`,
193:         },
194:         body: JSON.stringify({
195:           model: process.env.GROQ_MODEL || 'llama-3.1-8b-instant',
196:           messages: [
197:             ...(customPrompt?.trim()
198:               ? [{ role: 'system', content: customPrompt.trim() }]
199:               : []),
200:             { role: 'user', content: joined },
201:           ],
202:         }),
203:       });
204:       const latency_ms = Date.now() - started;
205: 
206:       if (!res.ok) {
207:         const text = await res.text().catch(() => '');
208:         throw new Error(`Upstream groq error: HTTP ${res.status} ${res.statusText} ${text}`);
209:       }
210: 
211:       const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
212:       const answer = buildAnswer(json);
213: 
214:       return { reply: answer || '', traceId, aiProvider: 'groq', latency_ms };
215:     }
216: 
217: 
218:     let baseUrl: string;
219:     let apiKey: string;
220:     let model: string;
221: 
222:     if (aiProvider === 'openai') {
223:       apiKey = requireEnv('OPENAI_KIA_API_KEY', 'openai provider');
224:       model = process.env.OPENAI_PROMPT_MODEL || OPENAI_MODEL;
225:       baseUrl = OPENAI_BASE_URL;
226:       if (!model) {
227:         throw new HttpError(500, 'Server misconfigured: missing OPENAI_PROMPT_MODEL for openai provider');
228:       }
229:     } else {
230:       apiKey = requireEnv('DEEPSEEK_API_KEY', 'deepseek provider');
231:       model = process.env.DEEPSEEK_PROMPT_MODEL || DEEPSEEK_MODEL;
232:       baseUrl = DEEPSEEK_BASE_URL;
233:     }
234: 
235:     const trimmedPrompt = (customPrompt ?? '').trim();
236:     const systemMessages = trimmedPrompt
237:       ? [{ role: 'system', content: trimmedPrompt }]
238:       : [];
239: 
240:     const payloadMessages = [...systemMessages, ...messages];
241: 
242:     const requestPayload =
243:       aiProvider === 'openai'
244:         ? { model, input: payloadMessages }
245:         : { model, messages: payloadMessages };
246: 
247:     const started = Date.now();
248:     const res = await fetch(baseUrl, {
249:       method: 'POST',
250:       headers: {
251:         'content-type': 'application/json',
252:         authorization: `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
253:       },
254:       body: JSON.stringify(requestPayload),
255:     });
256:     const latency_ms = Date.now() - started;
257: 
258:     if (!res.ok) {
259:       const text = await res.text().catch(() => '');
260:       throw new Error(
261:         `Upstream ${aiProvider} error: HTTP ${res.status} ${res.statusText} ${text}`,
262:       );
263:     }
264: 
265:     const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
266:     const answer = buildAnswer(json);
267: 
268:     return { reply: answer || '', traceId, aiProvider, latency_ms };
269:   }
270: }
``````

## File: src/kiaspora/translationRouter.controller.ts
``````typescript
 1: import { Controller, Post, Req, Res, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';
 2: import type { Request, Response } from 'express';
 3: import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
 4: import { BearerTokenGuard } from '../auth/bearer-token.guard';
 5: import { TranslationRouterService } from './translationRouter.service';
 6: 
 7: const JSON_HEADERS = { 'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8' };
 8: const CORS_HEADERS = {
 9:   'access-control-allow-origin': '*',
10:   'access-control-allow-methods': 'POST,OPTIONS',
11:   'access-control-allow-headers': 'content-type, authorization, x-trace-id',
12: };
13: 
14: type ErrorBody = { error: string; code?: string; traceId?: string; details?: any };
15: 
16: @Controller('api/kiaspora')
17: @UseGuards(BearerTokenGuard)
18: export class TranslationRouterController {
19:   constructor(private readonly svc: TranslationRouterService) {}
20: 
21:   @Post('translationRouter')
22:   async translationRouter(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
23:     const traceId = (req.header('x-trace-id') || req.header('X-Trace-Id'))?.trim() || randomUUID();
24: 
25: 
26:     if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {
27:       res.set(CORS_HEADERS);
28:       res.setHeader('x-trace-id', traceId);
29:       return res.status(204).send('');
30:     }
31: 
32:     res.set(CORS_HEADERS);
33:     res.set(JSON_HEADERS);
34:     res.setHeader('x-trace-id', traceId);
35:     res.setHeader('cache-control', 'no-store');
36: 
37:     try {
38:       const out = await this.svc.handle(req.body ?? {}, traceId);
39:       return res.status(200).send(JSON.stringify(out));
40:     } catch (e: any) {
41:       const status = typeof e?.status === 'number' ? e.status : 500;
42:       const body: ErrorBody = {
43:         error: typeof e?.message === 'string' && e.message.trim() ? e.message : 'Internal server error',
44:         ...(e?.code ? { code: e.code } : {}),
45:         traceId,
46:         ...(e?.details !== undefined ? { details: e.details } : {}),
47:       };
48:       return res.status(status).send(JSON.stringify(body));
49:     }
50:   }
51: }
``````

23: 
24: ## Description
25: 
26: [Nest](https://github.com/nestjs/nest) framework TypeScript starter repository.
27: 
28: ## Project setup
29: 
30: ```bash
31: $ pnpm install
32: ```
33: 
34: ## Compile and run the project
35: 
36: ```bash
37: # development
38: $ pnpm run start
39: 
40: # watch mode
41: $ pnpm run start:dev
42: 
43: # production mode
44: $ pnpm run start:prod
45: ```
46: 
47: ## Run tests
48: 
49: ```bash
50: # unit tests
51: $ pnpm run test
52: 
53: # e2e tests
54: $ pnpm run test:e2e
55: 
56: # test coverage
57: $ pnpm run test:cov
58: ```
59: 
60: ## Deployment
61: 
62: When you're ready to deploy your NestJS application to production, there are some key steps you can take to ensure it runs as efficiently as possible. Check out the [deployment documentation](https://docs.nestjs.com/deployment) for more information.
63: 
64: If you are looking for a cloud-based platform to deploy your NestJS application, check out [Mau](https://mau.nestjs.com), our official platform for deploying NestJS applications on AWS. Mau makes deployment straightforward and fast, requiring just a few simple steps:
65: 
66: ```bash
67: $ pnpm install -g @nestjs/mau
68: $ mau deploy
69: ```
70: 
71: With Mau, you can deploy your application in just a few clicks, allowing you to focus on building features rather than managing infrastructure.
72: 
73: ## Resources
74: 
75: Check out a few resources that may come in handy when working with NestJS:
76: 
77: - Visit the [NestJS Documentation](https://docs.nestjs.com) to learn more about the framework.
78: - For questions and support, please visit our [Discord channel](https://discord.gg/G7Qnnhy).
79: - To dive deeper and get more hands-on experience, check out our official video [courses](https://courses.nestjs.com/).
80: - Deploy your application to AWS with the help of [NestJS Mau](https://mau.nestjs.com) in just a few clicks.
81: - Visualize your application graph and interact with the NestJS application in real-time using [NestJS Devtools](https://devtools.nestjs.com).
82: - Need help with your project (part-time to full-time)? Check out our official [enterprise support](https://enterprise.nestjs.com).
83: - To stay in the loop and get updates, follow us on [X](https://x.com/nestframework) and [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/company/nestjs).
84: - Looking for a job, or have a job to offer? Check out our official [Jobs board](https://jobs.nestjs.com).
85: 
86: ## Support
87: 
88: Nest is an MIT-licensed open source project. It can grow thanks to the sponsors and support by the amazing backers. If you'd like to join them, please [read more here](https://docs.nestjs.com/support).
89: 
90: ## Stay in touch
91: 
92: - Author - [Kamil Myśliwiec](https://twitter.com/kammysliwiec)
93: - Website - [https://nestjs.com](https://nestjs.com/)
94: - Twitter - [@nestframework](https://twitter.com/nestframework)
95: 
96: ## License
97: 
98: Nest is [MIT licensed](https://github.com/nestjs/nest/blob/master/LICENSE).
``````

## File: src/justus/titleDetail.controller.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { Controller, Get, Query, Req, Res, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';
  2: import type { Request, Response } from 'express';
  3: import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
  4: import { BearerTokenGuard } from '../auth/bearer-token.guard';
  5: 
  6: const JSON_HEADERS = { 'content-type': 'application/json' };
  7: const CORS_HEADERS = {
  8:   'access-control-allow-origin': '*',
  9:   'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET,OPTIONS',
 10:   'access-control-allow-headers': 'content-type, authorization, x-trace-id',
 11: };
 12: 
 13: type TitleDetailInfo = {
 14:   title: string;
 15:   year: string;
 16:   rated: string;
 17:   released: string;
 18:   runtime: string;
 19:   genre: string;
 20:   director: string;
 21:   writers: string;
 22:   actors: string;
 23:   plot: string;
 24:   language: string;
 25:   country: string;
 26:   poster: string;
 27:   imdbId: string;
 28: };
 29: 
 30: function makeError({
 31:   source,
 32:   message,
 33:   code,
 34:   details,
 35: }: {
 36:   source: string;
 37:   message: string;
 38:   code?: any;
 39:   details?: any;
 40: }) {
 41:   const out: any = { source, message };
 42:   if (code !== undefined && code !== null) out.code = code;
 43:   if (details !== undefined && details !== null) out.details = details;
 44:   return out;
 45: }
 46: 
 47: function truncate(s: any, n = 800) {
 48:   if (typeof s !== 'string') return s;
 49:   return s.length > n ? `${s.slice(0, n)}…` : s;
 50: }
 51: 
 52: function extractErrMessage(err: any) {
 53:   if (!err) return 'unknown error';
 54:   if (typeof err.message === 'string' && err.message.trim()) return err.message;
 55:   return String(err);
 56: }
 57: 
 58: function stringifyError(err: any) {
 59:   try {
 60:     return {
 61:       message: err?.message ? String(err.message) : String(err),
 62:       name: err?.name ?? null,
 63:       stack: err?.stack ?? null,
 64:       cause: err?.cause ? stringifyError(err.cause) : null,
 65:     };
 66:   } catch {
 67:     return { message: String(err) };
 68:   }
 69: }
 70: 
 71: function cleanText(value: any): string {
 72:   const text = String(value ?? '').trim();
 73:   return text === 'N/A' ? '' : text;
 74: }
 75: 
 76: function parseRuntimeMinutes(runtime: any): string {
 77:   const text = cleanText(runtime);
 78:   if (!text) return '';
 79:   const m = text.match(/(\d+)\s*min/i);
 80:   return m ? m[1] : '';
 81: }
 82: 
 83: function firstCommaValue(value: any): string {
 84:   const text = cleanText(value);
 85:   if (!text) return '';
 86:   const first = text.split(',')[0];
 87:   return String(first ?? '').trim();
 88: }
 89: 
 90: function toTitleDetailInfo(omdb: any, imdbId: string): TitleDetailInfo {
 91:   const resolvedImdbId = cleanText(omdb?.imdbID) || imdbId;
 92:   return {
 93:     title: cleanText(omdb?.Title),
 94:     year: cleanText(omdb?.Year),
 95:     rated: cleanText(omdb?.Rated),
 96:     released: cleanText(omdb?.Released),
 97:     runtime: parseRuntimeMinutes(omdb?.Runtime),
 98:     genre: cleanText(omdb?.Genre),
 99:     director: cleanText(omdb?.Director),
100:     writers: cleanText(omdb?.Writer),
101:     actors: cleanText(omdb?.Actors),
102:     plot: cleanText(omdb?.Plot),
103:     language: firstCommaValue(omdb?.Language),
104:     country: firstCommaValue(omdb?.Country),
105:     poster: cleanText(omdb?.Poster),
106:     imdbId: resolvedImdbId,
107:   };
108: }
109: 
110: function hasPartialInfo(info: TitleDetailInfo) {
111:   return Object.values(info).some((v) => !String(v || '').trim());
112: }
113: 
114: function hasRequiredTitleYear(info: TitleDetailInfo) {
115:   return Boolean(String(info.title || '').trim()) && Boolean(String(info.year || '').trim());
116: }
117: 
118: function hasAnyInfoValue(info: TitleDetailInfo) {
119:   return Boolean(
120:     String(info.title || '').trim() ||
121:       String(info.year || '').trim() ||
122:       String(info.rated || '').trim() ||
123:       String(info.released || '').trim() ||
124:       String(info.runtime || '').trim() ||
125:       String(info.genre || '').trim() ||
126:       String(info.director || '').trim() ||
127:       String(info.writers || '').trim() ||
128:       String(info.actors || '').trim() ||
129:       String(info.plot || '').trim() ||
130:       String(info.language || '').trim() ||
131:       String(info.country || '').trim() ||
132:       String(info.poster || '').trim(),
133:   );
134: }
135: 
136: function toTitleDetailInfoFromFallback(raw: any, imdbId: string): TitleDetailInfo {
137:   const runtimeRaw = cleanText(raw?.runtime);
138:   const runtime = /^\d+$/.test(runtimeRaw) ? runtimeRaw : parseRuntimeMinutes(runtimeRaw);
139: 
140:   return {
141:     title: cleanText(raw?.title),
142:     year: cleanText(raw?.year),
143:     rated: cleanText(raw?.rated),
144:     released: cleanText(raw?.released),
145:     runtime,
146:     genre: cleanText(raw?.genre),
147:     director: cleanText(raw?.director),
148:     writers: cleanText(raw?.writers),
149:     actors: cleanText(raw?.actors),
150:     plot: cleanText(raw?.plot),
151:     language: cleanText(raw?.language),
152:     country: cleanText(raw?.country),
153:     poster: cleanText(raw?.poster),
154:     imdbId: cleanText(raw?.imdbId) || imdbId,
155:   };
156: }
157: 
158: function buildLocalBaseUrl(req: Request) {
159:   const proto =
160:     (req.header('x-forwarded-proto') || '').split(',')[0]?.trim() || req.protocol || 'http';
161:   const host =
162:     (req.header('x-forwarded-host') || '').split(',')[0]?.trim() ||
163:     req.get('host') ||
164:     req.headers.host ||
165:     '';
166:   return host ? `${proto}://${host}` : '';
167: }
168: 
169: @Controller('api/justus')
170: @UseGuards(BearerTokenGuard)
171: export class TitleDetailController {
172:   @Get('titleDetail')
173:   async titleDetail(
174:     @Req() req: Request,
175:     @Res() res: Response,
176:     @Query('imdbId') imdbIdRaw: string | undefined,
177:   ) {
178:     const traceId =
179:       (req.header('x-trace-id') || req.header('X-Trace-Id'))?.trim() || randomUUID();
180: 
181:     const imdbId = String(imdbIdRaw ?? '').trim();
182:     const baseInfo: TitleDetailInfo = {
183:       title: '',
184:       year: '',
185:       rated: '',
186:       released: '',
187:       runtime: '',
188:       genre: '',
189:       director: '',
190:       writers: '',
191:       actors: '',
192:       plot: '',
193:       language: '',
194:       country: '',
195:       poster: '',
196:       imdbId,
197:     };
198: 
199:     if (!/^tt\d+$/.test(imdbId)) {
200:       const body = {
201:         requestId: traceId,
202:         statusCode: 400,
203:         dataSource: 'imdb',
204:         imdbId,
205:         info: baseInfo,
206:         errors: [
207:           makeError({
208:             source: 'input',
209:             message: 'Invalid imdbId (expected tt123...)',
210:             code: 'INVALID_IMDB_ID',
211:           }),
212:         ],
213:         traceId,
214:       };
215: 
216:       res.setHeader('x-trace-id', traceId);
217:       return res
218:         .status(400)
219:         .set({ ...JSON_HEADERS, ...CORS_HEADERS })
220:         .send(JSON.stringify(body));
221:     }
222: 
223:     const apiKey = process.env.OMDB_API_KEY;
224:     const omdbErrors: any[] = [];
225:     let omdbInfo = baseInfo;
226:     let omdbStatus = 502;
227:     let shouldFallback = false;
228: 
229:     if (!apiKey) {
230:       shouldFallback = true;
231:       omdbErrors.push(
232:         makeError({
233:           source: 'config',
234:           message: 'Missing OMDB_API_KEY',
235:           code: 'MISSING_OMDB_API_KEY',
236:         }),
237:       );
238:     } else {
239:       const omdbParams = new URLSearchParams({ apikey: apiKey, i: imdbId });
240:       const omdbUrl = `http://www.omdbapi.com/?${omdbParams.toString()}`;
241: 
242:       try {
243:         const upstream = await fetch(omdbUrl, {
244:           method: 'GET',
245:           headers: { 'x-trace-id': traceId },
246:         });
247: 
248:         omdbStatus = upstream.status;
249:         const raw = await upstream.text().catch(() => '');
250:         let parsed: any = {};
251: 
252:         try {
253:           parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
254:         } catch (err) {
255:           shouldFallback = true;
256:           omdbErrors.push(
257:             makeError({
258:               source: 'omdb',
259:               message: `OMDb JSON parse failed: ${extractErrMessage(err)}`,
260:               code: 'OMDB_JSON_PARSE_FAILED',
261:               details: { bodySnippet: truncate(raw) },
262:             }),
263:           );
264:         }
265: 
266:         if (!upstream.ok) {
267:           shouldFallback = true;
268:           omdbErrors.push(
269:             makeError({
270:               source: 'omdb',
271:               message: `OMDb HTTP ${upstream.status} ${upstream.statusText || ''}`.trim(),
272:               code: upstream.status,
273:               details: { bodySnippet: truncate(raw) },
274:             }),
275:           );
276:         } else if (String(parsed?.Response || '').toLowerCase() === 'false') {
277:           shouldFallback = true;
278:           omdbErrors.push(
279:             makeError({
280:               source: 'omdb',
281:               message: String(parsed?.Error || 'Title not found'),
282:               code: 'OMDB_NO_RESULTS',
283:             }),
284:           );
285:         } else {
286:           omdbInfo = toTitleDetailInfo(parsed, imdbId);
287:           if (!hasRequiredTitleYear(omdbInfo)) {
288:             shouldFallback = true;
289:             omdbErrors.push(
290:               makeError({
291:                 source: 'omdb',
292:                 message: 'OMDb missing required fields: title/year',
293:                 code: 'OMDB_MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS',
294:                 details: {
295:                   missingFields: [
296:                     ...(!String(omdbInfo.title || '').trim() ? ['title'] : []),
297:                     ...(!String(omdbInfo.year || '').trim() ? ['year'] : []),
298:                   ],
299:                 },
300:               }),
301:             );
302:           }
303:         }
304:       } catch (err) {
305:         shouldFallback = true;
306:         omdbErrors.push(
307:           makeError({
308:             source: 'omdb',
309:             message: `OMDb fetch failed: ${extractErrMessage(err)}`,
310:             code: 'OMDB_FETCH_FAILED',
311:             details: { error: stringifyError(err), omdbUrl },
312:           }),
313:         );
314:       }
315:     }
316: 
317:     if (!shouldFallback) {
318:       const statusCode = hasPartialInfo(omdbInfo) ? 206 : 200;
319:       const body = {
320:         requestId: traceId,
321:         statusCode,
322:         dataSource: 'imdb',
323:         imdbId,
324:         info: omdbInfo,
325:         errors: [],
326:         traceId,
327:       };
328: 
329:       res.setHeader('x-trace-id', traceId);
330:       return res
331:         .status(statusCode)
332:         .set({ ...JSON_HEADERS, ...CORS_HEADERS })
333:         .send(JSON.stringify(body));
334:     }
335: 
336: 
337:     const base = buildLocalBaseUrl(req);
338:     const fallbackErrors: any[] = [];
339:     let fallbackInfo = baseInfo;
340:     let fallbackStatus = 502;
341: 
342:     if (!base) {
343:       fallbackErrors.push(
344:         makeError({
345:           source: 'imdbDetailFallback',
346:           message: 'Cannot resolve local base URL for fallback',
347:           code: 'FALLBACK_BASE_URL_UNRESOLVED',
348:         }),
349:       );
350:     } else {
351:       const fallbackUrl = `${base.replace(/\/$/, '')}/api/parse/imdbDetail?imdbId=${encodeURIComponent(imdbId)}`;
352:       const authHeader = req.header('authorization') || req.header('Authorization');
353: 
354:       try {
355:         const fallbackResp = await fetch(fallbackUrl, {
356:           method: 'GET',
357:           headers: {
358:             ...(authHeader ? { authorization: authHeader } : {}),
359:             'x-trace-id': traceId,
360:           },
361:         });
362: 
363:         fallbackStatus = fallbackResp.status;
364:         const raw = await fallbackResp.text().catch(() => '');
365:         let parsed: any = {};
366: 
367:         try {
368:           parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
369:         } catch (err) {
370:           fallbackErrors.push(
371:             makeError({
372:               source: 'imdbDetailFallback',
373:               message: `Fallback JSON parse failed: ${extractErrMessage(err)}`,
374:               code: 'FALLBACK_JSON_PARSE_FAILED',
375:               details: { bodySnippet: truncate(raw), fallbackUrl },
376:             }),
377:           );
378:         }
379: 
380:         if (!fallbackResp.ok) {
381:           fallbackErrors.push(
382:             makeError({
383:               source: 'imdbDetailFallback',
384:               message: `Fallback HTTP ${fallbackResp.status} ${fallbackResp.statusText || ''}`.trim(),
385:               code: fallbackResp.status,
386:               details: { bodySnippet: truncate(raw), fallbackUrl },
387:             }),
388:           );
389:         }
390: 
391:         if (parsed?.info && typeof parsed.info === 'object') {
392:           fallbackInfo = toTitleDetailInfoFromFallback(parsed.info, imdbId);
393:         }
394: 
395:         if (Array.isArray(parsed?.errors) && parsed.errors.length > 0) {
396:           fallbackErrors.push(
397:             ...parsed.errors.map((msg: any) =>
398:               makeError({
399:                 source: 'imdbDetailFallback',
400:                 message: String(msg),
401:                 code: 'FALLBACK_PARTIAL',
402:               }),
403:             ),
404:           );
405:         }
406:       } catch (err) {
407:         fallbackErrors.push(
408:           makeError({
409:             source: 'imdbDetailFallback',
410:             message: `Fallback fetch failed: ${extractErrMessage(err)}`,
411:             code: 'FALLBACK_FETCH_FAILED',
412:             details: { error: stringifyError(err), fallbackUrl },
413:           }),
414:         );
415:       }
416:     }
417: 
418:     if (hasRequiredTitleYear(fallbackInfo)) {
419:       const statusCode = hasPartialInfo(fallbackInfo) ? 206 : 200;
420:       const body = {
421:         requestId: traceId,
422:         statusCode,
423:         dataSource: 'imdb',
424:         imdbId,
425:         info: fallbackInfo,
426:         errors: statusCode === 206 ? fallbackErrors : [],
427:         traceId,
428:       };
429: 
430:       res.setHeader('x-trace-id', traceId);
431:       return res
432:         .status(statusCode)
433:         .set({ ...JSON_HEADERS, ...CORS_HEADERS })
434:         .send(JSON.stringify(body));
435:     }
436: 
437:     const fallbackFailedStatus = hasAnyInfoValue(omdbInfo) ? 206 : omdbStatus >= 400 ? omdbStatus : 502;
438:     const fallbackFailedInfo = hasAnyInfoValue(omdbInfo) ? omdbInfo : baseInfo;
439:     const body = {
440:       requestId: traceId,
441:       statusCode: fallbackFailedStatus,
442:       dataSource: 'imdb',
443:       imdbId,
444:       info: fallbackFailedInfo,
445:       errors: [...omdbErrors, ...fallbackErrors],
446:       traceId,
447:     };
448: 
449:     res.setHeader('x-trace-id', traceId);
450:     return res
451:       .status(fallbackFailedStatus)
452:       .set({ ...JSON_HEADERS, ...CORS_HEADERS })
453:       .send(JSON.stringify(body));
454:   }
455: }
``````

## File: src/kiaspora/translationRouter.service.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
  2: 
  3: type Provider = 'deepseek' | 'groq' | 'openai';
  4: 
  5: type NormalizedRequest = {
  6:   provider: Provider | null;
  7:   sourceText: string;
  8:   sourceLang: string;
  9:   targetLang: string;
 10:   context: string | null;
 11:   customPrompt: string | null;
 12: };
 13: 
 14: type ProviderResult200 = {
 15:   translation: string;
 16:   detected_source_lang: string;
 17:   provider: Provider;
 18:   latency_ms: number;
 19:   raw_provider_meta: any;
 20: };
 21: 
 22: class HttpError extends Error {
 23:   constructor(
 24:     public readonly status: number,
 25:     message: string,
 26:     public readonly code?: string,
 27:     public readonly details?: any,
 28:   ) {
 29:     super(message);
 30:   }
 31: }
 32: 
 33: function isNonEmptyString(x: any): x is string {
 34:   return typeof x === 'string' && x.trim().length > 0;
 35: }
 36: 
 37: function pickFirstEnv(...names: string[]) {
 38:   for (const n of names) {
 39:     const v = process.env[n];
 40:     if (isNonEmptyString(v)) return v.trim();
 41:   }
 42:   return '';
 43: }
 44: 
 45: // Accept both camelCase and snake_case without breaking older clients
 46: function getBodyField(body: any, camel: string, snake: string) {
 47:   if (body && body[camel] !== undefined) return body[camel];
 48:   if (body && body[snake] !== undefined) return body[snake];
 49:   return undefined;
 50: }
 51: 
 52: function normalizeProvider(raw: any): Provider | null {
 53:   if (raw == null) return null;
 54:   if (typeof raw !== 'string') {
 55:     throw new HttpError(400, 'provider must be a string when provided', 'INVALID_PROVIDER');
 56:   }
 57:   const lower = raw.toLowerCase().trim();
 58:   if (lower !== 'deepseek' && lower !== 'groq' && lower !== 'openai') {
 59:     throw new HttpError(400, 'provider must be "deepseek", "groq", or "openai" when provided', 'INVALID_PROVIDER');
 60:   }
 61:   return lower;
 62: }
 63: 
 64: function mergeContext(rawContext: any, rawUserMessage: any): string | null {
 65:   const parts: string[] = [];
 66:   if (isNonEmptyString(rawContext)) parts.push(rawContext.trim());
 67:   if (isNonEmptyString(rawUserMessage)) parts.push(`userMessage: ${rawUserMessage.trim()}`);
 68:   const merged = parts.filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');
 69:   return merged.trim() ? merged : null;
 70: }
 71: 
 72: 
 73: 
 74: 
 75: 
 76: 
 77: 
 78: function toCanonicalTranslationJsonString(raw: string, sourceText: string): string {
 79:   const stripped = String(raw ?? '')
 80:     .trim()
 81:     .replace(/^```(?:json)?/i, '')
 82:     .replace(/```$/i, '')
 83:     .trim();
 84: 
 85:   // Try parse JSON as-is
 86:   try {
 87:     const obj = JSON.parse(stripped);
 88:     if (obj && typeof obj === 'object') {
 89: 
 90:       const out: any = { ...obj };
 91:       if (out.sourceText == null) out.sourceText = sourceText;
 92:       if (out.translatedText == null) out.translatedText = '';
 93:       if (out.sourcePronunciation == null) out.sourcePronunciation = '';
 94:       return JSON.stringify(out);
 95:     }
 96:   } catch {
 97:     // fall through
 98:   }
 99: 
100:   // Best-effort wrapper
101:   return JSON.stringify({
102:     sourceText,
103:     translatedText: stripped,
104:     sourcePronunciation: '',
105:   });
106: }
107: 
108: @Injectable()
109: export class TranslationRouterService {
110:   async handle(body: any, traceId: string): Promise<ProviderResult200> {
111:     const validated = this.validate(body);
112: 
113:     const requestPayload = {
114:       sourceText: validated.sourceText,
115:       sourceLang: validated.sourceLang,
116:       targetLang: validated.targetLang,
117:       context: validated.context,
118:       customPrompt: validated.customPrompt,
119:     };
120: 
121:     // Forced provider (no fallback) — matches Cloud Function behavior :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}
122:     if (validated.provider === 'deepseek') {
123:       try {
124:         return await this.callDeepSeek(requestPayload, traceId);
125:       } catch (err: any) {
126:         throw new HttpError(
127:           502,
128:           'DeepSeek translation is currently unavailable; please try again later',
129:           'DEEPSEEK_UNAVAILABLE',
130:           { message: String(err?.message ?? err) },
131:         );
132:       }
133:     }
134: 
135:     if (validated.provider === 'groq') {
136:       try {
137:         return await this.callGroq(requestPayload, traceId);
138:       } catch (err: any) {
139:         throw new HttpError(
140:           502,
141:           'Groq translation is currently unavailable; please try again later',
142:           'GROQ_UNAVAILABLE',
143:           { message: String(err?.message ?? err) },
144:         );
145:       }
146:     }
147: 
148:     if (validated.provider === 'openai') {
149:       try {
150:         return await this.callOpenAI(requestPayload, traceId);
151:       } catch (err: any) {
152:         throw new HttpError(
153:           502,
154:           'OpenAI translation is currently unavailable; please try again later',
155:           'OPENAI_UNAVAILABLE',
156:           { message: String(err?.message ?? err) },
157:         );
158:       }
159:     }
160: 
161: 
162:     try {
163:       return await this.callDeepSeek(requestPayload, traceId);
164:     } catch {
165: 
166:     }
167: 
168:     try {
169:       return await this.callGroq(requestPayload, traceId);
170:     } catch {
171: 
172:     }
173: 
174:     try {
175:       return await this.callOpenAI(requestPayload, traceId);
176:     } catch (err: any) {
177:       throw new HttpError(
178:         502,
179:         'Translation providers are currently unavailable; please try again later',
180:         'PROVIDERS_UNAVAILABLE',
181:         { message: String(err?.message ?? err) },
182:       );
183:     }
184:   }
185: 
186:   private validate(body: any): NormalizedRequest {
187: 
188:     const providerRaw = getBodyField(body, 'provider', 'provider');
189: 
190:     const sourceText = getBodyField(body, 'sourceText', 'source_text');
191:     const targetLang = getBodyField(body, 'targetLang', 'target_lang');
192:     const sourceLang = getBodyField(body, 'sourceLang', 'source_lang');
193: 
194:     const context = getBodyField(body, 'context', 'context');
195:     const userMessage = getBodyField(body, 'userMessage', 'user_message');
196:     const customPrompt = getBodyField(body, 'customPrompt', 'custom_prompt');
197: 
198:     if (!isNonEmptyString(sourceText)) {
199:       throw new HttpError(400, 'Missing required field: sourceText/source_text', 'MISSING_SOURCE_TEXT');
200:     }
201:     if (!isNonEmptyString(targetLang)) {
202:       throw new HttpError(400, 'Missing required field: targetLang/target_lang', 'MISSING_TARGET_LANG');
203:     }
204: 
205:     const normalizedProvider = normalizeProvider(providerRaw);
206: 
207: 
208:     const mergedContext = mergeContext(context, userMessage);
209: 
210:     return {
211:       provider: normalizedProvider,
212:       sourceText: sourceText.trim(),
213:       sourceLang: isNonEmptyString(sourceLang) ? sourceLang.trim() : 'auto',
214:       targetLang: targetLang.trim(),
215:       context: mergedContext,
216:       customPrompt: isNonEmptyString(customPrompt) ? customPrompt.trim() : null,
217:     };
218:   }
219: 
220: 
221: 
222:   private async callOpenAI(
223:     payload: { sourceText: string; sourceLang: string; targetLang: string; context: string | null; customPrompt: string | null },
224:     traceId: string,
225:   ): Promise<ProviderResult200> {
226: 
227:     const apiKey = pickFirstEnv(
228:       'OPENAI_KIA_API_KEY',
229:       'OPENAI_API_KEY',
230:       'OPENAI_KIASPORA_API_KEY',
231:     );
232: 
233:     if (!apiKey) {
234:       throw new HttpError(500, 'Missing OPENAI_KIA_API_KEY', 'MISSING_OPENAI_KIA_API_KEY');
235:     }
236: 
237:     const model = pickFirstEnv('OPENAI_TRANSLATION_MODEL') || 'gpt-4o-mini';
238: 
239:     const started = Date.now();
240: 
241:     const system = `You are a translation engine. Follow instructions exactly.`;
242:     const user = [
243:       payload.context ? `Context:\n${payload.context}` : null,
244:       `Source language: ${payload.sourceLang}`,
245:       `Target language: ${payload.targetLang}`,
246:       `Text:\n${payload.sourceText}`,
247:       payload.customPrompt ? `Output format rules:\n${payload.customPrompt}` : null,
248:     ]
249:       .filter(Boolean)
250:       .join('\n\n');
251: 
252:     const resp = await fetch('https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions', {
253:       method: 'POST',
254:       headers: {
255:         authorization: `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
256:         'content-type': 'application/json',
257:         'x-trace-id': traceId,
258:       },
259:       body: JSON.stringify({
260:         model,
261:         messages: [
262:           { role: 'system', content: system },
263:           { role: 'user', content: user },
264:         ],
265:         temperature: 0.2,
266:       }),
267:     });
268: 
269:     const latency_ms = Date.now() - started;
270:     const rawText = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
271: 
272:     let parsed: any = {};
273:     try {
274:       parsed = rawText ? JSON.parse(rawText) : {};
275:     } catch {
276:       // non-json upstream
277:     }
278: 
279:     if (!resp.ok) {
280:       throw new HttpError(502, `OpenAI HTTP ${resp.status} ${resp.statusText || ''}`.trim(), 'OPENAI_HTTP_ERROR', {
281:         status: resp.status,
282:         bodySnippet: rawText.slice(0, 800),
283:       });
284:     }
285: 
286:     const content = parsed?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content ?? '';
287:     const translation = toCanonicalTranslationJsonString(String(content), payload.sourceText);
288: 
289:     return {
290:       translation,
291:       detected_source_lang: payload.sourceLang || 'auto',
292:       provider: 'openai',
293:       latency_ms,
294:       raw_provider_meta: {
295:         model,
296:         usage: parsed?.usage ?? null,
297:         id: parsed?.id ?? null,
298:       },
299:     };
300:   }
301: 
302:   private async callDeepSeek(
303:     payload: { sourceText: string; sourceLang: string; targetLang: string; context: string | null; customPrompt: string | null },
304:     traceId: string,
305:   ): Promise<ProviderResult200> {
306:     const apiKey = pickFirstEnv('DEEPSEEK_API_KEY', 'DEEPSEEK_API_KEY');
307:     if (!apiKey) throw new HttpError(500, 'Missing DEEPSEEK_API_KEY', 'MISSING_DEEPSEEK_API_KEY');
308: 
309:     const model = pickFirstEnv('DEEPSEEK_TRANSLATION_MODEL') || 'deepseek-chat';
310:     const started = Date.now();
311: 
312:     const user = [
313:       payload.context ? `Context:\n${payload.context}` : null,
314:       `Source language: ${payload.sourceLang}`,
315:       `Target language: ${payload.targetLang}`,
316:       `Text:\n${payload.sourceText}`,
317:       payload.customPrompt ? `Output format rules:\n${payload.customPrompt}` : null,
318:     ]
319:       .filter(Boolean)
320:       .join('\n\n');
321: 
322:     const resp = await fetch('https://api.deepseek.com/chat/completions', {
323:       method: 'POST',
324:       headers: {
325:         authorization: `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
326:         'content-type': 'application/json',
327:         'x-trace-id': traceId,
328:       },
329:       body: JSON.stringify({
330:         model,
331:         messages: [{ role: 'user', content: user }],
332:         temperature: 0.2,
333:       }),
334:     });
335: 
336:     const latency_ms = Date.now() - started;
337:     const rawText = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
338:     let parsed: any = {};
339:     try {
340:       parsed = rawText ? JSON.parse(rawText) : {};
341:     } catch {}
342: 
343:     if (!resp.ok) {
344:       throw new HttpError(502, `DeepSeek HTTP ${resp.status} ${resp.statusText || ''}`.trim(), 'DEEPSEEK_HTTP_ERROR', {
345:         status: resp.status,
346:         bodySnippet: rawText.slice(0, 800),
347:       });
348:     }
349: 
350:     const content = parsed?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content ?? '';
351:     const translation = toCanonicalTranslationJsonString(String(content), payload.sourceText);
352: 
353:     return {
354:       translation,
355:       detected_source_lang: payload.sourceLang || 'auto',
356:       provider: 'deepseek',
357:       latency_ms,
358:       raw_provider_meta: { model, usage: parsed?.usage ?? null, id: parsed?.id ?? null },
359:     };
360:   }
361: 
362:   private async callGroq(
363:     payload: { sourceText: string; sourceLang: string; targetLang: string; context: string | null; customPrompt: string | null },
364:     traceId: string,
365:   ): Promise<ProviderResult200> {
366:     const apiKey = pickFirstEnv('GROQ_KIA_API_KEY', 'GROQ_API_KEY');
367:     if (!apiKey) throw new HttpError(500, 'Missing GROQ_KIA_API_KEY', 'MISSING_GROQ_KIA_API_KEY');
368: 
369:     const model = pickFirstEnv('GROQ_TRANSLATION_MODEL') || 'llama-3.1-8b-instant';
370:     const started = Date.now();
371: 
372:     const user = [
373:       payload.context ? `Context:\n${payload.context}` : null,
374:       `Source language: ${payload.sourceLang}`,
375:       `Target language: ${payload.targetLang}`,
376:       `Text:\n${payload.sourceText}`,
377:       payload.customPrompt ? `Output format rules:\n${payload.customPrompt}` : null,
378:     ]
379:       .filter(Boolean)
380:       .join('\n\n');
381: 
382:     const resp = await fetch('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions', {
383:       method: 'POST',
384:       headers: {
385:         authorization: `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
386:         'content-type': 'application/json',
387:         'x-trace-id': traceId,
388:       },
389:       body: JSON.stringify({
390:         model,
391:         messages: [{ role: 'user', content: user }],
392:         temperature: 0.2,
393:       }),
394:     });
395: 
396:     const latency_ms = Date.now() - started;
397:     const rawText = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
398:     let parsed: any = {};
399:     try {
400:       parsed = rawText ? JSON.parse(rawText) : {};
401:     } catch {}
402: 
403:     if (!resp.ok) {
404:       throw new HttpError(502, `Groq HTTP ${resp.status} ${resp.statusText || ''}`.trim(), 'GROQ_HTTP_ERROR', {
405:         status: resp.status,
406:         bodySnippet: rawText.slice(0, 800),
407:       });
408:     }
409: 
410:     const content = parsed?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content ?? '';
411:     const translation = toCanonicalTranslationJsonString(String(content), payload.sourceText);
412: 
413:     return {
414:       translation,
415:       detected_source_lang: payload.sourceLang || 'auto',
416:       provider: 'groq',
417:       latency_ms,
418:       raw_provider_meta: { model, usage: parsed?.usage ?? null, id: parsed?.id ?? null },
419:     };
420:   }
421: }
``````

## File: src/meta/meta.controller.ts

 1: import { Controller, Get } from '@nestjs/common';

 3: 
 4: @ApiTags('meta')
 5: @Controller()
 6: export class MetaController {
 7:   @Get('status')
 8:   @ApiOkResponse({
 9:     schema: {
10:       example: { ok: true, service: 'api', timestamp: '2026-02-15T00:00:00.000Z' },
11:     },
12:   })
13:   status() {

16:

18:   @ApiOkResponse({

21:     },
22:   })
23:   about() {

25:       name: 'api',
26:       description: 'NestJS service deployed on Railway',

28:     };
29:   }
30: }
