## File: src/asunder/llmBridge.service.ts
``````typescript
  1: import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
  2: import type { Request } from 'express';
  3: import Busboy from 'busboy';
  4: import * as fs from 'node:fs/promises';
  5: import * as path from 'node:path';
  6: import { inferMimeFromFilename, parseBase64DataUrl } from './attachment.util';
  7: 
  8: type ChatMessageRole = 'system' | 'developer' | 'user' | 'assistant' | 'tool';
  9: type ChatMessage = {
 10:   role: ChatMessageRole;
 11:   [key: string]: unknown;
 12: };
 13: 
 14: type PromptRef = {
 15:   id?: string;
 16:   version?: string;
 17: };
 18: 
 19: type RequestedAttachment = {
 20:   name: string;
 21:   file_data?: string;
 22:   path?: string;
 23: };
 24: 
 25: export type UploadedAttachment = {
 26:   filename: string;
 27:   mimeType: string;
 28:   buffer: Buffer;
 29:   size: number;
 30: };
 31: 
 32: type NormalizedAttachment = {
 33:   filename: string;
 34:   mimeType: string;
 35:   fileData: string;
 36:   size: number;
 37: };
 38: 
 39: const MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES = 20 * 1024 * 1024;
 40: const MAX_ATTACHMENTS = 5;
 41: const ALLOWED_ATTACHMENT_MIME_TYPES = new Set([
 42:   'text/plain',
 43:   'text/markdown',
 44:   'application/json',
 45:   'text/csv',
 46:   'application/pdf',
 47: ]);
 48: 
 49: export type LlmBridgeRequest = {
 50:   model?: string;
 51:   messages?: ChatMessage[];
 52:   input?: unknown;
 53:   attachments?: RequestedAttachment[];
 54:   prompt?: PromptRef;
 55:   promptId?: string;
 56:   promptVersion?: number;
 57:   stream?: boolean;
 58:   [key: string]: unknown;
 59: };
 60: 
 61: export class LlmBridgeError extends Error {
 62:   constructor(
 63:     readonly statusCode: number,
 64:     message: string,
 65:     readonly body?: unknown,
 66:   ) {
 67:     super(message);
 68:   }
 69: }
 70: 
 71: @Injectable()
 72: export class LlmBridgeService {
 73:   async parseMultipart(req: Request, traceId = 'llmBridge-trace'): Promise<{
 74:     body: LlmBridgeRequest;
 75:     attachments: UploadedAttachment[];
 76:   }> {
 77:     return await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 78:       let settled = false;
 79:       const rejectOnce = (error: LlmBridgeError) => {
 80:         if (settled) return;
 81:         settled = true;
 82:         reject(error);
 83:       };
 84: 
 85:       const bb = Busboy({
 86:         headers: req.headers as Busboy.BusboyConfig['headers'],
 87:         limits: {
 88:           files: MAX_ATTACHMENTS,
 89:           fileSize: MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES,
 90:         },
 91:       });
 92: 
 93:       const attachments: UploadedAttachment[] = [];
 94:       let payloadField: string | undefined;
 95: 
 96:       bb.on('field', (name, value) => {
 97:         if (name === 'payload') {
 98:           payloadField = value;
 99:         }
100:       });
101: 
102:       bb.on('file', (name, file, info) => {
103:         if (name !== 'file' && name !== 'files') {
104:           file.resume();
105:           return;
106:         }
107: 
108:         const filename = info.filename?.trim() || 'upload.bin';
109:         const mimeType = info.mimeType || 'application/octet-stream';
110:         const chunks: Buffer[] = [];
111:         let total = 0;
112: 
113:         file.on('data', (chunk: Buffer) => {
114:           total += chunk.length;
115:           if (total > MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES) {
116:             rejectOnce(this.invalidRequest(413, 'Uploaded file is too large'));
117:             file.resume();
118:             return;
119:           }
120: 
121:           chunks.push(chunk);
122:         });
123: 
124:         file.on('limit', () => rejectOnce(this.invalidRequest(413, 'Uploaded file is too large')));
125:         file.on('end', () => {
126:           if (settled) return;
127:           if (total === 0) {
128:             rejectOnce(this.invalidRequest(400, `Uploaded file "${filename}" is empty`));
129:             return;
130:           }
131: 
132:           attachments.push({
133:             filename,
134:             mimeType,
135:             buffer: Buffer.concat(chunks),
136:             size: total,
137:           });
138:         });
139:         file.on('error', () => rejectOnce(this.invalidRequest(400, 'Failed to read uploaded file')));
140:       });
141: 
142:       bb.on('filesLimit', () =>
143:         rejectOnce(this.invalidRequest(400, `Too many files. Maximum ${MAX_ATTACHMENTS} allowed`)),
144:       );
145:       bb.on('error', () => rejectOnce(this.invalidRequest(400, 'Invalid multipart/form-data payload')));
146:       bb.on('finish', () => {
147:         if (settled) return;
148:         if (payloadField == null || !payloadField.trim()) {
149:           rejectOnce(this.invalidRequest(400, 'Missing payload field'));
150:           return;
151:         }
152: 
153:         let parsedPayload: unknown;
154:         try {
155:           parsedPayload = JSON.parse(payloadField);
156:         } catch {
157:           rejectOnce(this.invalidRequest(400, 'payload must be valid JSON'));
158:           return;
159:         }
160: 
161:         console.info(
162:           `[asunder.llmBridge] parsed multipart trace=${traceId} attachments=${attachments.length}`,
163:         );
164:         settled = true;
165:         resolve({
166:           body: this.validateRequest(parsedPayload),
167:           attachments,
168:         });
169:       });
170: 
171:       const raw: unknown = (req as any).rawBody ?? (req as any).body;
172:       if (Buffer.isBuffer(raw)) bb.end(raw);
173:       else req.pipe(bb);
174:     });
175:   }
176: 
177:   async forward(
178:     requestBody: unknown,
179:     traceId: string,
180:     attachments: UploadedAttachment[] = [],
181:   ): Promise<globalThis.Response> {
182:     const body = this.validateRequest(requestBody);
183:     const config = this.getUpstreamConfig();
184:     const promptId = this.resolvePromptId(body.promptId, config.promptId);
185:     const promptVersion = this.resolvePromptVersion(body.promptVersion);
186:     const normalizedAttachments = await this.normalizeAttachments(
187:       body.attachments,
188:       attachments,
189:       traceId,
190:     );
191:     const upstreamBody = this.buildUpstreamPayload(
192:       body,
193:       config.defaultModel,
194:       promptId,
195:       promptVersion,
196:       normalizedAttachments,
197:     );
198: 
199:     const response = await this.fetchWithTimeout(
200:       config.url,
201:       {
202:         method: 'POST',
203:         headers: {
204:           authorization: `Bearer ${config.apiKey}`,
205:           'content-type': 'application/json',
206:           'x-trace-id': traceId,
207:         },
208:         body: JSON.stringify(upstreamBody),
209:       },
210:       60_000,
211:     );
212: 
213:     return response;
214:   }
215: 
216:   private validateRequest(value: unknown): LlmBridgeRequest {
217:     if (!value || typeof value !== 'object' || Array.isArray(value)) {
218:       throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'Request body must be a JSON object', {
219:         error: {
220:           message: 'Request body must be a JSON object',
221:           type: 'invalid_request_error',
222:         },
223:       });
224:     }
225: 
226:     const body = value as Record<string, unknown>;
227:     const hasPrompt = body.prompt != null;
228:     const hasMessages = body.messages != null;
229:     const hasInput = body.input != null;
230:     const hasAttachments = body.attachments != null;
231: 
232:     if (!hasPrompt && !hasMessages && !hasInput && !hasAttachments) {
233:       throw new LlmBridgeError(
234:         400,
235:         'One of prompt, messages, input, or attachments is required',
236:         {
237:           error: {
238:             message: 'One of prompt, messages, input, or attachments is required',
239:             type: 'invalid_request_error',
240:           },
241:         },
242:       );
243:     }
244: 
245:     if (body.model != null && (typeof body.model !== 'string' || !body.model.trim())) {
246:       throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'model must be a non-empty string when provided', {
247:         error: {
248:           message: 'model must be a non-empty string when provided',
249:           type: 'invalid_request_error',
250:         },
251:       });
252:     }
253: 
254:     if (hasPrompt) {
255:       if (!body.prompt || typeof body.prompt !== 'object' || Array.isArray(body.prompt)) {
256:         throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'prompt must be an object when provided', {
257:           error: {
258:             message: 'prompt must be an object when provided',
259:             type: 'invalid_request_error',
260:           },
261:         });
262:       }
263: 
264:       const prompt = body.prompt as Record<string, unknown>;
265:       if (prompt.id != null) {
266:         throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'prompt.id must not be provided by the client', {
267:           error: {
268:             message: 'prompt.id must not be provided by the client',
269:             type: 'invalid_request_error',
270:           },
271:         });
272:       }
273: 
274:       if (
275:         prompt.version != null &&
276:         typeof prompt.version !== 'string' &&
277:         typeof prompt.version !== 'number'
278:       ) {
279:         throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'prompt.version must be a string or number when provided', {
280:           error: {
281:             message: 'prompt.version must be a string or number when provided',
282:             type: 'invalid_request_error',
283:           },
284:         });
285:       }
286:     }
287: 
288:     if (
289:       body.promptId != null &&
290:       (typeof body.promptId !== 'string' || !body.promptId.trim())
291:     ) {
292:       throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'promptId must be a non-empty string when provided', {
293:         error: {
294:           message: 'promptId must be a non-empty string when provided',
295:           type: 'invalid_request_error',
296:         },
297:       });
298:     }
299: 
300:     if (
301:       body.promptVersion != null &&
302:       (!Number.isInteger(body.promptVersion) || Number(body.promptVersion) < 1)
303:     ) {
304:       throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'promptVersion must be a positive integer when provided', {
305:         error: {
306:           message: 'promptVersion must be a positive integer when provided',
307:           type: 'invalid_request_error',
308:         },
309:       });
310:     }
311: 
312:     if (hasMessages && !Array.isArray(body.messages)) {
313:       throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'messages must be an array when provided', {
314:         error: {
315:           message: 'messages must be an array when provided',
316:           type: 'invalid_request_error',
317:         },
318:       });
319:     }
320: 
321:     for (const message of ((body.messages as unknown[] | undefined) ?? [])) {
322:       if (!message || typeof message !== 'object' || Array.isArray(message)) {
323:         throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'each message must be an object', {
324:           error: {
325:             message: 'each message must be an object',
326:             type: 'invalid_request_error',
327:           },
328:         });
329:       }
330: 
331:       const role = (message as Record<string, unknown>).role;
332:       if (
333:         role !== 'system' &&
334:         role !== 'developer' &&
335:         role !== 'user' &&
336:         role !== 'assistant' &&
337:         role !== 'tool'
338:       ) {
339:         throw new LlmBridgeError(
340:           400,
341:           'message.role must be one of: system, developer, user, assistant, tool',
342:           {
343:             error: {
344:               message:
345:                 'message.role must be one of: system, developer, user, assistant, tool',
346:               type: 'invalid_request_error',
347:             },
348:           },
349:         );
350:       }
351:     }
352: 
353:     if (body.stream != null && typeof body.stream !== 'boolean') {
354:       throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'stream must be a boolean when provided', {
355:         error: {
356:           message: 'stream must be a boolean when provided',
357:           type: 'invalid_request_error',
358:         },
359:       });
360:     }
361: 
362:     if (hasAttachments && !Array.isArray(body.attachments)) {
363:       throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'attachments must be an array when provided', {
364:         error: {
365:           message: 'attachments must be an array when provided',
366:           type: 'invalid_request_error',
367:         },
368:       });
369:     }
370: 
371:     const attachments = (body.attachments as unknown[] | undefined) ?? [];
372:     if (attachments.length > MAX_ATTACHMENTS) {
373:       throw new LlmBridgeError(400, `Too many attachments. Maximum ${MAX_ATTACHMENTS} allowed`, {
374:         error: {
375:           message: `Too many attachments. Maximum ${MAX_ATTACHMENTS} allowed`,
376:           type: 'invalid_request_error',
377:         },
378:       });
379:     }
380: 
381:     for (const attachment of attachments) {
382:       if (!attachment || typeof attachment !== 'object' || Array.isArray(attachment)) {
383:         throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'each attachment must be an object', {
384:           error: {
385:             message: 'each attachment must be an object',
386:             type: 'invalid_request_error',
387:           },
388:         });
389:       }
390: 
391:       const record = attachment as Record<string, unknown>;
392:       if (typeof record.name !== 'string' || !record.name.trim()) {
393:         throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'attachment.name must be a non-empty string', {
394:           error: {
395:             message: 'attachment.name must be a non-empty string',
396:             type: 'invalid_request_error',
397:           },
398:         });
399:       }
400: 
401:       if (record.file_data != null && (typeof record.file_data !== 'string' || !record.file_data.trim())) {
402:         throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'attachment.file_data must be a non-empty string when provided', {
403:           error: {
404:             message: 'attachment.file_data must be a non-empty string when provided',
405:             type: 'invalid_request_error',
406:           },
407:         });
408:       }
409: 
410:       if (record.path != null && (typeof record.path !== 'string' || !record.path.trim())) {
411:         throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'attachment.path must be a non-empty string when provided', {
412:           error: {
413:             message: 'attachment.path must be a non-empty string when provided',
414:             type: 'invalid_request_error',
415:           },
416:         });
417:       }
418: 
419:       if (record.file_data == null && record.path == null) {
420:         throw new LlmBridgeError(
421:           400,
422:           `Attachment "${record.name}" must include either file_data or path`,
423:           {
424:             error: {
425:               message: `Attachment "${record.name}" must include either file_data or path`,
426:               type: 'invalid_request_error',
427:             },
428:           },
429:         );
430:       }
431:     }
432: 
433:     return body as LlmBridgeRequest;
434:   }
435: 
436:   private buildUpstreamPayload(
437:     body: LlmBridgeRequest,
438:     defaultModel?: string,
439:     promptId?: string,
440:     promptVersion?: string,
441:     attachments: NormalizedAttachment[] = [],
442:   ) {
443:     const payload: Record<string, unknown> = { ...body };
444:     delete payload.promptId;
445:     delete payload.promptVersion;
446:     delete payload.attachments;
447: 
448: 
449: 
450: 
451:     if (attachments.length > 0) {
452:       payload.input = this.buildResponsesInput(body, attachments);
453:       delete payload.messages;
454:     } else if (Array.isArray(payload.messages) && payload.input == null) {
455:       payload.input = this.buildResponsesInput(body, []);
456:       delete payload.messages;
457:     }
458: 
459: 
460: 
461:     if (Array.isArray(payload.tools)) {
462:       payload.tools = payload.tools.map((tool) => {
463:         if (!tool || typeof tool !== 'object' || Array.isArray(tool)) {
464:           return tool;
465:         }
466: 
467:         const toolRecord = tool as Record<string, unknown>;
468:         if (toolRecord.type !== 'function') {
469:           return toolRecord;
470:         }
471: 
472:         const fn = toolRecord.function;
473:         if (!fn || typeof fn !== 'object' || Array.isArray(fn)) {
474:           return toolRecord;
475:         }
476: 
477:         const fnRecord = fn as Record<string, unknown>;
478:         return {
479:           ...toolRecord,
480:           ...fnRecord,
481:           function: undefined,
482:         };
483:       });
484:     }
485: 
486: 
487:     if ((payload.model == null || payload.model === '') && defaultModel) {
488:       payload.model = defaultModel;
489:     }
490: 
491:     // gpt-5 family rejects temperature on the Responses API.
492:     if (typeof payload.model === 'string' && /^gpt-5/i.test(payload.model)) {
493:       delete payload.temperature;
494:     }
495: 
496: 
497:     if (payload.max_output_tokens == null && payload.max_tokens != null) {
498:       payload.max_output_tokens = payload.max_tokens;
499:       delete payload.max_tokens;
500:     }
501: 
502: 
503:     const shouldAttachPromptConfig =
504:       (payload.prompt && typeof payload.prompt === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.prompt)) ||
505:       promptId ||
506:       promptVersion;
507: 
508:     if (shouldAttachPromptConfig) {
509:       if (!payload.prompt || typeof payload.prompt !== 'object' || Array.isArray(payload.prompt)) {
510:         payload.prompt = {};
511:       }
512: 
513:       const prompt = payload.prompt as Record<string, unknown>;
514:       if (!promptId) {
515:         throw new LlmBridgeError(400, 'Missing prompt ID', {
516:           error: {
517:             message:
518:               'Missing prompt ID: neither request.promptId nor environment prompt ID is set',
519:             type: 'invalid_request_error',
520:           },
521:         });
522:       }
523: 
524:       prompt.id = promptId;
525:       if (promptVersion != null) {
526:         prompt.version = promptVersion;
527:       } else if (typeof prompt.version === 'number') {
528:         prompt.version = String(prompt.version);
529:       }
530:     }
531: 
532:     return payload;
533:   }
534: 
535:   private async normalizeAttachments(
536:     attachments: RequestedAttachment[] | undefined,
537:     uploadedAttachments: UploadedAttachment[],
538:     traceId: string,
539:   ): Promise<NormalizedAttachment[]> {
540:     const requestedAttachments = attachments ?? [];
541:     const totalCount = requestedAttachments.length + uploadedAttachments.length;
542: 
543:     if (totalCount === 0) return [];
544:     if (totalCount > MAX_ATTACHMENTS) {
545:       throw this.invalidRequest(400, `Too many attachments. Maximum ${MAX_ATTACHMENTS} allowed`);
546:     }
547: 
548:     const normalized: NormalizedAttachment[] = [];
549: 
550:     for (const attachment of requestedAttachments) {
551:       if (attachment.file_data) {
552:         const parsed = this.parseAttachmentDataUrl(attachment.file_data);
553:         this.validateNormalizedAttachment(attachment.name, parsed.mimeType, parsed.buffer.length);
554:         this.logNormalizedAttachment(traceId, attachment.name, parsed.mimeType, parsed.buffer.length);
555:         normalized.push({
556:           filename: attachment.name,
557:           mimeType: parsed.mimeType,
558:           fileData: attachment.file_data,
559:           size: parsed.buffer.length,
560:         });
561:         continue;
562:       }
563: 
564:       if (attachment.path) {
565:         let fileBuffer: Buffer;
566:         try {
567:           fileBuffer = await fs.readFile(attachment.path);
568:         } catch {
569:           throw this.invalidRequest(
570:             400,
571:             `Attachment path could not be read: ${attachment.path}`,
572:           );
573:         }
574:         const filename = attachment.name || path.basename(attachment.path);
575:         const mimeType = inferMimeFromFilename(filename);
576: 
577:         if (!mimeType) {
578:           throw this.invalidRequest(
579:             400,
580:             `Could not infer MIME type for attachment: ${filename}`,
581:           );
582:         }
583: 
584:         this.validateNormalizedAttachment(filename, mimeType, fileBuffer.length);
585:         this.logNormalizedAttachment(traceId, filename, mimeType, fileBuffer.length);
586:         normalized.push({
587:           filename,
588:           mimeType,
589:           fileData: `data:${mimeType};base64,${fileBuffer.toString('base64')}`,
590:           size: fileBuffer.length,
591:         });
592:         continue;
593:       }
594: 
595:       throw this.invalidRequest(
596:         400,
597:         `Attachment "${attachment.name}" must include either file_data or path`,
598:       );
599:     }
600: 
601:     for (const attachment of uploadedAttachments) {
602:       this.validateNormalizedAttachment(
603:         attachment.filename,
604:         attachment.mimeType,
605:         attachment.size,
606:       );
607:       this.logNormalizedAttachment(
608:         traceId,
609:         attachment.filename,
610:         attachment.mimeType,
611:         attachment.size,
612:       );
613:       normalized.push({
614:         filename: attachment.filename,
615:         mimeType: attachment.mimeType,
616:         fileData: `data:${attachment.mimeType};base64,${attachment.buffer.toString('base64')}`,
617:         size: attachment.size,
618:       });
619:     }
620: 
621:     return normalized;
622:   }
623: 
624:   private buildResponsesInput(body: LlmBridgeRequest, attachments: NormalizedAttachment[]) {
625:     if (body.messages?.length) {
626:       return body.messages.map((message) => ({
627:         role: message.role,
628:         content: this.buildMessageContent(message.content, message.role, attachments),
629:       }));
630:     }
631: 
632:     if (typeof body.input === 'string') {
633:       const content: Array<Record<string, string>> = [];
634:       if (body.input.trim()) {
635:         content.push({ type: 'input_text', text: body.input });
636:       }
637:       content.push(...this.buildFileContentItems(attachments));
638:       return [{ role: 'user', content }];
639:     }
640: 
641:     if (Array.isArray(body.input)) {
642:       return attachments.length > 0
643:         ? [...body.input, this.buildAttachmentInputMessage(attachments)]
644:         : body.input;
645:     }
646: 
647:     if (body.input && typeof body.input === 'object') {
648:       return attachments.length > 0
649:         ? [body.input, this.buildAttachmentInputMessage(attachments)]
650:         : body.input;
651:     }
652: 
653:     if (attachments.length > 0) {
654:       return [this.buildAttachmentInputMessage(attachments)];
655:     }
656: 
657:     throw this.invalidRequest(400, 'Request must include input, messages, or attachments');
658:   }
659: 
660:   private buildMessageContent(
661:     content: unknown,
662:     role: ChatMessageRole,
663:     attachments: NormalizedAttachment[],
664:   ) {
665:     const normalized = this.normalizeMessageContent(content);
666:     if (role === 'user' && attachments.length > 0) {
667:       normalized.push(...this.buildFileContentItems(attachments));
668:     }
669:     return normalized;
670:   }
671: 
672:   private normalizeMessageContent(content: unknown) {
673:     if (typeof content === 'string') {
674:       return [{ type: 'input_text', text: content }];
675:     }
676: 
677:     if (Array.isArray(content)) {
678:       return [...content];
679:     }
680: 
681:     if (content && typeof content === 'object') {
682:       return [content];
683:     }
684: 
685:     if (content == null) {
686:       return [];
687:     }
688: 
689:     return [{ type: 'input_text', text: String(content) }];
690:   }
691: 
692:   private buildFileContentItems(attachments: NormalizedAttachment[]) {
693:     return attachments.map((attachment) => ({
694:       type: 'input_file' as const,
695:       filename: attachment.filename,
696:       file_data: attachment.fileData,
697:     }));
698:   }
699: 
700:   private buildAttachmentInputMessage(attachments: NormalizedAttachment[]) {
701:     return {
702:       role: 'user',
703:       content: this.buildFileContentItems(attachments),
704:     };
705:   }
706: 
707:   private parseAttachmentDataUrl(fileData: string) {
708:     try {
709:       return parseBase64DataUrl(fileData);
710:     } catch (error) {
711:       throw this.invalidRequest(
712:         400,
713:         error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'attachments.file_data is invalid',
714:       );
715:     }
716:   }
717: 
718:   private validateNormalizedAttachment(filename: string, mimeType: string, size: number) {
719:     if (!size) {
720:       throw this.invalidRequest(
721:         400,
722:         `Attachment "${filename}" decoded to an empty file`,
723:       );
724:     }
725: 
726:     if (size > MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES) {
727:       throw this.invalidRequest(
728:         400,
729:         `Attachment "${filename}" exceeds max size of ${MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES} bytes`,
730:       );
731:     }
732: 
733:     if (!ALLOWED_ATTACHMENT_MIME_TYPES.has(mimeType)) {
734:       throw this.invalidRequest(400, `Unsupported attachment MIME type: ${mimeType}`);
735:     }
736:   }
737: 
738:   private logNormalizedAttachment(
739:     traceId: string,
740:     filename: string,
741:     mimeType: string,
742:     size: number,
743:   ) {
744:     console.info(
745:       `[asunder.llmBridge] normalized attachment trace=${traceId} filename=${filename} mime=${mimeType} size=${size}`,
746:     );
747:   }
748: 
749:   private resolvePromptId(requestPromptId?: string, defaultPromptId?: string) {
750:     return requestPromptId?.trim() || defaultPromptId;
751:   }
752: 
753:   private resolvePromptVersion(requestPromptVersion?: number) {
754:     return requestPromptVersion != null ? String(requestPromptVersion) : undefined;
755:   }
756: 
757:   private invalidRequest(statusCode: number, message: string) {
758:     return new LlmBridgeError(statusCode, message, {
759:       error: {
760:         message,
761:         type: 'invalid_request_error',
762:       },
763:     });
764:   }
765: 
766:   private getUpstreamConfig() {
767:     const apiKey = process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY || process.env.OPENAI_KIA_API_KEY;
768:     if (!apiKey) {
769:       throw new LlmBridgeError(500, 'OPENAI_API_KEY missing', {
770:         error: {
771:           message: 'Server misconfigured: OPENAI_API_KEY (or OPENAI_KIA_API_KEY) missing',
772:           type: 'server_error',
773:         },
774:       });
775:     }
776: 
777:     const baseUrl = (process.env.ASUNDER_LLM_UPSTREAM_BASE_URL ?? 'https://api.openai.com').trim();
778:     const path = (process.env.ASUNDER_LLM_UPSTREAM_PATH ?? '/v1/responses').trim();
779:     const normalizedBase = baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, '');
780:     const normalizedPath = path.startsWith('/') ? path : `/${path}`;
781:     const defaultModel =
782:       (process.env.ASUNDER_LLM_DEFAULT_MODEL ||
783:         process.env.OPENAI_PROMPT_MODEL ||
784:         process.env.OPENAI_MODEL ||
785:         '').trim() || undefined;
786:     const promptId =
787:       (
788:         process.env.OPENAI_ARCHETYPE_PROMP_ID ||
789:         process.env.OPENAI_PROMPT_ID ||
790:         process.env.ASUNDER_LLM_PROMPT_ID ||
791:         ''
792:       ).trim() || undefined;
793: 
794:     return {
795:       apiKey,
796:       url: `${normalizedBase}${normalizedPath}`,
797:       defaultModel,
798:       promptId,
799:     };
800:   }
801: 
802:   private async fetchWithTimeout(
803:     url: string,
804:     options: RequestInit,
805:     timeoutMs: number,
806:   ): Promise<globalThis.Response> {
807:     const controller = new AbortController();
808:     const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeoutMs);
809: 
810:     try {
811:       return await fetch(url, { ...options, signal: controller.signal });
812:     } catch (error: any) {
813:       if (error?.name === 'AbortError') {
814:         throw new LlmBridgeError(504, `Upstream request timed out after ${timeoutMs}ms`, {
815:           error: {
816:             message: `Upstream request timed out after ${timeoutMs}ms`,
817:             type: 'server_error',
818:           },
819:         });
820:       }
821: 
822:       throw new LlmBridgeError(502, 'Failed to reach upstream LLM provider', {
823:         error: {
824:           message: 'Failed to reach upstream LLM provider',
825:           type: 'server_error',
826:         },
827:       });
828:     } finally {
829:       clearTimeout(timeout);
830:     }
831:   }
832: }
``````

## File: src/app.module.ts
``````typescript
 1: import { Module, NestModule, MiddlewareConsumer } from '@nestjs/common';
 2: import { APP_INTERCEPTOR } from '@nestjs/core';
 3: import { ConfigModule } from '@nestjs/config';
 4: import { ServeStaticModule } from '@nestjs/serve-static';
 5: import { join } from 'path';
 6: 
 7: import { MetaController } from './meta/meta.controller';
 8: import { ParseController } from './parse/parse.controller';
 9: import { ImdbSearchController } from './parse/imdb-search.controller';
10: import { ImdbDetailController } from './parse/imdb-detail.controller';
11: 
12: import { GenerateReviewModule } from './generate-review/generate-review.module';
13: import { JustUsModule } from './justus/justus.module';
14: import { AsunderModule } from './asunder/asunder.module';
15: 
16: import { KiasporaModule } from './kiaspora/kiaspora.module';
17: 
18: import { TraceIdMiddleware } from './common/trace-id.middleware';
19: import { TraceIdInterceptor } from './common/trace-id.interceptor';
20: 
21: @Module({
22:   imports: [
23:     ConfigModule.forRoot({ isGlobal: true }),
24:     ServeStaticModule.forRoot({
25:       rootPath: join(process.cwd(), 'public'),
26:     }),
27:     GenerateReviewModule,
28:     KiasporaModule,
29:     JustUsModule,
30:     AsunderModule,
31:   ],
32:   controllers: [
33:     MetaController,
34:     ParseController,
35:     ImdbSearchController,
36:     ImdbDetailController,
37:   ],
38:   providers: [
39:     { provide: APP_INTERCEPTOR, useClass: TraceIdInterceptor },
40:   ],
41: })
42: export class AppModule implements NestModule {
43:   configure(consumer: MiddlewareConsumer) {
44:     consumer.apply(TraceIdMiddleware).forRoutes('*');
45:   }
46: }
``````
